```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Document Verification</h4>
    <p>Manage and verify all taxpayer submitted documents.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/documents/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Document
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search by doc no, TIN, taxpayer, type, title..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
        />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading documents...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Doc No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Document</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Reference No</th>
          <th>Issue Date</th>
          <th>Expiry Date</th>
          <th>Submitted</th>
          <th>File Size</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let d of filteredDocuments; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="doc-code">{{ d.documentNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ d.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ d.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ d.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="doc-type-cell">
              <div class="doc-type-icon">
                <i [class]="getTypeIcon(d.documentType)"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="doc-title">{{ d.documentTitle }}</span>
                <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(d.documentType)">
                  {{ d.documentType }}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td><span class="category-badge">{{ d.documentCategory }}</span></td>

          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ d.referenceNo }}</span></td>

          <td>{{ d.issueDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span [class]="isExpired(d.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-expired' : 'expiry-normal'">
              {{ d.expiryDate || '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>{{ d.submissionDate }}</td>

          <td><span class="file-size">{{ d.fileSize }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(d.status)">
              {{ d.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewDocument(d.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit"
                (click)="editDocument(d.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button
                *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete"
                (click)="confirmDelete(d.id)"
              >
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredDocuments.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>
              <p>No documents found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding: 12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let d of filteredDocuments">

      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar doc-avatar">
            <i [class]="getTypeIcon(d.documentType)"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ d.documentTitle }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ d.documentNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(d.status)">
          {{ d.status }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Taxpayer</label>
          <span>{{ d.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ d.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(d.documentType)">
            {{ d.documentType }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Reference</label>
          <span>{{ d.referenceNo }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Submitted</label>
          <span>{{ d.submissionDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="d.expiryDate">
          <label>Expiry</label>
          <span [class]="isExpired(d.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-expired' : ''">
            {{ d.expiryDate }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>File Size</label>
          <span>{{ d.fileSize }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="d.remarks">
          <label>Remarks</label>
          <span>{{ d.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewDocument(d.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editDocument(d.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button
          *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete"
          (click)="confirmDelete(d.id)"
        >
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredDocuments.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>
      <p>No documents found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn"
  routerLink="/documents/create" title="Add Document">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Business?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this business record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/document-verification/pages/document-list/document-list.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Router } from '@angular/router';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { Document } from '../../../../models/document.model';
import { finalize, Subject, takeUntil } from 'rxjs';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-document-list',
  templateUrl: './document-list.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./document-list.component.css'],
})
export class DocumentListComponent implements OnInit {
  documents: Document[] = [];
  searchTerm = '';
  isLoading = false;

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  showDeleteModal = false;
  pendingDeleteId: number | null = null;

  constructor(
    private http: HttpClient,
    private router: Router,
    private toast: ToastService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.loadDocuments();
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  loadDocuments(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;

    this.http
      .get<Document[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.DOCUMENTS.LIST)
      .pipe(
        takeUntil(this.destroy$),
        finalize(() => {
          this.isLoading = false;
        }),
      )
      .subscribe({
        next: (data) => {
          this.documents = data;
          
          // INFO:
          if (data.length === 0) {
            this.toast.info(
              'No documents registered yet. Click "Register document" to add one.',
            );
          }

          // WARNING:
          const soon = data.filter((b) => this.isExpiringSoon(b.expiryDate));
          if (soon.length > 0) {
            this.toast.warning(
              `${soon.length} item(s) require attention within 30 days.`
            );
          }
          this.toast.success('Documents loaded successfully.');
        },
        error: (error) => {
          console.error('Error loading documents:', error);
          this.toast.error('Failed to load documents. Please try again later.');
        },
      });
  }

  get filteredDocuments(): Document[] {
    if (!this.searchTerm.trim()) return this.documents;
    const term = this.searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return this.documents.filter(
      (d) =>
        d.documentNo.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        d.taxpayerName.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        d.tinNumber.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        d.documentType.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        d.documentTitle.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        d.referenceNo.toLowerCase().includes(term),
    );
  }

  getStatusClass(status: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      Pending: 'status-pending',
      Verified: 'status-active',
      Rejected: 'status-suspended',
      Expired: 'status-expired',
      'Under Review': 'status-review',
    };
    return map[status] ?? '';
  }

  getTypeClass(type: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      NID: 'type-nid',
      'Trade License': 'type-trade',
      'TIN Certificate': 'type-tin',
      'BIN Certificate': 'type-bin',
      'VAT Return': 'type-vat',
      'Income Tax Return': 'type-it',
      'Bank Statement': 'type-bank',
      'Audit Report': 'type-audit',
      Other: 'type-other',
    };
    return map[type] ?? '';
  }

  getTypeIcon(type: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      NID: 'bi bi-person-badge-fill',
      'Trade License': 'bi bi-building-fill',
      'TIN Certificate': 'bi bi-upc-scan',
      'BIN Certificate': 'bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill',
      'VAT Return': 'bi bi-arrow-repeat',
      'Income Tax Return': 'bi bi-receipt-cutoff',
      'Bank Statement': 'bi bi-bank2',
      'Audit Report': 'bi bi-shield-fill-check',
      Other: 'bi bi-file-earmark-fill',
    };
    return map[type] ?? 'bi bi-file-earmark-fill';
  }

  viewDocument(id: number): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/documents', id]);
  }
  editDocument(id: number): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/documents', id, 'edit']);
  }

  confirmDelete(id: number): void {
    this.pendingDeleteId = id;
    this.showDeleteModal = true;
  }
  cancelDelete(): void {
    this.pendingDeleteId = null;
    this.showDeleteModal = false;
  }

  confirmDeleteExecute(): void {
    if (this.pendingDeleteId === null) return;
    const id = this.pendingDeleteId;
    this.showDeleteModal = false;
    this.pendingDeleteId = null;

    this.http
      .delete(API_ENDPOINTS.DOCUMENTS.DELETE(id))
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$),
        finalize(() => {
          this.isLoading = false;
        })) // FIX #3: Auto-cancel on destroy
      .subscribe({
        next: () => {
          this.documents = this.documents.filter((d) => d.id !== id);
        },
        error: (error) => {
          console.error('Error deleting document:', error);
          this.toast.error('Failed to delete document. Please try again.');
        },
      });
  }

  isExpired(date: string): boolean {
    if (!date) return false;
    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    return new Date(date) < today;
  }

  isExpiringSoon(date: string): boolean {
    if (!date) return false;
    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const expiry = new Date(date);
    const diff = (expiry.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
    return diff >= 0 && diff <= 30;
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/fiscal-years/fiscal-years-routing.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { RouterModule, Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { AuthGuard } from 'src/app/core/guards/auth.guard';
import { Role } from 'src/app/core/constants/roles.constants';
import { FiscalYearListComponent }   from '../pages/fiscal-year-list/fiscal-year-list.component';
import { FiscalYearCreateComponent } from '../pages/fiscal-year-create/fiscal-year-create.component';
import { FiscalYearEditComponent } from '../pages/fiscal-year-edit/fiscal-year-edit.component';

const routes: Routes = [
  {
    path: '',
    component: FiscalYearListComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.SUPER_ADMIN, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER] },
  },
  {
    path: 'create',
    component: FiscalYearCreateComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.SUPER_ADMIN, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER] },
  },
  {
    path: 'edit/:id',
    component: FiscalYearEditComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.SUPER_ADMIN, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER] },
  },
];

@NgModule({
  imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
  exports: [RouterModule]
})
export class FiscalYearsRoutingModule { }
```

## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/pages/fiscal-year-create/fiscal-year-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Fiscal Year</h4>
    <p>Define a new fiscal year with tax deadlines.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 1: Year Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Fiscal Year Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Year name — dates auto-fill from name</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Year Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. 2025-26"
            [(ngModel)]="form.yearName"
            (ngModelChange)="onYearNameChange()" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint">Format: YYYY-YY (e.g. 2025-26) — dates auto-fill</span>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status" (ngModelChange)="onStatusChange()">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Start Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.startDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">End Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.endDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Year Preview Card -->
    <div class="year-preview" *ngIf="form.yearName">
      <div class="yp-year">FY {{ form.yearName }}</div>
      <div class="yp-range" *ngIf="form.startDate && form.endDate">
        {{ form.startDate }} → {{ form.endDate }}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Tax Deadlines -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-alarm-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Deadlines</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">VAT and income tax due dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">VAT Due Day (Monthly)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.vatDueDay">
            <option *ngFor="let d of vatDueDays" [ngValue]="d">{{ d }}th of each month</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Income Tax Due Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-event input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incomeTaxDueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Deadline Preview -->
    <div class="deadline-preview" *ngIf="form.vatDueDay || form.incomeTaxDueDate">
      <div class="dp-item" *ngIf="form.vatDueDay">
        <div class="dp-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div>
          <div class="dp-label">VAT Returns Due</div>
          <div class="dp-value">{{ form.vatDueDay }}th of each month</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dp-item" *ngIf="form.incomeTaxDueDate">
        <div class="dp-icon it"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <div class="dp-label">Income Tax Return Due</div>
          <div class="dp-value">{{ form.incomeTaxDueDate }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Current Year Toggle -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Current Year Setting</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Set as the active fiscal year for the system</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="toggle-section">
      <div class="toggle-info">
        <div class="ti-title">Set as Current Year</div>
        <div class="ti-desc">Enabling this will mark this as the active fiscal year. The previous current year will be automatically closed.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="toggle-wrap">
        <label class="toggle-switch">
          <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.isCurrentYear" (ngModelChange)="onCurrentYearChange()" />
          <span class="toggle-slider"></span>
        </label>
        <span class="toggle-label" [class.on]="form.isCurrentYear">
          {{ form.isCurrentYear ? 'Yes — Current Year' : 'No' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i> Create Fiscal Year</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">

  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">

  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading"><div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div></div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>

  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Year Info -->

    <div class="section-header">

    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Year Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.yearName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status" (ngModelChange)="onStatusChange()">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Start Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.startDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">End Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.endDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Tax Deadlines -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-alarm-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Tax Deadlines</h6><span class="section-sub">VAT and income tax due dates</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">VAT Due Day</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.vatDueDay">
            <option *ngFor="let d of vatDueDays" [ngValue]="d">{{ d }}th of each month</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Income Tax Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incomeTaxDueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Current Year -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Current Year Setting</h6><span class="section-sub">Set as the active fiscal year</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="toggle-section">
      <div class="toggle-info">
        <div class="ti-title">Set as Current Year</div>
        <div class="ti-desc">Previous current year will be automatically closed.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="toggle-wrap">
        <label class="toggle-switch">
          <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.isCurrentYear" (ngModelChange)="onCurrentYearChange()" />
          <span class="toggle-slider"></span>
        </label>
        <span class="toggle-label" [class.on]="form.isCurrentYear">
          {{ form.isCurrentYear ? 'Yes — Current Year' : 'No' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Fiscal Year</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/pages/fiscal-year-list/fiscal-year-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Fiscal Years</h4>
    <p>Manage fiscal years and tax deadline configurations.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/fiscal-years/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Fiscal Year
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading fiscal years...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Fiscal Year Cards -->
  <div class="fy-grid" *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <div class="fy-card"
      *ngFor="let y of years"
      [class.current]="y.isCurrentYear"
      [class.upcoming]="y.status === 'Upcoming'"
      [class.closed]="y.status === 'Closed'">

      <!-- Current Year Badge -->
      <div class="current-badge" *ngIf="y.isCurrentYear">
        <i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i> Current Year
      </div>
      <div class="upcoming-badge" *ngIf="y.status === 'Upcoming'">
        <i class="bi bi-clock-fill"></i> Upcoming
      </div>

      <!-- Year Name -->
      <div class="fy-year-name">{{ y.yearName }}</div>

      <!-- Dates -->
      <div class="fy-dates">
        <div class="fy-date-item">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i>
          <div>
            <span class="fyd-label">Start</span>
            <span class="fyd-value">{{ y.startDate }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fy-date-arrow"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></div>
        <div class="fy-date-item">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x"></i>
          <div>
            <span class="fyd-label">End</span>
            <span class="fyd-value">{{ y.endDate }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Tax Deadlines -->
      <div class="fy-deadlines">
        <div class="fy-deadline-item">
          <div class="fdl-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
          <div>
            <span class="fdl-label">VAT Due Day</span>
            <span class="fdl-value">{{ y.vatDueDay }}th of each month</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fy-deadline-item">
          <div class="fdl-icon it"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <span class="fdl-label">Income Tax Due</span>
            <span class="fdl-value">{{ y.incomeTaxDueDate }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Status & Actions -->
      <div class="fy-footer">
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(y.status)">{{ y.status }}</span>
        <div class="fy-actions">
          <button
            *ngIf="!y.isCurrentYear && y.status !== 'Closed'"
            class="btn-set-current"
            [disabled]="settingCurrentId !== null"
            (click)="setCurrent(y.id)">
            <span *ngIf="settingCurrentId !== y.id">
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Set as Current
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="settingCurrentId === y.id">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>Saving...
            </span>
          </button>
        </div>
          <button class="btn-fy-edit" (click)="edit(y.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
         </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Add New Card -->
    <div class="fy-add-card" routerLink="/fiscal-years/create">
      <i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill"></i>
      <span>Add Fiscal Year</span>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>
```

```css
.duty-ref {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  background: #e8eef9;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  font-family: monospace;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.goods-name {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a2340;
}
.hs-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  padding: 1px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-family: monospace;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.country-badge {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #555;
}
.port-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  background: #f0f4f8;
  color: #555;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

  font-weight: 800;
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  padding: 3px 9px;
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.duty {
  color: #e74c3c;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.total {
  color: #1a3f8f;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.data-table {

}
```

## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-list/import-duty-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Import Duty</h4>
    <p>Manage all import duty assessments and clearances.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/import-duty/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> New Import
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by ref, taxpayer, product, country, port..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading import records...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Duty Ref</th>
          <th>Taxpayer / Business</th>
          <th>Goods</th>
          <th>Origin</th>
          <th>CIF Value</th>
          <th>CD Rate</th>
          <th>Customs Duty</th>
          <th>Total Payable</th>
          <th>Port</th>
          <th>Import Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="duty-ref">{{ r.dutyRef }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar imp-avatar"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div>
              <span class="goods-name">{{ r.productName }}</span>
              <span class="hs-badge">{{ r.hsCode }}</span>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="country-badge">🌐 {{ r.originCountry }}</span></td>
          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(r.cifValue) }}</td>
          <td><span class="rate-pill">{{ r.cdRate || 0 }}%</span></td>
          <td class="amt-cell duty">{{ formatCurrency(r.customsDuty) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell total">{{ formatCurrency(r.totalPayable) }}</td>
          <td><span class="port-badge">{{ r.portOfEntry }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ r.importDate }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="13">
            <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i><p>No import records found.</p></div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar imp-avatar"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.businessName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.dutyRef }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Product</label><span>{{ r.productName }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>HS Code</label><span>{{ r.hsCode }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Origin</label><span>{{ r.originCountry }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>CIF Value</label><span>{{ formatCurrency(r.cifValue) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>CD Rate</label><span>{{ r.cdRate || 0 }}%</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Customs Duty</label><span class="duty">{{ formatCurrency(r.customsDuty) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Total Payable</label><span class="total">{{ formatCurrency(r.totalPayable) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Port</label><span>{{ r.portOfEntry }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Import Date</label><span>{{ r.importDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i><p>No import records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/import-duty/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Import Duty Record?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this import duty record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```css
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.ihc-hs {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-family: monospace;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
```

## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-view/import-duty-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Import Duty Details</h4>
    <p>Full import duty assessment information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading"><div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div></div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && record">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="imp-header-card">
    <div class="ihc-left">
      <div class="ihc-icon"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="ihc-ref">{{ record.dutyRef }}</div>
        <div class="ihc-business">{{ record.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="ihc-meta">
          <span class="ihc-product">{{ record.productName }}</span>
          <span class="ihc-hs">{{ record.hsCode }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ihc-right">
      <div class="ihc-stat">
        <span class="ihs-label">Total Payable</span>
        <span class="ihs-value">{{ fmt(record.totalPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ihc-stat">
        <span class="ihs-label">CD Rate</span>
        <span class="ihs-rate">{{ record.cdRate || 0 }}%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Amount Summary -->
  <div class="imp-amount-row">
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon cif"><i class="bi bi-currency-dollar"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">CIF Value</span><span class="iac-value">{{ fmt(record.cifValue) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon duty"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Customs Duty (CD)</span><span class="iac-value duty">{{ fmt(record.customsDuty) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Supplementary Duty (SD)</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.supplementaryDuty) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">VAT</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.vat) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon duty"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">AIT</span><span class="iac-value duty">{{ fmt(record.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">AT</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.advanceTax) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card highlight">
      <div class="iac-icon total"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Total Payable</span><span class="iac-value total">{{ fmt(record.totalPayable) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Paid</span><span class="iac-value paid">{{ record.paidAmount > 0 ? fmt(record.paidAmount) : '—' }}</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i><span>Importer Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">TIN</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.tinNumber }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Taxpayer</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Business</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.businessName }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i><span>Goods Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Product</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.productName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">HS Code</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.hsCode }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Description</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.goodsDescription }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Origin Country</span><span class="detail-value">🌐 {{ record.originCountry }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i><span>Shipping & Port</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Port of Entry</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.portOfEntry }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Entry Number</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.boeNumber }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Entry Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.boeDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Lading</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.billOfLading }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Import Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.importDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="record.assessmentDate"><span class="detail-label">Assessment Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.assessmentDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i><span>Status & Remarks</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Status</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="record.remarks"><span class="detail-label">Remarks</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.remarks }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/IT10B/it10b.component.css
```css
/* ── Page Header ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn-back {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
  background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e0d5f5; color: #7c3aed;
  padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s;
}
.btn-back:hover { background: #f3eeff; }

/* ── Loading State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.loading-state {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  justify-content: center; padding: 60px 20px; gap: 16px; color: #888;
}
.text-purple { color: #7c3aed !important; }

/* ── Sticky Net Wealth Panel ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.net-wealth-panel {
  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 16px 24px; border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
  transition: background 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;
  flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
}
.net-wealth-panel.positive {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0fdf4, #dcfce7);
  border: 1.5px solid #86efac;
}
.net-wealth-panel.negative {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff5f5, #fee2e2);
  border: 1.5px solid #fca5a5;
}
.nw-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; }
.nw-icon {
  width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a855f7); color: #fff;
}
.nw-label { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; margin: 0; }
.nw-formula { font-size: 11.5px; color: #888; margin: 2px 0 0; }
.nw-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.nw-breakdown { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; }
.nw-assets { font-weight: 600; color: #16a34a; }
.nw-liab  { font-weight: 600; color: #dc2626; }
.nw-sep   { font-weight: 700; color: #888; font-size: 16px; }
.nw-amount { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px; }
.nw-amount.amount-positive { color: #16a34a; }
.nw-amount.amount-negative { color: #dc2626; }

/* ── Form Card & Sections ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-card {
  background: #fff; border-radius: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07); overflow: hidden;
}
.form-section { padding: 24px 28px; }
.section-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.section-icon {
  width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff;
  font-size: 17px; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.assets-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #16a34a, #22c55e); }
.liab-icon   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626, #f87171); }
.section-title { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.section-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: #999; }
.section-divider { height: 1px; background: #f0f4f8; margin: 0 28px; }

.section-total-badge {
  margin-left: auto; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 700;
  background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; border: 1.5px solid #86efac;
  padding: 5px 14px; border-radius: 20px; white-space: nowrap;
}

/* ── Form Grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px;
}
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
.form-group.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }

.form-label {
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #444;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
}
.form-label.required::after { content: " *"; color: #e74c3c; }
.field-icon  { color: #7c3aed; font-size: 13px; }
.red-icon    { color: #dc2626 !important; }
.field-hint  { font-size: 11.5px; color: #aaa; margin: 0 0 4px; }

.input-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.input-icon {
  position: absolute; left: 12px; color: #aaa;
  font-size: 14px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1;
}
.form-input {
  width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px 10px 36px; border: 1.5px solid #e0e8f0;
  border-radius: 9px; font-size: 13.5px; color: #333; background: #fafbfc;
  outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  font-family: inherit;
}
.form-input:focus {
  border-color: #7c3aed; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.08); background: #fff;
}
.input-wrap.field-error .form-input {
  border-color: #e74c3c; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(231,76,60,0.08);
}
.liab-input .form-input:focus {
  border-color: #dc2626; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(220,38,38,0.08);
}
.validation-msg { font-size: 11.5px; color: #e74c3c; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; }

/* ── Subtotal Bars ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.subtotal-bar {
  margin-top: 20px; padding: 11px 18px; border-radius: 9px;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; display: flex; align-items: center;
}
.assets-bar { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; }
.liab-bar   { background: #fff5f5; color: #dc2626; border: 1px solid #fecaca; }

/* ── Wealth Summary Table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.wealth-summary-table {
  border: 1.5px solid #e0d5f5; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
}
.ws-row {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 11px 20px;
}
.ws-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #666; }
.ws-label.bold { font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.ws-value { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.ws-value.assets-val { color: #16a34a; }
.ws-value.liab-val   { color: #dc2626; }
.ws-value.net-positive { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #16a34a; }
.ws-value.net-negative { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #dc2626; }
.ws-divider { height: 1px; background: #e0d5f5; }
.ws-total-row { background: #f3eeff; padding: 14px 20px; }
.ws-note {
  padding: 10px 20px; background: #fff5f5; color: #dc2626;
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
}

/* ── Form Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-actions {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 10px; padding: 20px 28px;
  background: #f8fafc; border-top: 1px solid #f0f4f8; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.btn-cancel {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #e0e8f0; color: #666;
  padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
}
.btn-cancel:hover { background: #f5f7fb; }
.btn-reset {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  background: #fef3e2; border: 1.5px solid #fde8c0; color: #f59e0b;
  padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
}
.btn-reset:hover { background: #fde8c0; }
.btn-submit {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a855f7);
  color: #fff; border: none; padding: 10px 28px;
  border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}
.btn-submit:hover:not(:disabled) {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.35); transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.btn-cancel:disabled, .btn-reset:disabled, .btn-submit:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none;
}

/* ── Responsive ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .net-wealth-panel { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
  .nw-right { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; }
  .form-section { padding: 18px 16px; }
  .section-divider { margin: 0 16px; }
  .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .section-header { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .section-total-badge { margin-left: 0; }
  .form-actions { padding: 16px; justify-content: stretch; }
  .btn-cancel, .btn-reset, .btn-submit { flex: 1; justify-content: center; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .form-actions { flex-direction: column; }
  .btn-cancel, .btn-reset, .btn-submit { width: 100%; }
  .nw-breakdown { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 4px; }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/IT10B/it10b.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>IT-10B &mdash; Statement of Assets &amp; Liabilities</h4>
    <p *ngIf="returnNo">Linked to Return: <strong>{{ returnNo }}</strong></p>
    <p *ngIf="!returnNo">Return ID: <strong>#{{ returnId }}</strong></p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="goBack()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Return
  </button>
</div>

<!-- Loading State -->
<div class="loading-state" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-purple" role="status"></div>
  <p>Loading statement&hellip;</p>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <!-- ── Sticky Net Wealth Summary Panel ─────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="net-wealth-panel" [class.positive]="netWealth >= 0" [class.negative]="netWealth < 0">
    <div class="nw-left">
      <div class="nw-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></div>
      <div>
        <p class="nw-label">Real-Time Net Wealth</p>
        <p class="nw-formula">Total Assets − Total Liabilities</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="nw-right">
      <div class="nw-breakdown">
        <span class="nw-assets">Assets: {{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
        <span class="nw-sep">−</span>
        <span class="nw-liab">Liabilities: {{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</span>
        <span class="nw-sep">=</span>
      </div>
      <div class="nw-amount" [class.amount-positive]="netWealth >= 0" [class.amount-negative]="netWealth < 0">
        <span *ngIf="netWealth >= 0"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>{{ fmt(netWealth) }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="netWealth < 0"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-1"></i>{{ fmt(netWealth) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <form [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" novalidate>
  <div class="form-card">

    <!-- ── Section 1: Assets ──────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon assets-icon">
          <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Assets</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">All properties, investments and balances owned by the taxpayer</span>
        </div>
        <div class="section-total-badge">
          Total: {{ fmt(totalAssets) }}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Non-Agricultural Property -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-house-fill field-icon"></i>
            Non-Agricultural Property
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Land, house, apartment, commercial property</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.invalid && ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="nonAgriculturalProperty"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Agricultural Property -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-tree-fill field-icon"></i>
            Agricultural Property 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Farmland, orchards, agricultural plots</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.invalid && ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="agriculturalProperty"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Investments -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-graph-up field-icon"></i>
            Investments
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Shares, savings certificates, FD, bonds</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('investments')?.invalid && ctrl('investments')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="investments"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('investments')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('investments')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Motor Vehicles -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-car-front-fill field-icon"></i>
            Motor Vehicles 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('motorVehicles')?.invalid && ctrl('motorVehicles')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="motorVehicles"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('motorVehicles')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('motorVehicles')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Bank Balances & Cash -->
        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-piggy-bank-fill field-icon"></i>
            Bank Balances &amp; Cash in Hand 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">All bank accounts, savings, FDR balances and physical cash</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('bankBalances')?.invalid && ctrl('bankBalances')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="bankBalances"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('bankBalances')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('bankBalances')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Assets subtotal bar -->
      <div class="subtotal-bar assets-bar">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator me-2"></i>
        Total Assets : <strong>{{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</strong>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Section 2: Liabilities  ───────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon liab-icon">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-back-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Liabilities </h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Outstanding loans, mortgages and other financial obligations</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Personal Liabilities -->
        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-bank field-icon red-icon"></i>
            Personal Liabilities 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Bank loans, home mortgage, car loan, personal debt</p>
          <div class="input-wrap liab-input" [class.field-error]="ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.invalid && ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="personalLiabilities"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Liabilities subtotal bar -->
      <div class="subtotal-bar liab-bar">
        <i class="bi bi-dash-circle me-2"></i>
        Total Liabilities : <strong>{{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</strong>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Net Wealth Footer Summary ───────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="wealth-summary-table">
        <div class="ws-row">
          <span class="ws-label">Total Assets</span>
          <span class="ws-value assets-val">{{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-row">
          <span class="ws-label">Less: Total Liabilities</span>
          <span class="ws-value liab-val">{{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-divider"></div>
        <div class="ws-row ws-total-row">
          <span class="ws-label bold">Net Wealth </span>
          <span class="ws-value" [class.net-positive]="netWealth >= 0" [class.net-negative]="netWealth < 0">
            {{ fmt(netWealth) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-note" *ngIf="netWealth < 0">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
          Net wealth is negative — liabilities exceed total assets. Please review the figures.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="goBack()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-reset"  (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isSaving || form.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
          <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i>
          {{ isEditMode ? 'Update Statement' : 'Submit Statement' }}
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isSaving">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          {{ isEditMode ? 'Updating...' : 'Submitting...' }}
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div><!-- .form-card -->
  </form>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/notices-notifications/notice/notice-routing.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { RouterModule, Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { AuthGuard } from 'src/app/core/guards/auth.guard';
import { Role } from 'src/app/core/constants/roles.constants';

import { NoticeCreateComponent } from '../pages/notice-create/notice-create.component';
import { NoticeListComponent } from '../pages/notice-list/notice-list.component';
import { NoticeViewComponent } from '../pages/notice-view/notice-view.component';


const routes: Routes = [
  {
    path: '',
    component: NoticeListComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.SUPER_ADMIN, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] }
  },
  {
    path: 'create',
    component: NoticeCreateComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.SUPER_ADMIN, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.TAX_OFFICER] }
  },
  {
    path: 'view/:id',
    component: NoticeViewComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.SUPER_ADMIN, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] }
  }
];

@NgModule({
  imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
  exports: [RouterModule]
})
export class NoticeRoutingModule { }
```
