## File: src/app/features/refund-management/refund/refund-routing.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { RouterModule, Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { RefundListComponent } from '../pages/refund-list/refund-list.component';
import { RefundCreateComponent } from '../pages/refund-create/refund-create.component';
import { RefundViewComponent } from '../pages/refund-view/refund-view.component';
import { RefundEditComponent } from '../pages/refund-edit/refund-edit.component';
import { RefundSuccessComponent } from '../pages/refund-success/refund-success.component';
import { RefundRespondComponent } from '../pages/refund-respond/refund-respond.component';

const routes: Routes = [
  { path: '', component: RefundListComponent },
  { path: 'create', component: RefundCreateComponent },
  { path: 'success/:id', component: RefundSuccessComponent },
  { path: ':id/view', component: RefundViewComponent },
  { path: ':id/edit', component: RefundEditComponent },
  { path: ':id/respond', component: RefundRespondComponent },
];

@NgModule({
  imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
  exports: [RouterModule],
})
export class RefundRoutingModule {}
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/services/refund.service.spec.ts
```typescript
import { TestBed } from '@angular/core/testing';
import { HttpClientTestingModule, HttpTestingController } from '@angular/common/http/testing';
import { RefundService } from './refund.service';

describe('RefundService', () => {
  let service: RefundService;
  let httpMock: HttpTestingController;

  beforeEach(() => {
    TestBed.configureTestingModule({
      imports: [HttpClientTestingModule],
      providers: [RefundService],
    });
    service = TestBed.inject(RefundService);
    httpMock = TestBed.inject(HttpTestingController);
  });

  afterEach(() => httpMock.verify());

  it('should be created', () => {
    expect(service).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should call GET /api/v1/refunds/my for getMyRefunds', () => {
    service.getMyRefunds({ page: 0, size: 10 }).subscribe();
    const req = httpMock.expectOne(r => r.url.includes('/api/v1/refunds/my'));
    expect(req.request.method).toBe('GET');
    req.flush({ content: [], totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, size: 10, number: 0 });
  });

  it('should call POST /api/v1/refunds for create', () => {
    const payload: any = { refundType: 'INCOME_TAX', fiscalYearId: 1, sources: [], requestedAmount: 10000, bankDetails: {} };
    service.create(payload).subscribe();
    const req = httpMock.expectOne(r => r.url.includes('/api/v1/refunds') && !r.url.includes('/my'));
    expect(req.request.method).toBe('POST');
    req.flush({});
  });
});
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/ait-report/ait-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>AIT Deduction Report</h4>
    <p>Advance income tax deductions by source type — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Records</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by AIT ref, taxpayer, source type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading AIT data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>AIT Reference No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Source Type</th>
          <th class="text-end">Calculated Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">Approved Amount</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Created At</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.aitReferenceNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">
                {{ (r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || 'T').charAt(0) }}
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || '—' }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber || r.taxpayer?.tinNumber || '—' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.sourceType }}</span></td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">
            {{ formatAmount(r.calculatedAitAmount) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">
            {{ formatAmount(r.approvedAitAmount || r.calculatedAitAmount) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="8">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
              <p>No AIT records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">
            {{ (r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || 'T').charAt(0) }}
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || '—' }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Source</label>
          <span class="type-badge">{{ r.sourceType }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Calculated</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.calculatedAitAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Approved</label>
          <span class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">
            {{ formatAmount(r.approvedAitAmount || r.calculatedAitAmount) }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-percent"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/import-duty-report/import-duty-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Import Duty Report</h4>
    <p>Import duty assessments and clearances — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Records</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by ref no, importer, port..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading import duty data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Reference No</th>
          <th>Importer</th>
          <th>Port of Entry</th>
          <th>Commodity</th>
          <th class="text-end">Declared Value</th>
          <th class="text-end">Duty Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">VAT Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">Total Payable</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Import Date</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.referenceNo || r.id }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">
                {{ (r.importerName || 'I').charAt(0) }}
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.importerName || '—' }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.importerTin || r.tinNumber || '—' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.portOfEntry || r.port || '—' }}</td>
          <td style="max-width:160px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap"
            [title]="r.commodityDescription || r.description || ''">
            {{ r.commodityDescription || r.description || '—' }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">
            {{ formatAmount(r.declaredValue || r.cif) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">
            {{ formatAmount(r.dutyAmount || r.customsDuty) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">
            {{ formatAmount(r.vatAmount || r.importVat) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative" style="font-weight:800">
            {{ formatAmount(r.totalPayable || r.totalTax) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ (r.importDate || r.createdAt) | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i>
              <p>No import duty records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ (r.importerName || 'I').charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.importerName || '—' }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.referenceNo || r.id }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Port</label><span>{{ r.portOfEntry || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Duty</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">
            {{ formatAmount(r.dutyAmount || r.customsDuty) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Total</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative" style="font-weight:800">
            {{ formatAmount(r.totalPayable || r.totalTax) }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Income Tax Returns Report</h4>
    <p>ITR filing status and tax collection analysis — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Returns</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by TIN, taxpayer name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value" (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">
      {{ f.label }}
    </button>
    <span style="width:1px;background:#e0e8f0;margin:0 6px"></span>
    <button *ngFor="let t of typeFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeTaxpayerType === t.value" (click)="filterByType(t.value)">
      {{ t.label }}
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading income tax data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>TIN Number</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Assessment Year</th>
          <th class="text-end">Gross Income</th>
          <th class="text-end">Taxable Income</th>
          <th class="text-end">Tax Payable</th>
          <th class="text-end">Tax Paid</th>
          <th class="text-end">Tax Due</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Filed At</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.taxpayerType }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.taxpayerType }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ r.assessmentYear }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.grossIncome) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.taxableIncome) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.taxPayable) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">{{ formatAmount(r.taxPaid) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell" [ngClass]="r.taxDue > 0 ? 'tax-due-cell' : 'tax-paid-cell'">
            {{ formatAmount(r.taxDue) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.filedAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>
              <p>No income tax returns found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Assessment Year</label><span>{{ r.assessmentYear }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Payable</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.taxPayable) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Due</label>
          <span class="amount-cell" [ngClass]="r.taxDue > 0 ? 'tax-due-cell' : 'tax-paid-cell'">
            {{ formatAmount(r.taxDue) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Filed At</label><span>{{ r.filedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/income-tax-report/income-tax-report.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { ReportsService } from '../../service/reports.service';
import { IncomeTaxRow } from '../../model/report.model';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-income-tax-report',
  templateUrl: './income-tax-report.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./income-tax-report.component.css'],
})
export class IncomeTaxReportComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  rows: IncomeTaxRow[] = [];
  isLoading = false;
  totalElements = 0;
  totalPages = 0;

  fiscalYear = '';
  activeStatus = '';
  activeTaxpayerType = '';
  searchTerm = '';
  page = 0;
  size = 20;

  statusFilters = [
    { label: 'All', value: '' },
    { label: 'Submitted', value: 'Submitted' },
    { label: 'Accepted', value: 'Accepted' },
    { label: 'Rejected', value: 'Rejected' },
    { label: 'Draft', value: 'Draft' },
  ];

  typeFilters = [
    { label: 'All Types', value: '' },
    { label: 'Individual', value: 'INDIVIDUAL' },
    { label: 'Company', value: 'COMPANY' },
    { label: 'Partnership', value: 'PARTNERSHIP' },
  ];

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private reportsService: ReportsService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.route.queryParams.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(params => {
      this.fiscalYear = params['fiscalYear'] || '';
      this.loadData();
    });
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  loadData(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.reportsService
      .getIncomeTaxReport(
        this.fiscalYear, this.activeStatus,
        this.activeTaxpayerType, this.page, this.size)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)))
      .subscribe({
        next: (res) => {
          this.rows          = res.content;
          this.totalElements = res.totalElements;
          this.totalPages    = res.totalPages;
        },
        error: () => { this.rows = []; },
      });
  }

  filterByStatus(status: string): void {
    this.activeStatus = status;
    this.page = 0;
    this.loadData();
  }

  filterByType(type: string): void {
    this.activeTaxpayerType = type;
    this.page = 0;
    this.loadData();
  }

  get filteredRows(): IncomeTaxRow[] {
    if (!this.searchTerm.trim()) return this.rows;
    const q = this.searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return this.rows.filter(r =>
      r.tinNumber?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      r.taxpayerName?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    );
  }

  get pageRange(): number[] {
    const start = this.page * this.size + 1;
    const end   = Math.min(start + this.size - 1, this.totalElements);
    return [start, end];
  }

  prevPage(): void { if (this.page > 0) { this.page--; this.loadData(); } }
  nextPage(): void { if (this.page < this.totalPages - 1) { this.page++; this.loadData(); } }
  goBack(): void { this.router.navigate(['/reports']); }

  exportCsv(): void {
    this.reportsService.exportReport('csv', {
      reportType: 'INCOME_TAX',
      fiscalYear: this.fiscalYear,
    }).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(blob => {
      this.reportsService.triggerBlobDownload(
        blob, `IncomeTax_${this.fiscalYear}.csv`);
    });
  }

  getStatusClass(status: string): string {
    switch (status?.toLowerCase()) {
      case 'accepted':  return 'status-active';
      case 'submitted': return 'status-pending';
      case 'rejected':  return 'status-rejected';
      case 'draft':     return 'status-draft';
      default:          return 'status-pending';
    }
  }

  formatAmount(v: number | null | undefined): string {
    if (!v) return '৳0.00';
    return '৳' + v.toLocaleString('en-BD', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 });
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/penalty-report/penalty-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Penalty Collection Report</h4>
    <p>Penalty and fine collections — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Penalties</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by penalty no, taxpayer, TIN..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status + Severity Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
    <span style="width:1px;background:#e0e8f0;margin:0 6px"></span>
    <button *ngFor="let s of severityFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeSeverity === s.value"
      (click)="filterBySeverity(s.value)">{{ s.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading penalty data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Penalty No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Severity</th>
          <th class="text-end">Base Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">Interest</th>
          <th class="text-end">Total</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Issued At</th>
          <th>Paid At</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.penaltyRefNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.penaltyType }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(r.severity)">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ r.severity }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.baseAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.penaltyAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative" style="font-weight:800">
            {{ formatAmount(r.totalAmount) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.issuedAt || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.paidAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
              <p>No penalty records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.penaltyRefNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge">{{ r.penaltyType }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Severity</label>
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(r.severity)">{{ r.severity }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Total</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.totalAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Issued</label><span>{{ r.issuedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/penalty-report/penalty-report.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { ReportsService } from '../../service/reports.service';
import { PenaltyReportRow } from '../../model/report.model';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-penalty-report',
  templateUrl: './penalty-report.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./penalty-report.component.css'],
})
export class PenaltyReportComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  rows: PenaltyReportRow[] = [];
  isLoading = false;
  totalElements = 0;
  totalPages = 0;

  fiscalYear = '';
  activeStatus = '';
  activeSeverity = '';
  searchTerm = '';
  page = 0;
  size = 20;

  statusFilters = [
    { label: 'All', value: '' },
    { label: 'Pending', value: 'PENDING' },
    { label: 'Paid', value: 'PAID' },
    { label: 'Waived', value: 'WAIVED' },
    { label: 'Disputed', value: 'DISPUTED' },
  ];

  severityFilters = [
    { label: 'All Severity', value: '' },
    { label: 'Low', value: 'LOW' },
    { label: 'Medium', value: 'MEDIUM' },
    { label: 'High', value: 'HIGH' },
    { label: 'Critical', value: 'CRITICAL' },
  ];

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private reportsService: ReportsService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.route.queryParams.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(params => {
      this.fiscalYear = params['fiscalYear'] || '';
      this.loadData();
    });
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  loadData(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.reportsService
      .getPenaltyReport(
        this.fiscalYear, this.activeSeverity,
        this.activeStatus, this.page, this.size)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)))
      .subscribe({
        next: (res) => {
          this.rows          = res.content;
          this.totalElements = res.totalElements;
          this.totalPages    = res.totalPages;
        },
        error: () => { this.rows = []; },
      });
  }

  filterByStatus(status: string): void {
    this.activeStatus = status;
    this.page = 0;
    this.loadData();
  }

  filterBySeverity(sev: string): void {
    this.activeSeverity = sev;
    this.page = 0;
    this.loadData();
  }

  get filteredRows(): PenaltyReportRow[] {
    if (!this.searchTerm.trim()) return this.rows;
    const q = this.searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return this.rows.filter(r =>
      r.penaltyRefNo?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      r.taxpayerName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      r.tinNumber?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    );
  }

  get pageRange(): number[] {
    const start = this.page * this.size + 1;
    const end   = Math.min(start + this.size - 1, this.totalElements);
    return [start, end];
  }

  prevPage(): void { if (this.page > 0) { this.page--; this.loadData(); } }
  nextPage(): void { if (this.page < this.totalPages - 1) { this.page++; this.loadData(); } }
  goBack(): void { this.router.navigate(['/reports']); }

  exportCsv(): void {
    this.reportsService.exportReport('csv', {
      reportType: 'PENALTY_COLLECTION',
      fiscalYear: this.fiscalYear,
    }).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(blob => {
      this.reportsService.triggerBlobDownload(
        blob, `Penalty_${this.fiscalYear}.csv`);
    });
  }

  getStatusClass(status: string): string {
    switch (status?.toUpperCase()) {
      case 'PAID':     return 'status-active';
      case 'PENDING':  return 'status-pending';
      case 'WAIVED':   return 'status-draft';
      case 'DISPUTED': return 'status-rejected';
      default:         return 'status-pending';
    }
  }

  getSeverityClass(sev: string): string {
    switch (sev?.toUpperCase()) {
      case 'LOW':      return 'sev-low';
      case 'MEDIUM':   return 'sev-medium';
      case 'HIGH':     return 'sev-high';
      case 'CRITICAL': return 'sev-critical';
      default:         return 'sev-low';
    }
  }

  formatAmount(v: number | null | undefined): string {
    if (!v) return '৳0.00';
    return '৳' + v.toLocaleString('en-BD', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 });
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/refund-report/refund-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Refund Status Report</h4>
    <p>Pending and completed refund claims analysis — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Claims</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by ref no, taxpayer, TIN..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading refund data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Reference No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th class="text-end">Claimed</th>
          <th class="text-end">Approved</th>
          <th class="text-end">Paid</th>
          <th>Risk Level</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Submitted</th>
          <th>Processed</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.refundRefNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.refundType }}</span></td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.claimedAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-positive">{{ formatAmount(r.approvedAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">{{ formatAmount(r.paidAmount) }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="sev-badge"
              [ngClass]="r.riskLevel === 'HIGH' ? 'sev-high' :
                         r.riskLevel === 'MEDIUM' ? 'sev-medium' : 'sev-low'">
              {{ r.riskLevel || 'LOW' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.processedAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i>
              <p>No refund records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.refundRefNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Claimed</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.claimedAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Approved</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-positive">{{ formatAmount(r.approvedAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Submitted</label><span>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/refund-report/refund-report.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { ReportsService } from '../../service/reports.service';
import { RefundReportRow } from '../../model/report.model';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-refund-report',
  templateUrl: './refund-report.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./refund-report.component.css'],
})
export class RefundReportComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  rows: RefundReportRow[] = [];
  isLoading = false;
  totalElements = 0;
  totalPages = 0;

  fiscalYear = '';
  activeStatus = '';
  searchTerm = '';
  page = 0;
  size = 20;

  statusFilters = [
    { label: 'All',          value: '' },
    { label: 'Submitted',    value: 'SUBMITTED' },
    { label: 'Under Review', value: 'UNDER_REVIEW' },
    { label: 'Approved',     value: 'APPROVED' },
    { label: 'Paid',         value: 'PAID' },
    { label: 'Rejected',     value: 'REJECTED' },
  ];

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private reportsService: ReportsService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.route.queryParams.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(params => {
      this.fiscalYear = params['fiscalYear'] || '';
      this.loadData();
    });
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  loadData(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.reportsService
      .getRefundReport(this.fiscalYear, this.activeStatus, this.page, this.size)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)))
      .subscribe({
        next: (res) => {
          this.rows          = res.content;
          this.totalElements = res.totalElements;
          this.totalPages    = res.totalPages;
        },
        error: () => { this.rows = []; },
      });
  }

  filterByStatus(status: string): void {
    this.activeStatus = status;
    this.page = 0;
    this.loadData();
  }

  get filteredRows(): RefundReportRow[] {
    if (!this.searchTerm.trim()) return this.rows;
    const q = this.searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return this.rows.filter(r =>
      r.refundRefNo?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      r.taxpayerName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      r.tinNumber?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    );
  }

  get pageRange(): number[] {
    const start = this.page * this.size + 1;
    const end   = Math.min(start + this.size - 1, this.totalElements);
    return [start, end];
  }

  prevPage(): void { if (this.page > 0) { this.page--; this.loadData(); } }
  nextPage(): void { if (this.page < this.totalPages - 1) { this.page++; this.loadData(); } }
  goBack(): void { this.router.navigate(['/reports']); }

  exportCsv(): void {
    this.reportsService.exportReport('csv', {
      reportType: 'REFUND_STATUS',
      fiscalYear: this.fiscalYear,
    }).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(blob => {
      this.reportsService.triggerBlobDownload(
        blob, `Refund_${this.fiscalYear}.csv`);
    });
  }

  getStatusClass(status: string): string {
    switch (status?.toUpperCase()) {
      case 'PAID':         return 'status-active';
      case 'APPROVED':     return 'status-approved';
      case 'SUBMITTED':    return 'status-pending';
      case 'UNDER_REVIEW': return 'status-review';
      case 'REJECTED':     return 'status-rejected';
      default:             return 'status-pending';
    }
  }

  formatAmount(v: number | null | undefined): string {
    if (!v) return '৳0.00';
    return '৳' + v.toLocaleString('en-BD', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 });
  }
}
```

```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>VAT Collection Report</h4>
    <p>Monthly VAT collection summary — FY {{ fiscalYear }}
      <span *ngIf="zone"> · Zone: {{ zone }}</span>
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Records</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search & Status Filter -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by BIN, business name, status..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value" (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">
      {{ f.label }}
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading VAT collection data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>BIN No</th>
          <th>Business Name</th>
          <th>Zone</th>
          <th>Circle</th>
          <th>Period</th>
          <th class="text-end">Gross Supplies</th>
          <th class="text-end">Output Tax</th>
          <th class="text-end">Input Tax</th>
          <th class="text-end">Net VAT</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Submitted</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.binNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.businessName.charAt(0) || 'B' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.zone || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.circle || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.period }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.grossSales) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.outputVat) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-positive">{{ formatAmount(r.inputVatCredit) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.netVat) }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              <p>No VAT collection records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.businessName.charAt(0) || 'B' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.businessName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.binNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Period</label><span>{{ r.period }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Zone</label><span>{{ r.zone || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Net VAT</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.netVat) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Submitted</label><span>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
      <p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/vat-collection-report/vat-collection-report.component.spec.ts
```typescript
import { ComponentFixture, TestBed } from '@angular/core/testing';

import { VatCollectionReportComponent } from './vat-collection-report.component';

describe('VatCollectionReportComponent', () => {
  let component: VatCollectionReportComponent;
  let fixture: ComponentFixture<VatCollectionReportComponent>;
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/vat-collection-report/vat-collection-report.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { ReportsService } from '../../service/reports.service';
import { VatCollectionRow } from '../../model/report.model';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-vat-collection-report',
  templateUrl: './vat-collection-report.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./vat-collection-report.component.css'],
})
export class VatCollectionReportComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  // ─── Data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  rows: VatCollectionRow[] = [];
  isLoading = false;
  totalElements = 0;
  totalPages = 0;

  // ─── Filters ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  fiscalYear = '';
  zone = '';
  circle = '';
  activeStatus = '';
  searchTerm = '';
  page = 0;
  size = 20;

  statusFilters = [
    { label: 'All', value: '' },
    { label: 'Submitted', value: 'Submitted' },
    { label: 'Draft', value: 'Draft' },
  ];

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private reportsService: ReportsService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.route.queryParams.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(params => {
      this.fiscalYear = params['fiscalYear'] || '';
      this.zone       = params['zone']       || '';
      this.circle     = params['circle']     || '';
      this.loadData();
    });
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  loadData(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.reportsService
      .getVatCollectionReport(
        this.fiscalYear, this.zone, this.circle,
        this.activeStatus, this.page, this.size)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)))
      .subscribe({
        next: (res) => {
          this.rows          = res.content;
          this.totalElements = res.totalElements;
          this.totalPages    = res.totalPages;
        },
        error: () => { this.rows = []; },
      });
  }

  filterByStatus(status: string): void {
    this.activeStatus = status;
    this.page = 0;
    this.loadData();
  }

  get filteredRows(): VatCollectionRow[] {
    if (!this.searchTerm.trim()) return this.rows;
    const q = this.searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return this.rows.filter(r =>
      r.binNo?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      r.businessName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      r.status?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    );
  }

  get pageRange(): number[] {
    const start = this.page * this.size + 1;
    const end   = Math.min(start + this.size - 1, this.totalElements);
    return [start, end];
  }

  prevPage(): void { if (this.page > 0) { this.page--; this.loadData(); } }
  nextPage(): void { if (this.page < this.totalPages - 1) { this.page++; this.loadData(); } }

  goBack(): void { this.router.navigate(['/reports']); }

  exportCsv(): void {
    this.reportsService.exportReport('csv', {
      reportType: 'VAT_COLLECTION',
      fiscalYear: this.fiscalYear,
      zone: this.zone || undefined,
      circle: this.circle || undefined,
    }).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(blob => {
      this.reportsService.triggerBlobDownload(
        blob, `VAT_Collection_${this.fiscalYear}.csv`);
    });
  }

  getStatusClass(status: string): string {
    switch (status?.toLowerCase()) {
      case 'submitted': return 'status-active';
      case 'draft':     return 'status-draft';
      default:          return 'status-pending';
    }
  }

  formatAmount(v: number | null | undefined): string {
    if (!v) return '৳0.00';
    return '৳' + v.toLocaleString('en-BD', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 });
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/roles/pages/roles-create/roles-create.component.css
```css
.section-icon.purple {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a855f7);
}
/* Color Picker */
.color-wrap {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}
.color-picker {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border: 2px solid #e0e8f0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 2px;
  cursor: pointer;
  background: transparent;
}
.color-preview {
  padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

/* Permission Quick Actions */
.perm-quick-actions {
  margin-left: auto;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
}
.pqa-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  border: none;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.pqa-btn:hover {
  background: #d0daf5;
}
.pqa-btn.clear {
  background: #fff0f0;
  color: #e74c3c;
}
.pqa-btn.clear:hover {
  background: #ffcccc;
}

/* Permission Table */
.perm-table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin-top: 4px;
}
.perm-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 13px;
  min-width: 600px;
}
.perm-table thead tr {
  background: #f8fafc;
}
.perm-table th {
  padding: 12px 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #888;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #eef2f8;
}
.perm-table th.module-col {
  text-align: left;
  width: 35%;
}
.perm-col {
  width: 10%;
}
.perm-col i {
  font-size: 12px;
  margin-right: 3px;
}
.perm-table td {
  padding: 10px 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f5f7fb;
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.perm-table tbody tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: none;
}
.perm-table tbody tr:hover {
  background: #f8faff;
}
.perm-table tbody tr.odd-row {
  background: #fafbfc;
}
.perm-table tbody tr.odd-row:hover {
  background: #f0f4ff;
}
.module-name {
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a2340;
}

/* Custom Checkbox */
.check-wrap {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  position: relative;
}
.check-wrap input {
  position: absolute;
  opacity: 0;
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
}
.checkmark {
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  border: 2px solid #e0e8f0;
  background: #fff;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark {
  border-color: transparent;
}
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark::after {
  content: "✓";
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.check-wrap:hover .checkmark {
  border-color: #1a3f8f;
}
/* Permission type colors — semantic (action identity) */
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark.create {
  background: #1faa8b;
}
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark.read {
  background: #1a3f8f;
}
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark.update {
  background: #f59e0b;
}
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark.delete {
  background: #e74c3c;
}
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark.export {
  background: #0891b2;
}
.check-wrap input:checked ~ .checkmark.all {
  background: #1a3f8f;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .section-header {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .perm-quick-actions {
    margin-left: 0;
  }
}
```

```css
}
.role-card {

  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 160px;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: 2px solid #f0f4f8;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}
.role-card:hover {

}
.role-card.selected {

.perm-table-wrap {

}
.perm-table {

}
.perm-table thead tr {

}
.perm-table th {
  padding: 12px 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #888;
  text-transform: uppercase;

}
.perm-table th.module-col {
  text-align: left;
  width: 35%;
}
.perm-col {

}
.perm-col i {
  font-size: 13px;
  margin-right: 4px;
}
.perm-table td {

  border-bottom: 1px solid #f5f7fb;
  text-align: center;

}
.perm-table tbody tr:last-child td {

}

  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/roles/pages/roles-list/roles-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Roles & Permissions</h4>
    <p>View access levels and permissions for each system role.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
  <span>Loading roles...</span>
</div>

<!-- Role Selector Cards -->
<div class="role-selector" *ngIf="!isLoading">
  <div class="role-card"
    *ngFor="let r of roles"
    [class.selected]="selectedRole === r.code"
    (click)="selectRole(r.code)">
    <div class="rc-avatar"
      [ngClass]="getRoleColorClass(r.color)"
      [style]="getRoleColorStyle(r.color)">
      <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="rc-info">
      <div class="rc-label">{{ r.name }}</div>
      <div class="rc-count">{{ r.status }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="rc-perms">{{ countPermissions(r) }}<span>perms</span></div>
  </div>

  <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="roles.length === 0">
    <i class="bi bi-shield-x"></i>
    <p>No roles found. Create your first role.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Permission Matrix -->
<div class="perm-section" *ngIf="!isLoading && selectedRoleConfig">

  <div class="perm-header">
    <div class="ph-left">
      <div class="ph-avatar"
        [ngClass]="getRoleColorClass(selectedRoleConfig.color)"
        [style]="getRoleColorStyle(selectedRoleConfig.color)">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="ph-title">{{ selectedRoleConfig.name }}</div>
        <div class="ph-desc">{{ selectedRoleConfig.description }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ph-stats">
      <span class="ph-stat">{{ countPermissions(selectedRoleConfig) }} permissions</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="perm-table-wrap">
    <table class="perm-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th class="module-col">Module</th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill"></i><span>Create</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i><span>Read</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i><span>Update</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i><span>Delete</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of selectedRoleConfig.permissions; let odd = odd"
          [class.odd-row]="odd">
          <td class="module-name">{{ p.module }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.create" [class.no]="!p.create">
              <i [class]="p.create ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.read" [class.no]="!p.read">
              <i [class]="p.read ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.update" [class.no]="!p.update">
              <i [class]="p.update ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.delete" [class.no]="!p.delete">
              <i [class]="p.delete ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.export" [class.no]="!p.export">
              <i [class]="p.export ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
            </span>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="selectedRoleConfig.permissions.length === 0">
          <td colspan="6">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-shield"></i>
              <p>No permissions configured for this role.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

</div>
```
