## File: src/app/features/tin-management/tin/tin-routing.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { RouterModule, Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { Role } from 'src/app/core/constants/roles.constants';
import { AuthGuard } from 'src/app/core/guards/auth.guard';

import { TinListComponent } from '../pages/tin-list/tin-list.component';
import { TinCreateComponent } from '../pages/tin-create/tin-create.component';
import { TinViewComponent } from '../pages/tin-view/tin-view.component';
import { TinEditComponent } from '../pages/tin-edit/tin-edit.component';

const routes: Routes = [
 {
       path: '',
       component: TinListComponent,
       canActivate: [AuthGuard],
       data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] }
     },
     {
       path: 'create',
       component: TinCreateComponent,
       canActivate: [AuthGuard],
       data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.TAXPAYER] }
     },
     {
       path: 'view/:id',
       component: TinViewComponent,
       canActivate: [AuthGuard],
       data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] }
     },
     {
       path: 'edit/:id',
       component: TinEditComponent,
       canActivate: [AuthGuard],
       data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER] }
     }
];

@NgModule({
  imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
  exports: [RouterModule]
})
export class TinRoutingModule { }
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-create/user-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add New User</h4>
    <p>Create a new system user with role and access.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List</button>
</div>

<div class="form-card" [formGroup]="form">

  <!-- Personal Information -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Personal Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Basic user details</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Full Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['fullName'].invalid && f['fullName'].touched"
            placeholder="Enter full name"
            formControlName="fullName" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['fullName'].invalid && f['fullName'].touched">
          Full name is required (min 3 characters).
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Username</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-at input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['username'].invalid && f['username'].touched"
            placeholder="e.g. tax_off_01"
            formControlName="username" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['username'].invalid && f['username'].touched">
          Username is required (min 3 characters).
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Email Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['email'].invalid && f['email'].touched"
            placeholder="user@nbr.gov.bd"
            formControlName="email" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['email'].invalid && f['email'].touched">
          A valid email address is required.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Role & Access -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Role & Access</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">User role, department and status</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Role</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [class.error-input]="f['role'].invalid && f['role'].touched"
            formControlName="role">
            <option value="">Select Role</option>
            <option *ngFor="let r of roles" [value]="r">{{ r }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['role'].invalid && f['role'].touched">
          Please select a role.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Department</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="department">
            <option value="">Select Department</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of departments" [value]="d">{{ d }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Password -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-key-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Password</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Set initial password</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock input-icon"></i>
          <input type="password" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['password'].invalid && f['password'].touched"
            placeholder="Min 8 characters"
            formControlName="password" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['password'].invalid && f['password'].touched">
          Password is required (min 8 characters).
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Confirm Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="password" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['confirmPassword'].touched && (f['confirmPassword'].invalid || passwordMismatch)"
            placeholder="Re-enter password"
            formControlName="confirmPassword" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="passwordMismatch">
          Passwords do not match.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-person-plus-fill"></i> Create User</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-edit/user-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit User</h4>
    <p>Update user profile and access settings.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading" [formGroup]="form">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ f['fullName'].value }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-sub">@{{ f['username'].value }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Personal Information -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Personal Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Name and contact details</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Full Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['fullName'].invalid && f['fullName'].touched"
            formControlName="fullName" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['fullName'].invalid && f['fullName'].touched">
          Full name is required (min 3 characters).
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Username</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-at input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['username'].invalid && f['username'].touched"
            formControlName="username" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['username'].invalid && f['username'].touched">
          Username is required (min 3 characters).
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input"
            [class.error-input]="f['email'].invalid && f['email'].touched"
            formControlName="email" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['email'].invalid && f['email'].touched">
          A valid email address is required.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Role & Access -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Role & Access</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Update role, department and status</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Role</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [class.error-input]="f['role'].invalid && f['role'].touched"
            formControlName="role">
            <option value="">Select Role</option>
            <option *ngFor="let r of roles" [value]="r">{{ r }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['role'].invalid && f['role'].touched">
          Please select a role.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Department</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="department">
            <option value="">Select Department</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of departments" [value]="d">{{ d }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update User</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

```css
/* Role Avatar Colors — kept semantic (role identity) */
.td-avatar.user-avatar {
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  border-radius: 9px;
}
.mobile-avatar.user-avatar {
  font-size: 16px;
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border-radius: 10px;
}
.role-super {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0066, #4a0099);
}
.role-commissioner {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #2a5fd6);
}
.role-officer {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1faa8b, #17c69a);
}
.role-auditor {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #f97316);
}
.role-data {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0891b2, #06b6d4);
}
.role-taxpayer {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6b7280, #9ca3af);
}

.username-badge {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  background: #e8eef9;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  font-family: monospace;
}

/* Role Badges */
.role-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 3px 9px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: #fff;
}
.role-badge.role-super {
  background: #4a0099;
}
.role-badge.role-commissioner {
  background: #1a3f8f;
}
.role-badge.role-officer {
  background: #1faa8b;
}
.role-badge.role-auditor {
  background: #f59e0b;
}
.role-badge.role-data {
  background: #0891b2;
}
.role-badge.role-taxpayer {
  background: #6b7280;
}

.last-login {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #666;
}
.data-table {
  min-width: 1000px;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-list/user-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>User Management</h4>
    <p>Manage all system users and their access levels.</p>
  </div>
  <a *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN']" routerLink="/users/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add User
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by name, username, email, role..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading users...</span>
  </div>

  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>User</th>
          <th>Username</th>
          <th>Role</th>
          <th>Department</th>
          <th>Last Login</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let u of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar user-avatar" [ngClass]="getRoleClass(u.role)">
                {{ u.fullName.charAt(0) }}
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ u.fullName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ u.email }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="username-badge">@{{ u.username }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="role-badge" [ngClass]="getRoleClass(u.role)">{{ getRoleLabel(u.role) }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ u.department }}</td>
          <td><span class="last-login">{{ u.lastLogin }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(u.status)">{{ u.status }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(u.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN']" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(u.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(u.id)"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="8">
            <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><p>No users found.</p></div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let u of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar user-avatar" [ngClass]="getRoleClass(u.role)">{{ u.fullName.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ u.fullName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">@{{ u.username }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(u.status)">{{ u.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Email</label><span>{{ u.email }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Role</label>
          <span class="role-badge" [ngClass]="getRoleClass(u.role)">{{ getRoleLabel(u.role) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Department</label><span>{{ u.department }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Last Login</label><span>{{ u.lastLogin }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(u.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN']" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(u.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(u.id)"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-people"></i><p>No users found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN']" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/users/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete User?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this user?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```css
.user-header-card {
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 24px 28px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  color: #fff;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 16px;
}
.role-super-bg {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0066, #4a0099);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(74, 0, 153, 0.3);
}
.role-commissioner-bg {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #2a5fd6);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(26, 63, 143, 0.3);
}
.role-officer-bg {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1faa8b, #17c69a);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(31, 170, 139, 0.3);
}
.role-auditor-bg {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #f97316);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3);
}
.role-data-bg {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0891b2, #06b6d4);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(8, 145, 178, 0.3);
}
.role-taxpayer-bg {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6b7280, #9ca3af);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.3);
}

.uhc-avatar {
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  border-radius: 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 800;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.uhc-name {
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.uhc-username {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-family: monospace;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.role-pill {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
}
.dept-pill {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/user-management/user-management.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
import { SharedModule } from '../../../shared/shared.module';
import { UserManagementRoutingModule } from './user-management-routing.module';
import { UserListComponent } from '../pages/user-list/user-list.component';
import { UserCreateComponent } from '../pages/user-create/user-create.component';
import { UserViewComponent } from '../pages/user-view/user-view.component';
import { UserEditComponent } from '../pages/user-edit/user-edit.component';

@NgModule({
  declarations: [
    UserListComponent,
    UserCreateComponent,
    UserViewComponent,
    UserEditComponent,
  ],
  imports: [
    CommonModule,
    ReactiveFormsModule,
    FormsModule,
    SharedModule,
    UserManagementRoutingModule,
  ],
})
export class UserManagementModule {}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/components/business-picker/business-picker.component.html
```html
<!-- ── Loading ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="loading-row" *ngIf="loading" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 0;">
  <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
  <span style="font-size:13px;color:#888;">Loading businesses…</span>
</div>

<!-- ── No businesses ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="!loading && businesses.length === 0">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
  This taxpayer has no registered businesses.
  <a routerLink="/businesses/create" class="ms-1 fw-bold">Register a business first →</a>
</div>

<!-- ── Business list ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="business-picker" *ngIf="!loading && businesses.length > 0">
  <div
    class="biz-row"
    *ngFor="let b of businesses"
    [class.biz-selected]="selected?.id === b.id"
    [class.biz-registered]="b.vatRegistered"
    (click)="onSelect(b)"
    [title]="b.vatRegistered ? 'Already VAT registered — BIN: ' + b.binNo : 'Click to select'"
  >
    <!-- Icon -->
    <div class="biz-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-building-check" *ngIf="b.vatRegistered"></i>
      <i class="bi bi-building" *ngIf="!b.vatRegistered"></i>
    </div>

    <!-- Info -->
    <div class="biz-info">
      <span class="biz-name">{{ b.businessName }}</span>
      <span class="biz-meta">
        <span class="code-sm me-2">{{ b.businessRegNo }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="b.tradeLicenseNo">TL: {{ b.tradeLicenseNo }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="b.businessTypeName"> · {{ b.businessTypeName }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="b.districtName"> · {{ b.districtName }}</span>
      </span>
    </div>

    <!-- VAT status badge -->
    <div class="biz-vat-status">
      <!-- Already registered -->
      <ng-container *ngIf="b.vatRegistered">
        <span class="bin-badge">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ b.binNo }}
        </span>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(b.vatStatus)">
          {{ b.vatStatus }}
        </span>
      </ng-container>

      <!-- Not yet registered -->
      <ng-container *ngIf="!b.vatRegistered">
        <span class="no-bin-badge" [class.active]="selected?.id === b.id">
          <i class="bi bi-plus-circle" *ngIf="selected?.id !== b.id"></i>
          <i class="bi bi-check2-circle" *ngIf="selected?.id === b.id"></i>
          {{ selected?.id === b.id ? 'Selected' : 'Register VAT' }}
        </span>
      </ng-container>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-success/vat-registration-success.component.css
```css
/* vat-registration-success.component.css
   All global utilities (.detail-card, .status-badge, .cat-badge,
   .zone-pill, .circle-pill, .code-badge, .page-header, .btn-back)
   come from styles.css. This file contains only success-page anatomy.

   Sections:
   1. Hero Card (+ entrance animation)
   2. BIN Display
   3. Meta Strip
   4. Status Timeline
   5. Details Grid
   6. CTA Actions
   7. Responsive
*/


/* ── 1. Hero Card ────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.success-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(
    135deg,
    var(--color-teal-dark) 0%,
    var(--color-teal) 100%
  );
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 24px 28px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  /* Start hidden for animation */
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(12px);
  transition: opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease;
}

.success-hero.animate-in {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* Top row: check circle + headline + status badge */
.success-hero-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.success-check-circle {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #fff;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.success-headline {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  margin: 0 0 3px;
}

.success-subline {
  font-size: 12.5px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
  margin: 0;
}

/* Override status-pending badge colours on teal background */
.success-hero .status-badge.status-pending {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
  color: #fff;
  border: 0.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30);
}


/* ── 2. BIN Display ──────────────────────────────────────────── */

.success-bin-wrap {
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.success-bin-label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.success-bin-label i {
  font-size: 13px;
}

.success-bin-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

/* The BIN number itself — large monospace display */
.success-bin {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
  line-height: 1;
  /* Subtle text shadow for legibility on gradient */
  text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
}

/* Copy button */
.btn-copy-bin {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  color: #fff;
  border: 0.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.btn-copy-bin:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
}

.btn-copy-bin.copied {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50);
}


/* ── 3. Meta Strip ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

.success-meta-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  padding-top: 18px;
  border-top: 0.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20);
  row-gap: 12px;
}

.success-meta-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 3px;
  padding: 0 20px;
}

.success-meta-item:first-child {
  padding-left: 0;
}

.success-meta-label {
  font-size: 10.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.60);
}

.success-meta-value {
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #fff;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  max-width: 200px;
}

.success-meta-divider {
  width: 0.5px;
  height: 32px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}


/* ── 4. Status Timeline ──────────────────────────────────────── */

.status-timeline-card {
  background: var(--color-bg-primary);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 18px 24px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.timeline-title {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--color-text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.timeline-title i {
  color: var(--color-accent);
  font-size: 15px;
}

.status-timeline {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

/* Individual step */
.timeline-step {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* Dot / circle */
.ts-dot {
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: var(--transition);
}

.timeline-step.done .ts-dot {
  background: var(--color-teal);
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--color-teal-light);
}

.timeline-step.pending .ts-dot {
  background: var(--color-bg-secondary);
  color: var(--color-text-tertiary);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-primary);
}

/* Label */
.ts-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: var(--color-text-tertiary);
}

.timeline-step.done .ts-label {
  color: var(--color-teal-dark);
}

/* Connector line between steps */
.timeline-connector {
  flex: 1;
  height: 1.5px;
  background: var(--color-border-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 20px; /* aligns with label offset */
}

.timeline-connector.done {
  background: var(--color-teal);
}


/* ── 5. Details Grid ─────────────────────────────────────────── */

/* Matches the view page .details-grid but scoped to success context */
.success-details-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}


/* ── 6. CTA Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────── */

.success-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 4px 0 8px;
}

/* Secondary: register another */
.btn-register-another {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  padding: 9px 20px;
  background: var(--color-bg-primary);
  color: var(--color-text-secondary);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-primary);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.btn-register-another:hover {
  background: var(--color-bg-secondary);
  color: var(--color-text-primary);
  border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Primary: view registration */
.btn-view-registration {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 9px 22px;
  background: var(--color-accent);
  color: #fff;
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-accent);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.btn-view-registration:hover {
  background: var(--color-accent-dark);
  border-color: var(--color-accent-dark);
}


/* ── 7. Responsive ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .success-hero {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .success-bin {
    font-size: 20px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }

  .success-meta-row {
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .success-meta-divider {
    display: none;
  }

  .success-meta-item {
    padding: 0;
    min-width: calc(50% - 6px);
  }

  .success-meta-value {
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  .status-timeline-card {
    padding: 14px 16px;
  }

  .ts-label {
    font-size: 10px;
  }

  .ts-dot {
    width: 30px;
    height: 30px;
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  .success-details-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .success-actions {
    flex-direction: column-reverse;
  }

  .btn-register-another,
  .btn-view-registration {
    width: 100%;
    justify-content: center;
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/components/vat-registration-picker/vat-registration-picker.component.css
```css
/* Scoped styles for VatRegistrationPickerComponent.
   Global form-card chrome (section-header, section-icon, input-wrap, etc.)
   is inherited from the shared stylesheet — only picker-specific rules live here. */

.picker-section {
  padding: 0; /* inherits parent form-section padding */
}

/* ── Search row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.search-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 14px;
}

.search-input-wrap {
  flex: 1;
}

.btn-search {
  white-space: nowrap;
  padding: 0 20px;
  height: 42px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: none;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #2e5fcc);
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 13px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: opacity 0.15s;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.btn-search:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; }
.btn-search:not(:disabled):hover { opacity: 0.88; }

/* ── Results list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.search-results {
  margin-top: 10px;
  border: 1.5px solid #d0daf5;
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.result-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 11px 16px;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #edf0fa;
  transition: background 0.12s;
}
.result-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.result-item:hover { background: #f0f4ff; }

.result-avatar {
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #2e5fcc);
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.result-info {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}

.result-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a2340;
}

.result-meta {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #666;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 2px;
}

.result-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── No result note ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.no-result-note {
  margin-top: 10px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  background: #fef9e7;
  border: 1px solid #f5d872;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #7a5c00;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

/* ── Selected card ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.selected-card {
  margin-top: 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid #b6d0ff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4ff 0%, #e8eef9 100%);
}

.selected-card-left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
}

.selected-card-right {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.selected-avatar {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #2e5fcc);
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 20px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.selected-name {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2340;
  margin: 0;
}

.selected-meta {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #555;
  margin: 2px 0 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
}

.autofill-tag {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #d4edda;
  color: #155724;
}

.btn-change {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 5px 14px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1.5px solid #1a3f8f;
  background: #fff;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s;
}
.btn-change:hover {
  background: #1a3f8f;
  color: #fff;
}

/* ── Pills (shared with parent page) ───────────────────────────────────── */
.cat-pill {
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 10px;
}
.zone-pill {
  background: #e6f7f3;
  color: #1faa8b;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 10px;
}
.text-blue { color: #1a3f8f; }
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/components/vat-registration-picker/vat-registration-picker.component.html
```html
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     STATE A: Nothing selected yet  →  show search bar + results / no-result note
     STATE B: A registration is selected  →  show only the selected card + Change btn
     ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

<div class="picker-section">

  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-icon search-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h6 class="section-title">Find VAT Registration</h6>
      <span class="section-sub">
        Search by BIN number, TIN or business name — only Active registrations shown
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── STATE A: Search UI ── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="!isSelected">

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          class="form-input"
          placeholder="Enter BIN number, TIN or business name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          [ngModelOptions]="{ standalone: true }"
          (ngModelChange)="onSearchInput()"
          (keyup.enter)="search()" />
      </div>

      <button type="button" class="btn-search"
        (click)="search()"
        [disabled]="isSearching">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Results list -->
    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let r of searchResults" (click)="select(r)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">
            <span class="fw-bold text-blue me-2">BIN: {{ r.binNo }}</span>
            <span class="me-2">TIN: {{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span class="cat-pill">{{ r.vatCategory }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- No-result note -->
    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
      No active VAT registration found. Check BIN, TIN or name and try again.
    </div>

  </ng-container>

  <!-- ── STATE B: Selected card ── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="isSelected && selectedReg">

    <div class="selected-card">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ selectedReg.businessName }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">
            BIN: {{ selectedReg.binNo }}
            <span class="ms-2">TIN: {{ selectedReg.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span class="ms-2 cat-pill">{{ selectedReg.vatCategory }}</span>
            <span class="ms-2 zone-pill">{{ selectedReg.vatZone }}</span>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="selected-card-right">
        <div class="autofill-tag">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Selected
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="btn-change" (click)="clear()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Change
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </ng-container>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/pages/vat-return-list/vat-return-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>VAT Returns</h4>
    <p>Manage and process all VAT return submissions.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/vat-returns/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> File Return
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Status Filter Tabs -->
  <div class="status-tabs">
    <button class="stab"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === ''"
      (click)="filterStatus = ''">
      All <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab submitted"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Submitted'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Submitted'">
      Submitted <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Submitted') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab review"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Under Review'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Under Review'">
      Under Review <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Under Review') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab accepted"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Accepted'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Accepted'">
      Accepted <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Accepted') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab rejected"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Rejected'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Rejected'">
      Rejected <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Rejected') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab draft"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Draft'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Draft'">
      Draft <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Draft') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab overdue"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Overdue'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Overdue'">
      Overdue <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Overdue') }}</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by return no, BIN, business, TIN..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading VAT returns...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Return No</th>
          <th>Business</th>
          <th>Period</th>
          <th>Total Supplies</th>
          <th>Output Tax</th>
          <th>Input Tax</th>
          <th>Net Payable</th>
          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="return-code">{{ r.returnNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar vr-avatar"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i></div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.binNo }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="period-cell">
              <span class="period-badge">{{ r.returnPeriod }}</span>
              <span class="period-text">{{ r.periodMonth }} {{ r.periodYear }}</span>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(r.totalSupplies) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell output">{{ formatCurrency(r.outputTax) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell input">{{ formatCurrency(r.inputTax) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell net">{{ formatCurrency(r.netTaxPayable) }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.dueDate }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'"
                class="btn-edit"
                [disabled]="r.status === 'Accepted' || r.status === 'Under Review'"
                (click)="edit(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i>
              <p>No VAT returns found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar vr-avatar"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.businessName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.returnNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>BIN</label><span>{{ r.binNo }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Period</label><span>{{ r.periodMonth }} {{ r.periodYear }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Net Payable</label><span class="net">{{ formatCurrency(r.netTaxPayable) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Due Date</label><span>{{ r.dueDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit"
          [disabled]="r.status === 'Accepted' || r.status === 'Under Review'"
          (click)="edit(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i><p>No VAT returns found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/vat-returns/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete VAT Return?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this VAT return record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/layout/topbar/topbar.component.css
```css
.topbar {
  height: 64px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a9e7e 0%, #1faa8b 50%, #22bd9c 100%);
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 16px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 900;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  gap: 12px;
}

/* Left */
.topbar-left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  min-width: 0;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.hamburger-btn {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 22px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s ease;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.hamburger-btn:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
}

.topbar-title {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-width: 0;
}

.title-main {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  max-width: 320px;
}

.title-date {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
  margin-top: 1px;
}

/* Search */
.search-box {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.desktop-search {
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 320px;
}

.search-icon {
  position: absolute;
  left: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
}

.search-input {
  width: 100%;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
  border-radius: 20px;
  color: #fff;
  padding: 7px 14px 7px 32px;
  font-size: 13px;
  outline: none;
  transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
}

.search-input::placeholder {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
}

.search-input:focus {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22);
  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
}

/* Right */
.topbar-right {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.topbar-right.hidden {
  display: none;
}

.mobile-search-toggle {
  display: none;
}

/* Buttons */
.topbar-action {
  position: relative;
}

.icon-btn {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s ease;
  position: relative;
}

.icon-btn:hover,
.icon-btn.active {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
}

.badge-dot {
  position: absolute;
  top: 5px;
  right: 5px;
  background: #e74c3c;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 9px;
  font-weight: 700;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1.5px solid #1faa8b;
}

.topbar-divider {
  width: 1px;
  height: 28px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
  margin: 0 2px;
}

/* User */
.user-btn {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 5px 10px 5px 5px;
  border-radius: 30px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s ease;
}

.user-btn:hover,
.user-btn.active {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
}

.user-avatar {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f2d6b, #1a3f8f);
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 14px;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.user-avatar.lg {
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  font-size: 18px;
}

.user-info {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.user-name {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1;
}

.user-role {
  font-size: 10px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  margin-top: 2px;
}

.user-chevron {
  font-size: 11px;
  opacity: 0.8;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.user-chevron.rotated {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

/* Mobile search */
.mobile-search-bar {
  display: none;
}

.close-search-btn {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 16px;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.mobile-search-input {
  flex: 1;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
  border-radius: 20px;
  color: #fff;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  font-size: 14px;
  outline: none;
}

.mobile-search-input::placeholder {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);
}

/* Dropdown */
.dropdown-panel {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 10px);
  right: 0;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
  z-index: 9999;
  overflow: hidden;
  animation: dropIn 0.2s ease;
  color: #333;
  min-width: 280px;
}

@keyframes dropIn {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(-8px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

.dropdown-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.user-header {
  gap: 12px;
  justify-content: flex-start;
}

.badge-count {
  background: #e74c3c;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 20px;
}

.notif-panel {
  width: 320px;
}

.notif-list {
  max-height: 280px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.notif-empty {
  padding: 20px 16px;
  text-align: center;
  color: #6c757d;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.notif-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f5f5f5;
  transition: background 0.15s ease;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.notif-item:hover {
  background: #f8f9fa;
}

.notif-item.unread {
  background: #f0f8ff;
}

.notif-item.unread:hover {
  background: #e8f4fd;
}

.notif-icon-wrap {
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #1f4b99);
  border-radius: 8px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 14px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.notif-body {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.notif-text {
  font-size: 13px;
  margin: 0;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #333;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.notif-time {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #999;
  margin-top: 2px;
  display: block;
}

.dropdown-menu-list {
  padding: 8px 0;
}

.dropdown-menu-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  color: #444;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.dropdown-menu-item:hover {
  background: #f0f4ff;
  color: #1a3f8f;
}

.dropdown-menu-item.logout {
  color: #e74c3c;
}

.dropdown-menu-item.logout:hover {
  background: #fff0f0;
  color: #c0392b;
}

.dropdown-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: #f0f0f0;
  margin: 6px 0;
}

.dropdown-footer {
  padding: 10px 16px;
  border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  text-align: center;
}

.dropdown-footer a {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.dropdown-footer a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .desktop-search {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .mobile-search-toggle {
    display: flex;
  }

  .user-info,
  .user-chevron,
  .topbar-divider,
  .title-date {
    display: none;
  }

  .title-main {
    font-size: 13px;
    max-width: 160px;
  }

  .notif-panel {
    width: 290px;
    right: -60px;
  }

  .mobile-search-bar {
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    top: 0;
    height: 64px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a9e7e, #1faa8b);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 12px;
    gap: 10px;
    z-index: 1000;
    animation: slideDown 0.2s ease;
  }

  .topbar-left.hidden-on-mobile-search {
    display: none;
  }
}

@media (min-width: 769px) {
  .mobile-search-bar {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .mobile-search-toggle {
    display: none !important;
  }
}

@keyframes slideDown {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(-10px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/layout/topbar/topbar.component.html
```html
<div class="topbar" [class.search-active]="isSearchOpen">

  <!-- Left -->
  <div class="topbar-left" [class.hidden-on-mobile-search]="isSearchOpen">
    <button class="hamburger-btn" (click)="menuToggle.emit()" title="Toggle Sidebar">
      <i class="bi bi-list"></i>
    </button>

    <div class="topbar-title">
      <span class="title-main">National VAT & Tax Management System</span>
      <span class="title-date">{{ currentDate }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Center: Desktop Search -->
  <div class="search-box desktop-search">
    <i class="bi bi-search search-icon"></i>
    <input
      type="text"
      placeholder="Search taxpayer, TIN, BIN..."
      class="search-input"
    />
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Search Expanded -->
  <div class="mobile-search-bar" *ngIf="isSearchOpen">
    <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    <input
      #mobileSearchInput
      type="text"
      placeholder="Search taxpayer, TIN, BIN..."
      class="mobile-search-input"
    />
    <button type="button" class="close-search-btn" (click)="closeSearch()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Right -->
  <div class="topbar-right" [class.hidden]="isSearchOpen">

    <!-- Mobile Search Toggle -->
    <button class="icon-btn mobile-search-toggle" (click)="openSearch()">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    </button>

    <!-- Notifications -->
    <div class="topbar-action" (click)="toggleNotifDropdown()">
      <button class="icon-btn" [class.active]="isNotifDropdownOpen">
        <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i>
        <span class="badge-dot" *ngIf="unreadCount > 0">{{ unreadCount }}</span>
      </button>

      <div class="dropdown-panel notif-panel" *ngIf="isNotifDropdownOpen">
        <div class="dropdown-header">
          <span>Notifications</span>
          <span class="badge-count" *ngIf="unreadCount > 0">{{ unreadCount }} New</span>
        </div>

        <div class="notif-list">
          <div class="notif-empty" *ngIf="isLoadingNotices">Loading notifications...</div>

          <div class="notif-empty" *ngIf="!isLoadingNotices && recentNotices.length === 0">
            No notifications
          </div>

          <div
            class="notif-item"
            *ngFor="let notif of recentNotices"
            [class.unread]="notif.status === 'Unread'"
            (click)="viewNotice(notif, $event)"
          >
            <div class="notif-icon-wrap">
              <i [class]="getNoticeIcon(notif.noticeType)"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="notif-body">
              <p class="notif-text">{{ notif.subject }}</p>
              <span class="notif-time">{{ getNoticeTime(notif.issuedDate) }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dropdown-footer">
          <a routerLink="/notices" (click)="viewAllNotices($event)">View all notifications</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="topbar-divider"></div>

    <!-- User -->
    <div class="topbar-action" (click)="toggleUserDropdown()">
      <button class="user-btn" [class.active]="isUserDropdownOpen">
        <div class="user-avatar">{{ userInitial }}</div>
        <div class="user-info">
          <span class="user-name">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</span>
          <span class="user-role">{{ currentUser?.role | titlecase }}</span>
        </div>
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-down user-chevron" [class.rotated]="isUserDropdownOpen"></i>
      </button>

      <div class="dropdown-panel user-panel" *ngIf="isUserDropdownOpen">
        <div class="dropdown-header user-header">
          <div class="user-avatar lg">{{ userInitial }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="fw-bold">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</div>
            <small class="text-muted">{{ currentUser?.email }}</small>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dropdown-menu-list">
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/profile">
            <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i> My Profile
          </a>
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/settings">
            <i class="bi bi-gear-fill"></i> Settings
          </a>
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/activity-logs">
            <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i> Activity Log
          </a>
          <div class="dropdown-divider"></div>
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item logout" (click)="logout()">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-right"></i> Sign Out
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

```typescript
export type ImportDutyStatus = 'Draft' | 'Pending' | 'Assessed' | 'Paid' | 'Cleared' | 'Disputed';

export interface ImportDutyTaxPreview {
  cifValue: number;
  customsDuty: number;
  supplementaryDuty: number;
  vat: number;
  advanceIncomeTax: number;
  advanceTax: number;
  totalPayable: number;
  cdRate?: number;
  sdRate?: number;
  vatRate?: number;
  aitRate?: number;
  atRate?: number;
}

export interface ImportDuty {
  id: number;
  dutyRef: string;
  tinNumber: string;
  taxpayerName: string;
  businessName: string;
  productId?: number;
  productName: string;
  hsCode: string;
  goodsDescription: string;
  originCountry: string;
  cifValue: number;
  cdRate?: number;
  sdRate?: number;
  vatRate?: number;
  aitRate?: number;
  atRate?: number;
  customsDuty: number;
  supplementaryDuty: number;
  vat: number;
  advanceIncomeTax: number;
  advanceTax: number;
  totalPayable: number;
  paidAmount: number;
  portOfEntry: string;
  boeNumber: string;
  boeDate: string;
  billOfLading: string;
  importDate: string;
  assessmentDate: string;
  status: ImportDutyStatus;
  remarks: string;
}

  taxpayerName: string;
  businessName: string;
  productId: number;
  goodsDescription: string;
  originCountry: string;
  cifValue: number;
  portOfEntry: string;
  boeNumber: string;
  boeDate: string;
  billOfLading: string;
  importDate: string;
  status: string;
  remarks: string;
}

export type ImportDutyUpdateRequest = ImportDutyCreateRequest;
```

```typescript
// ── Read (from backend response) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export interface IT10B {
  id:                       number;
  returnId:                 number;   
  nonAgriculturalProperty:  number;
  agriculturalProperty:     number;
  investments:              number;
  motorVehicles:            number;
  bankBalances:             number;
  personalLiabilities:      number;
  netWealth:                number;   
  deleted:                  boolean;
}

  nonAgriculturalProperty:  number;

}
```

## File: src/app/models/vat-return.model.ts
```typescript
export type VatReturnStatus =
  'Draft' | 'Submitted' | 'Under Review' |
  'Accepted' | 'Rejected' | 'Overdue' |
  'Amended' | 'Send Back';

export type VatReturnPeriod = 'Monthly' | 'Quarterly' | 'Annually';

export interface VatReturnAction {
  action:      string;
  performedBy: string;
  role:        string;
  timestamp:   string;
  remarks:     string;
  fromStatus:  string;
  toStatus:    string;
}

// ── Read (backend response) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
export interface VatReturn {
  id:                 number;
  returnNo:           string;
  binNo:              string;
  tinNumber:          string;
  businessName:       string;
  returnPeriod:       VatReturnPeriod;
  periodMonth:        string;
  periodYear:         string;
  taxableSupplies:    number;
  exemptSupplies:     number;
  zeroRatedSupplies:  number;
  totalSupplies:      number;   // auto-calculated by backend
  outputTax:          number;
  inputTax:           number;
  netTaxPayable:      number;   // auto-calculated by backend
  taxPaid:            number;
  submissionDate:     string;
  dueDate:            string;
  assessmentYear:     string;
  status:             VatReturnStatus;
  submittedBy:        string;
  remarks:            string;
  actionHistory?:     VatReturnAction[];
}

// ── Create/Update (Angular → Backend) ────────────────────────────────────────
export interface VatReturnCreateRequest {
  vatRegistrationId:  number;   // @Transient FK — backend resolves to VatRegistration
  returnPeriod:       string;
  periodMonth:        string;
  periodYear:         string;
  taxableSupplies:    number;
  exemptSupplies:     number;
  zeroRatedSupplies:  number;
  outputTax:          number;
  inputTax:           number;
  taxPaid:            number;
  submissionDate:     string;
  dueDate:            string;
  assessmentYear:     string;
  submittedBy:        string;
  remarks:            string;
  // totalSupplies & netTaxPayable are NOT sent — auto-calculated in Service
}
```

## File: src/app/shared/helpers/role-display.helper.ts
```typescript
export const ROLE_CLASS_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  SUPER_ADMIN:         'role-super',
  TAX_COMMISSIONER:    'role-commissioner',
  TAX_OFFICER:         'role-officer',
  SUPERVISOR:          'role-supervisor',
  AUDITOR:             'role-auditor',
  DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR: 'role-data',
  TAXPAYER:            'role-taxpayer',
  GUEST:               'role-guest',
};

export const ROLE_LABEL_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  SUPER_ADMIN:         'Super Administrator',
  TAX_COMMISSIONER:    'Tax Commissioner',
  TAX_OFFICER:         'Tax Officer',
  SUPERVISOR:          'Supervisor',
  AUDITOR:             'Auditor',
  DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR: 'Data Entry Operator',
  TAXPAYER:            'Taxpayer',
  GUEST:               'Guest',
};

export function getRoleClass(role: string): string {
  return ROLE_CLASS_MAP[role] ?? '';
}

export function getRoleLabel(role: string): string {
  return ROLE_LABEL_MAP[role] ?? role;
}

export function getStatusClass(status: string): string {
  if (status === 'Active')    return 'status-active';
  if (status === 'Suspended') return 'status-suspended';
  return 'status-inactive';
}

// Roles available in create/edit dropdowns.
// SUPER_ADMIN is intentionally excluded — it can only be assigned at the system level.
export const ASSIGNABLE_ROLES = [
  'TAX_COMMISSIONER',
  'TAX_OFFICER',
  'SUPERVISOR',
  'AUDITOR',
  'DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR',
  'TAXPAYER',
  'GUEST',
];

export const DEPARTMENTS = [
  'IT Administration',
  'Tax Commission',
  'VAT Division',
  'Income Tax Division',
  'Audit Division',
  'Data Management',
  'External',
];
```

## File: src/app/shared/taxpayer-search/taxpayer-search.component.css
```css
/* taxpayer-search.component.css
   Styles exclusive to the TaxpayerSearchComponent.
   .form-input and .input-wrap base styles come from global styles.css;
   this file adds the search-specific layout and result dropdown anatomy. */


/* ── Search row (input + button) ─────────────────────────────── */

.search-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}

/* Modifier: search input gets a slightly taller touch target */
.search-input-wrap {
  flex: 1;
}

.search-input-wrap .form-input {
  height: 40px;
  background: var(--color-bg-secondary);
}

.search-input-wrap .form-input:focus {
  background: var(--color-bg-primary);
}


/* ── Search trigger button ────────────────────────────────────── */

.btn-search {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  padding: 0 20px;
  height: 40px;
  background: var(--color-accent);
  color: var(--color-text-inverse);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-accent);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.btn-search:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: var(--color-accent-dark);
  border-color: var(--color-accent-dark);
}

.btn-search:disabled {
  opacity: 0.55;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}


/* ── Results dropdown ────────────────────────────────────────── */

.search-results {
  margin-top: 6px;
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-primary);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  background: var(--color-bg-primary);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  overflow: hidden;
  z-index: 100;
  position: relative;
}

.result-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 11px 14px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.12s;
  border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);
}

.result-item:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.result-item:hover:not(.disabled) {
  background: var(--color-accent-light);
}

.result-item.disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.70;
  background: var(--color-bg-secondary);
}


/* ── Result avatar ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

.result-avatar {
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--color-accent-light);
  color: var(--color-accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 15px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.result-item.disabled .result-avatar {
  background: var(--color-danger-bg);
  color: var(--color-danger);
}


/* ── Result text ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.result-info {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.result-name {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--color-text-primary);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.result-meta {
  display: block;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-text-secondary);
  margin-top: 2px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}


/* ── "Select" badge on the right ─────────────────────────────── */

.result-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--color-accent-light);
  color: var(--color-accent);
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  border: 0.5px solid #c4d9f0;
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}


/* ── Selected taxpayer card ──────────────────────────────────── */

.selected-card {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  background: var(--color-success-bg);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-success-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
}

.selected-card-left {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.selected-avatar {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(59, 109, 17, 0.12);
  color: var(--color-success);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 17px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.selected-name {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--color-text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 2px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.selected-meta {
  display: block;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-text-secondary);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}


/* ── "Selected" lightning tag ────────────────────────────────── */

.autofill-tag {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--color-success);
  background: rgba(59, 109, 17, 0.10);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-success-border);
  padding: 4px 10px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
```

## File: src/app/shared/taxpayer-search/taxpayer-search.component.html
```html
<!-- ── Search Row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="search-row">
  <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
    <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
    <input
      type="text"
      class="form-input"
      placeholder="Enter TIN number, NID or taxpayer name…"
      [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
      [ngModelOptions]="{ standalone: true }"
      (ngModelChange)="onInputChange()"
      (keyup.enter)="onSearch()"
      [disabled]="isLocked"
    />
    <button
      *ngIf="isLocked"
      type="button"
      class="clear-btn"
      title="Clear selection"
      (click)="onClear()"
    >
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

  <button
    type="button"
    class="btn-search"
    (click)="onSearch()"
    [disabled]="isSearching || isLocked"
  >
    <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
    <span *ngIf="isSearching">
      <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching…
    </span>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- ── Search Results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
  <div
    class="result-item"
    *ngFor="let tp of searchResults"
    (click)="onSelect(tp)"
    [class.disabled]="isIneligible(tp)"
    [title]="isIneligible(tp) ? 'Taxpayer is suspended and cannot be registered for VAT.' : ''"
  >
    <div class="result-avatar">
      <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="result-info">
      <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(tp) }}</span>
      <span class="result-meta">
        <span *ngIf="tp.tinNumber" class="fw-bold me-2">TIN: {{ tp.tinNumber }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="tp.phone"> · {{ tp.phone }}</span>
        <span
          *ngIf="isIneligible(tp)"
          class="ms-2"
          style="color:#e74c3c;font-weight:700"
        >⚠ Suspended</span>
      </span>
    </div>
    <span class="result-badge" *ngIf="!isIneligible(tp)">Select</span>
    <span
      class="result-badge"
      *ngIf="isIneligible(tp)"
      style="background:#fff0f0;color:#e74c3c"
    >Ineligible</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── No Results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
  <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
  No taxpayer found. Try a different TIN, NID, or name.
</div>

<!-- ── Selected Taxpayer Card ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="selected-card" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer">
  <div class="selected-card-left">
    <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <p class="selected-name">{{ displayName }}</p>
      <p class="selected-meta">
        <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber">TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.phone"> · {{ selectedTaxpayer.phone }}</span>
        <span class="ms-2" style="font-size:11px;opacity:0.8">
          — {{ selectedTaxpayer.taxpayerType.typeName }}
        </span>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="autofill-tag">
    <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Selected
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/shared/taxpayer-search/taxpayer-search.component.ts
```typescript
import {
  Component,
  EventEmitter,
  Input,
  OnDestroy,
  OnInit,
  Output,
} from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import {
  debounceTime,
  distinctUntilChanged,
  finalize,
  takeUntil,
} from 'rxjs/operators';
import { Taxpayer } from '../../models/taxpayer.model';
import { ToastService } from '../toast/toast.service';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../core/constants/api.constants';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-taxpayer-search',
  templateUrl: './taxpayer-search.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./taxpayer-search.component.css'],
})
export class TaxpayerSearchComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
  @Input() selectedTaxpayer: Taxpayer | null = null;

  @Output() taxpayerSelected = new EventEmitter<Taxpayer>();

  @Output() taxpayerCleared = new EventEmitter<void>();

  searchQuery = '';
  isSearching = false;
  searchResults: Taxpayer[] = [];
  showResults = false;
  hasSearched = false;

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private http: HttpClient,
    private toast: ToastService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {}

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  get isLocked(): boolean {
    return this.selectedTaxpayer !== null;
  }

  get displayName(): string {
    return this.getDisplayName(this.selectedTaxpayer);
  }

  getDisplayName(tp: Taxpayer | null): string {
    if (!tp) return '';
    const type = tp.taxpayerType?.typeName?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
    return type.includes('company')
      ? (tp.companyName ?? 'Unknown Company')
      : (tp.fullName ?? 'Unknown');
  }

  onInputChange(): void {
    if (!this.searchQuery.trim()) {
      this.searchResults = [];
      this.showResults = false;
      this.hasSearched = false;
    }
  }

  onSearch(): void {
    const q = this.searchQuery.trim();

    if (!q) {
      this.toast.warning('Enter a TIN number, NID, or name to search.');
      return;
    }
    if (q.length < 3) {
      this.toast.warning('Enter at least 3 characters.');
      return;
    }

    this.isSearching = true;
    this.showResults = false;
    this.hasSearched = false;

    this.http
      .get<Taxpayer[]>(
        `${API_ENDPOINTS.TAXPAYERS.LIST}?search=${encodeURIComponent(q)}`,
      )
      .pipe(
        takeUntil(this.destroy$),
        finalize(() => (this.isSearching = false)),
      )
      .subscribe({
        next: (results) => {
          this.searchResults = results;
          this.showResults = true;
          this.hasSearched = true;
          if (results.length === 0) {
            this.toast.info(
              'No taxpayer found. Check the TIN, NID, or name and try again.',
            );
          }
        },
        // 400/network errors are handled by ErrorInterceptor — no duplicate toast here.
        error: () => {},
      });
  }

  onSelect(tp: Taxpayer): void {
    this.showResults = false;
    this.taxpayerSelected.emit(tp);
  }

  onClear(): void {
    this.searchQuery = '';
    this.searchResults = [];
    this.showResults = false;
    this.hasSearched = false;
    this.taxpayerCleared.emit();
  }

  isIneligible(tp: Taxpayer): boolean {
    return tp.status === 'Suspended';
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/shared/toast/toast.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { BehaviorSubject, timer } from 'rxjs';

export type ToastType = 'success' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info';
```
