## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/pages/fiscal-year-list/fiscal-year-list.component.css
```css
.fy-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}

.fy-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 24px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
  border: 2px solid #f0f4f8;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition:
    box-shadow 0.2s,
    transform 0.2s;
}
.fy-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.fy-card.current {
  border-color: #1a3f8f;
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #fff, #f0f4ff);
}
.fy-card.upcoming {
  border-color: #1faa8b;
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #fff, #f0fff8);
}
.fy-card.closed {
  border-color: #e0e8f0;
  opacity: 0.8;
}

/* Badges */
.current-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #2a5fd6);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 0 14px 0 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
}
.upcoming-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1faa8b, #17c69a);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 0 14px 0 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
}

/* Year Name */
.fy-year-name {
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #1a2340;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  margin-top: 8px;
  font-family: monospace;
}
.fy-card.current .fy-year-name {
  color: #1a3f8f;
}
.fy-card.upcoming .fy-year-name {
  color: #1faa8b;
}

/* Dates */
.fy-dates {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.fy-date-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex: 1;
}
.fy-date-item i {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.fyd-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 10px;
  color: #888;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.fyd-value {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2340;
}
.fy-date-arrow {
  color: #ccc;
  font-size: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* Deadlines */
.fy-deadlines {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  padding: 14px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border-radius: 10px;
}
.fy-deadline-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}
.fdl-icon {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 14px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.fdl-icon.vat {
  background: #e6f7f3;
  color: #1faa8b;
}
.fdl-icon.it {
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
}
.fdl-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #888;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.fdl-value {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2340;
}

/* Footer */
.fy-footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.btn-set-current {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  border: none;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.btn-set-current:hover {
  background: #d0daf5;
}
.btn-set-current:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.7;
}
.btn-fy-edit {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  border: none;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.btn-fy-edit:hover {
  background: #d0daf5;
}

/* Add Card */
.fy-add-card {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 24px;
  border: 2px dashed #d0daf5;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  min-height: 200px;
  color: #888;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.fy-add-card:hover {
  border-color: #1a3f8f;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  background: #f0f4ff;
}
.fy-add-card i {
  font-size: 32px;
}
.fy-add-card span {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .fy-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-create/import-duty-create.component.css
```css
.section-icon.teal {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1faa8b, #17c69a);
}
.section-icon.red {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e74c3c, #c0392b);
}
.section-icon.purple {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a855f7);
}

.calc-summary {
  margin-top: 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid #ffcccc;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.cs-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 10px 18px;
}
.cs-label {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #666;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.cs-label.bold {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2340;
}
.cs-value {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2340;
}
.cs-value.duty {
  color: #e74c3c;
}
.cs-value.vat {
  color: #f59e0b;
}
.cs-value.total {
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #e74c3c;
}
.cs-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: #ffcccc;
}
.total-row {
  background: #fff0f0;
  padding: 12px 18px;
}
/* Submit button override for import duty — red is semantic (cost/duty) */
.btn-submit.danger {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e74c3c, #c0392b);
}
.btn-submit.danger:hover:not(:disabled) {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.35);
}
```

## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-create/import-duty-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>New Import Record</h4>
    <p>Create a new import duty assessment.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">
  <div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isMasterDataLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Importer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Importer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select taxpayer and business</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" (ngModelChange)="onTaxpayerChange()">
            <option value="">Select Taxpayer</option>
            <option *ngFor="let tp of taxpayers" [value]="getTin(tp)">
              {{ getTaxpayerName(tp) }} - {{ getTin(tp) }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Business <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="form.businessName || 'Auto from taxpayer'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Product -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Goods Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select product and origin details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxable Product</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-box-seam input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.productId" (ngModelChange)="onProductChange()">
            <option [value]="0">Select Product</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of products" [value]="p.id">
              {{ p.productName }} ({{ p.hsCode }})
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">HS Code <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="selectedProduct?.hsCode || 'Auto from product'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Goods Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Describe the goods being imported..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.goodsDescription" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Origin Country</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-globe input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.originCountry">
            <option value="">Select Country</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of countries" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Valuation -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Duty Calculation</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">CIF value and official tax preview</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">CIF Value (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" [(ngModel)]="form.cifValue"
            (ngModelChange)="onCifValueChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Source <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" value="Backend preview" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Calculation Summary -->
    <div class="calc-summary" *ngIf="form.cifValue > 0">
      <div class="cs-row" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
        <span class="cs-label">Tax Preview</span>
        <span class="cs-value">Loading...</span>
      </div>
      <div class="cs-row">
        <span class="cs-label">CIF Value</span>
        <span class="cs-value">{{ fmt(form.cifValue) }}</span>
      </div>
      <ng-container *ngIf="taxPreview">
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Customs Duty (CD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.cdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.cdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.customsDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Supplementary Duty (SD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.sdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.sdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.supplementaryDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">VAT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.vatRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.vatRate }}%</span></span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.vat) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Advance Income Tax (AIT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.aitRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.aitRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Advance Tax (AT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.atRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.atRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-divider"></div>
        <div class="cs-row total-row">
          <span class="cs-label bold">Total Payable</span>
          <span class="cs-value total">{{ fmt(taxPreview.totalPayable) }}</span>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Port & Shipping -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Port & Shipping Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Entry port, Bill of Entry, bill of lading and dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Port of Entry</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.portOfEntry">
            <option value="">Select Port</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of ports" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. BOE-2024-000345" [(ngModel)]="form.boeNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.boeDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Bill of Lading / AWB</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. BL-2024-44821" [(ngModel)]="form.billOfLading" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Import Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.importDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i> Create Import Record</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/income-tax-returns/income-tax-returns.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
import { SharedModule } from 'src/app/shared/shared.module';
import { IncomeTaxReturnsRoutingModule } from './income-tax-returns-routing.module';
import { IncomeTaxReturnListComponent } from '../pages/income-tax-return-list/income-tax-return-list.component';
import { IncomeTaxReturnCreateComponent } from '../pages/income-tax-return-create/income-tax-return-create.component';
import { IncomeTaxReturnViewComponent } from '../pages/income-tax-return-view/income-tax-return-view.component';
import { IncomeTaxReturnEditComponent } from '../pages/income-tax-return-edit/income-tax-return-edit.component';
import { It10bComponent } from '../pages/IT10B/it10b.component';


@NgModule({
  declarations: [
    IncomeTaxReturnListComponent,
    IncomeTaxReturnCreateComponent,
    IncomeTaxReturnViewComponent,
    IncomeTaxReturnEditComponent,
    It10bComponent
  ],
  imports: [
    CommonModule,
    FormsModule,
    ReactiveFormsModule,
    SharedModule,
    IncomeTaxReturnsRoutingModule
  ]
})
export class IncomeTaxReturnsModule { }
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/income-tax-return-edit/income-tax-return-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Income Tax Return</h4>
    <p>Update income and payment details. Tax is recalculated by the server.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.returnNo }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-sub">{{ form.taxpayerName }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer & Period</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Identity, category and filing period</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.itrCategory" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="showCompanySubType">
        <label class="form-label required">Company Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-buildings-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.companySubType" (change)="calculatePreview()">
            <option value="">Select company type...</option>
            <option *ngFor="let s of companySubTypes" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.status" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Assessment Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.assessmentYear" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Income Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.incomeYear" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return Period</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.returnPeriod" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dueDate" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submission Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.submissionDate" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Income & Tax -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Income & Tax Figures</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Editable income fields with backend tax preview</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Gross Income (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.grossIncome" min="0" (change)="calculatePreview()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Exempt Income (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.exemptIncome" min="0" (change)="calculatePreview()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Rate (%) <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="taxRatePreview" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Gross Tax (BDT) <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calculator input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="grossTaxPreview" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Rebate (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxRebate" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="net-display-row">
      <div class="nd-item">
        <span class="nd-label">Taxable Income</span>
        <span class="nd-value taxable">{{ fmt(taxableIncome) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="nd-arrow"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></div>
      <div class="nd-item highlight">
        <span class="nd-label">Net Tax Payable</span>
        <span class="nd-value net">{{ fmt(netTaxPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-hint" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i> Refreshing server tax preview...
    </div>
    <div class="field-error" *ngIf="previewError">
      Server preview unavailable. Final tax will be recalculated during update.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Payment -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Payments</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Advance tax, withholding and payments</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Advance Tax Paid (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.advanceTaxPaid" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Withholding Tax (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.withholdingTax" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Paid at Filing (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPaid" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Balance Due (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="fmt(balanceDue)" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Refundable Amount (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="fmt(refundable)" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Submission -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional update notes for the record</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Return</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/income-tax-return-list/income-tax-return-list.component.css
```css
.return-code {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  background: #e8eef9;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  font-family: monospace;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Year cell */
.year-cell {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}
.year-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  padding: 2px 7px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.income-year {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #888;
}

/* Category */
.cat-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 3px 9px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.cat-individual {
  background: #e0f2f9;
  color: #0891b2;
}
.cat-company {
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
}
.cat-partner {
  background: #fef3e2;
  color: #f59e0b;
}
.cat-ngo {
  background: #e6f7f3;
  color: #1faa8b;
}

/* Amounts */
.gross {
  color: #e74c3c;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.net {
  color: #1a3f8f;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.paid {
  color: #1faa8b;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* Refund */
.refund-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: #e0f2f9;
  color: #0891b2;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Amend button */
.btn-amend {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  background: #fef3e2;
  color: #f59e0b;
  border: 1px solid #fde8c0;
  padding: 5px 12px;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.btn-amend:hover {
  background: #fde8c0;
}

.data-table {
  min-width: 1500px;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/notices-notifications/pages/notice-view/notice-view.component.css
```css
/* notice-view.component.css — পুরোটা replace করো */

.btn-back {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
  background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d0daf5; color: #1a3f8f;
  padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s;
}
.btn-back:hover { background: #f0f4ff; }

.loading-overlay {
  display: flex; justify-content: center;
  align-items: center; min-height: 300px;
}

/* ── Notice Header Card ── */
.notice-view-card {
  background: #fff; border-radius: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07);
  padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.nvc-top {
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 16px;
  flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
}

.nvc-icon-wrap {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
}

.nvc-icon {
  width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px;
  background: #e8f0fe; color: #1a3f8f;
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  justify-content: center; font-size: 22px; flex-shrink: 0;
}

.nvc-no {
  font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px;
  color: #888; margin-bottom: 3px;
}

.nvc-type {
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #333;
}

.nvc-badges { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

.pri-badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
  padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
}
.pri-low      { background: #f0fdf4; color: #166534; }
.pri-normal   { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; }
.pri-high     { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
.pri-urgent   { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }

.status-badge {
  padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
}
.status-unread  { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }
.status-read    { background: #f0fdf4; color: #166534; }
.status-active  { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; }
.status-inactive{ background: #f3f4f6; color: #6b7280; }

.nvc-subject {
  font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a1a2e; margin: 0 0 14px;
}

.nvc-meta {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
}

.nvc-meta-item {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
  font-size: 12px; color: #666; background: #f8fafc;
  padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 8px;
}

/* ── Message Body Card ── */
.notice-body-card {
  background: #fff; border-radius: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07);
  padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.body-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a3f8f;
  margin-bottom: 14px; padding-bottom: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f3f8;
}

.body-content {
  font-size: 14px; color: #333;
  line-height: 1.7; white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.attachment-row { margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid #f0f3f8; }

.attachment-item {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e0e5ed;
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: #444;
}

.btn-download {
  background: #1a3f8f; color: #fff; border: none;
  border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 10px;
  font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
}

/* ── Response Card ── */
.response-card {
  background: #f0fdf4; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
  border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.response-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #166534;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.response-date { margin-left: auto; font-size: 12px; color: #888; font-weight: 400; }

.response-body { font-size: 14px; color: #333; line-height: 1.6; }

/* ── Reply Section ── */
.reply-section { margin-bottom: 16px; }

.btn-reply {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
  background: #1a3f8f; color: #fff; border: none;
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 20px;
  font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer;
  transition: background .2s;
}
.btn-reply:hover { background: #163578; }

.reply-box {
  background: #fff; border-radius: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07); padding: 20px;
}

.reply-box-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a3f8f;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.reply-textarea {
  width: 100%; border: 1px solid #e0e5ed;
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px;
  font-size: 14px; outline: none; resize: vertical;
  transition: border .2s; box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: inherit;
}
.reply-textarea:focus { border-color: #1a3f8f; }

.reply-actions {
  display: flex; justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 10px; margin-top: 12px;
}

.btn-cancel-reply {
  padding: 8px 18px; border: 1px solid #e0e5ed;
  border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #555;
  font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer;
}

.btn-send-reply {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  padding: 8px 18px; background: #1a3f8f; color: #fff;
  border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s;
}
.btn-send-reply:hover { background: #163578; }
```

## File: src/app/features/payments/pages/payment-create/payment-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Record Payment</h4>
    <p>Record a new tax payment transaction.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 0: Find Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon search-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Find Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search by TIN number, NID or name — details will auto-fill</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
        <input type="text" class="form-input"
          placeholder="Enter TIN number, NID or taxpayer name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          (ngModelChange)="onSearchInput()"
          (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()"
          [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
        <button *ngIf="isAutoFilled" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...</span>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Search Results -->
    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">
            <span *ngIf="t.tinNumber" class="me-2 fw-bold text-primary">TIN: {{ t.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="!t.tinNumber" class="text-danger me-2">No TIN</span>
            <span *ngIf="t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="t.phone"> · {{ t.phone }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- No Results -->
    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> No taxpayer found. Check TIN, NID or name and try again.
    </div>

    <!-- Selected Card -->
    <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && selectedTaxpayer">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">
            <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber">TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.phone"> · {{ selectedTaxpayer.phone }}</span>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN, name and payment type</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. TIN-000000001"
            [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter taxpayer name"
            [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Payment Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of paymentTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return / Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. ITR-2025-26-XXXXXXXX"
            [(ngModel)]="form.returnNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Payment Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Payment Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Amount, method and transaction info</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0"
            [(ngModel)]="form.amount" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Payment Method</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-wallet2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentMethod">
            <option value="">Select Method</option>
            <option *ngFor="let m of paymentMethods" [value]="m">{{ m }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. REF-2024-001"
            [(ngModel)]="form.referenceNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="showChequeField">
        <label class="form-label required">Cheque No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. CHQ-889921"
            [(ngModel)]="form.chequeNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Payment Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Value Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.valueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Bank Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Bank Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Bank, branch and account information</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bank Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-bank input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.bankName">
            <option value="">Select Bank</option>
            <option *ngFor="let b of banks" [value]="b">{{ b }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Branch</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter branch name"
            [(ngModel)]="form.bankBranch" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Account No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter account number"
            [(ngModel)]="form.accountNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks / Notes</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Enter any additional remarks..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Record Payment
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Saving...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/payments/payment/payment-routing.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { RouterModule, Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { AuthGuard } from 'src/app/core/guards/auth.guard';
import { Role } from 'src/app/core/constants/roles.constants';

import { PaymentListComponent } from '../pages/payment-list/payment-list.component';
import { PaymentCreateComponent } from '../pages/payment-create/payment-create.component';
import { PaymentViewComponent } from '../pages/payment-view/payment-view.component';
import { PaymentEditComponent } from '../pages/payment-edit/payment-edit.component';

const routes: Routes = [
  {
        path: '',
        component: PaymentListComponent,
        canActivate: [AuthGuard],
        data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] }
      },
      {
        path: 'create',
        component: PaymentCreateComponent,
        canActivate: [AuthGuard],
        data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.TAXPAYER] }
      },
      {
        path: 'view/:id',
        component: PaymentViewComponent,
        canActivate: [AuthGuard],
        data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] }
      },
      {
        path: 'edit/:id',
        component: PaymentEditComponent,
        canActivate: [AuthGuard],
        data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER] }
      }
];

@NgModule({
  imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
  exports: [RouterModule]
})
export class PaymentRoutingModule { }
```
