## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-edit/penalty-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Penalty</h4>
    <p>Update penalty details and status.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
  <p>Loading penalty data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.penaltyNo }}</strong>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN and taxpayer details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.returnNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assessment Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.assessmentYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Penalty Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Penalty Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, severity, amounts and status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Penalty Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.penaltyType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of penaltyTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Severity</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.severity">
            <option *ngFor="let s of severities" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Penalty Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.penaltyAmount"
            (ngModelChange)="onPenaltyChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Interest Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.interestAmount"
            (ngModelChange)="form.totalAmount = form.penaltyAmount + form.interestAmount" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Paid Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paidAmount" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Issued By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedBy">
            <option *ngFor="let o of officers" [value]="o">{{ o }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Approved By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.approvedBy" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Description -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Description & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Penalty reason and notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.description" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Penalty
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-list/penalty-list.component.css
```css
.penalty-code {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  background: #e8eef9;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  font-family: monospace;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Penalty Type */
.type-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 3px 9px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.type-late {
  background: #fef3e2;
  color: #f59e0b;
}
.type-noncompliance {
  background: #fff0f0;
  color: #e74c3c;
}
.type-fraud {
  background: #1a0000;
  color: #ff6b6b;
}
.type-under {
  background: #fef3e2;
  color: #f59e0b;
}
.type-other {
  background: #f0f4f8;
  color: #666;
}

/* Due Date */
.due-normal {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #444;
}
.due-overdue {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #e74c3c;
  background: #fff0f0;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
}

/* Amounts */
.penalty-amount {
  color: #e74c3c;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.interest-amount {
  color: #f59e0b;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.total-amount {
  color: #1a2340;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.data-table {
  min-width: 1400px;
}
.status-filter-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 12px 0 4px;
}
.filter-pill {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 4px 14px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1.5px solid #dde3f0;
  background: #f4f6fb;
  color: #666;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.18s;
}
.filter-pill:hover {
  border-color: #1a3f8f;
  color: #1a3f8f;
}
.filter-pill.active {
  background: #1a3f8f;
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #1a3f8f;
}

/* New status classes */
.status-draft {
  background: #f0f4f8;
  color: #64748b;
}
.status-approved {
  background: #e8f5e9;
  color: #2e7d32;
}
.status-partial {
  background: #fff3e0;
  color: #e65100;
}
.status-cancelled {
  background: #fce4ec;
  color: #880e4f;
}
.status-closed {
  background: #ede7f6;
  color: #4527a0;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-view/penalty-view.component.css
```css
.penalty-total-val {
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1;
}
.due-overdue {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #e74c3c;
  background: #fff0f0;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
}

/* Penalty type badges */
.type-badge {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 3px 9px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.type-late {
  background: #fef3e2;
  color: #f59e0b;
}
.type-noncompliance {
  background: #fff0f0;
  color: #e74c3c;
}
.type-fraud {
  background: #1a0000;
  color: #ff6b6b;
}
.type-under {
  background: #fef3e2;
  color: #f59e0b;
}
.type-other {
  background: #f0f4f8;
  color: #666;
}
/* Action bar */
.action-bar {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin: 14px 0;
}
.btn-action {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 8px 18px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.18s;
}
.btn-action.submit {
  background: #1a3f8f;
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-action.approve {
  background: #1b6b3a;
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-action.reject {
  background: #f59e0b;
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-action.issue {
  background: #0e6655;
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-action.cancel {
  background: #a32d2d;
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-action:hover {
  filter: brightness(1.1);
}

/* Timeline */
.timeline-body {
  padding: 16px 20px;
}
.timeline-item {
  display: flex;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.tl-dot {
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #1a3f8f;
  margin-top: 5px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.tl-content {
  flex: 1;
}
.tl-action {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2340;
  text-transform: capitalize;
}
.tl-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #888;
  margin: 2px 0;
}
.tl-transition {
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  padding: 1px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.tl-who {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #444;
}
.tl-role {
  color: #aaa;
}
.tl-remarks {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #555;
  margin-top: 3px;
  font-style: italic;
}
.tl-date {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #bbb;
  margin-top: 3px;
}

/* Status classes */
.status-draft {
  background: #f0f4f8;
  color: #64748b;
}
.status-approved {
  background: #e8f5e9;
  color: #2e7d32;
}
.status-partial {
  background: #fff3e0;
  color: #e65100;
}
.status-cancelled {
  background: #fce4ec;
  color: #880e4f;
}
.status-closed {
  background: #ede7f6;
  color: #4527a0;
}

/* Modal success variant */
.btn-modal-confirm.success {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1b6b3a, #2e7d32);
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-modal-confirm.success:hover {
  filter: brightness(1.1);
}
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-view/penalty-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Penalty Details</h4>
    <p>Full penalty and fine information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canEdit()" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && penalty">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card red">
    <div class="penalty-header-left">
      <div class="penalty-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="penalty-no">{{ penalty.penaltyNo }}</div>
        <div class="penalty-meta">
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(penalty.severity)">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ penalty.severity }}
          </span>
          <span class="penalty-type-label">{{ penalty.penaltyType }}</span>
          <span class="penalty-date">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ penalty.issueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="penalty-header-right">
      <div class="penalty-label">Total Due</div>
      <div class="penalty-total">{{ fmt(penalty.totalAmount) }}</div>
      <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(penalty.status)">
        {{ penalty.status }}
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Action Buttons -->
  <div class="action-bar" *ngIf="canSubmit() || canApprove() || canReject() || canIssue() || canCancel()">
    <button *ngIf="canSubmit()" class="btn-action submit" (click)="openAction('submit')">
      <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Submit for Approval
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canApprove()" class="btn-action approve" (click)="openAction('approve')">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Approve
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canReject()" class="btn-action reject" (click)="openAction('reject')">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Return to Draft
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canIssue()" class="btn-action issue" (click)="openAction('issue')">
      <i class="bi bi-send-check-fill"></i> Issue Officially
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canCancel()" class="btn-action cancel" (click)="openAction('cancel')">
      <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i> Cancel
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Amount Summary -->
  <div class="amount-summary-row">
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon penalty"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Penalty</span>
        <span class="ac-value penalty">{{ fmt(penalty.penaltyAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon interest"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Interest ({{ penalty.interestRate }}%)</span>
        <span class="ac-value interest">{{ fmt(penalty.interestAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon total"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Total Due</span>
        <span class="ac-value total">{{ fmt(penalty.totalAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Paid</span>
        <span class="ac-value paid">
          {{ penalty.paidAmount > 0 ? fmt(penalty.paidAmount) : '—' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i><span>Taxpayer Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ penalty.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxpayer Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ penalty.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Assessment Year</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.assessmentYear }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.returnNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Return No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ penalty.returnNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i><span>Penalty Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Penalty Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ penalty.penaltyType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Severity</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(penalty.severity)">
              {{ penalty.severity }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Issue Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.issueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Due Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            [class]="penalty.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : ''">
            {{ penalty.dueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.paymentDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.paymentDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i><span>Processing Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(penalty.status)">
              {{ penalty.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Issued By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.issuedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.approvedBy">
          <span class="detail-label">Approved By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.approvedBy }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card" *ngIf="penalty.description || penalty.remarks">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i><span>Description & Remarks</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.description">
          <span class="detail-label">Description</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            style="text-align:left;max-width:300px;word-break:break-word;white-space:normal;">
            {{ penalty.description }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            style="text-align:left;max-width:300px;word-break:break-word;white-space:normal;">
            {{ penalty.remarks }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Audit Timeline -->
  <div class="detail-card mt-3" *ngIf="penalty.auditLogs && penalty.auditLogs.length > 0">
    <div class="detail-card-header">
      <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><span>Activity Timeline</span>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-body">
      <div class="timeline-item" *ngFor="let log of penalty.auditLogs">
        <div class="tl-dot" [class]="'tl-' + log.action.toLowerCase()"></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-action">{{ formatAction(log.action) }}</div>
          <div class="tl-meta">
            <span *ngIf="log.fromStatus && log.toStatus" class="tl-transition">
              {{ log.fromStatus }} → {{ log.toStatus }}
            </span>
            <span class="tl-who">{{ log.performedBy }}</span>
            <span class="tl-role">({{ log.performedByRole }})</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-remarks" *ngIf="log.remarks">{{ log.remarks }}</div>
          <div class="tl-date">{{ log.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, hh:mm a' }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</ng-container>

<!-- Action Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showActionModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-check" style="font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">{{ getActionLabel(pendingAction) }}</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">Add remarks (optional)</p>
    <div class="input-wrap" style="margin:0 16px 16px;">
      <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
        [(ngModel)]="actionRemarks"
        placeholder="Remarks..." rows="3">
      </textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="closeAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        Cancel
      </button>
      <button [class]="getActionClass(pendingAction)"
        (click)="confirmAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        <span *ngIf="!isActing">{{ getActionLabel(pendingAction) }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="isActing">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Processing...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/services/penalty.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient, HttpParams } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from 'src/app/core/constants/api.constants';
import { Penalty, PenaltyCreateRequest, PenaltyStatusRequest } from '../../../models/penalty.model';

@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class PenaltyService {
  constructor(private http: HttpClient) {}

  getAll(search?: string, status?: string): Observable<Penalty[]> {
    let params = new HttpParams();
    if (search) params = params.set('search', search);
    if (status) params = params.set('status', status);
    return this.http.get<Penalty[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.LIST, { params });
  }

  getById(id: number): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.get<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.GET(id));
  }

  create(req: PenaltyCreateRequest): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.post<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.CREATE, req);
  }

  update(id: number, req: Partial<PenaltyCreateRequest>): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.put<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.UPDATE(id), req);
  }

  delete(id: number): Observable<void> {
    return this.http.delete<void>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.DELETE(id));
  }

  submit(id: number, req: PenaltyStatusRequest): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.post<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.SUBMIT(id), req);
  }

  approve(id: number, req: PenaltyStatusRequest): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.post<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.APPROVE(id), req);
  }

  reject(id: number, req: PenaltyStatusRequest): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.post<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.REJECT(id), req);
  }

  issue(id: number, req: PenaltyStatusRequest): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.post<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.ISSUE(id), req);
  }

  cancel(id: number, req: PenaltyStatusRequest): Observable<Penalty> {
    return this.http.post<Penalty>(API_ENDPOINTS.PENALTIES.CANCEL(id), req);
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step1-account-type/reg-step-account-type/reg-step-account-type.component.css
```css
.category-label {
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #888;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.category-label.mt { margin-top: 20px; }

.category-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }

.category-card {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
  padding: 14px 16px; border: 2px solid #e0e8f0; border-radius: 12px;
  background: #fff; cursor: pointer; text-align: left;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  position: relative;
}
.category-card:hover    { border-color: #1a3f8f; background: #f8f9ff; }
.category-card.selected { border-color: #1a3f8f; background: #f0f4ff; }

.cat-icon {
  width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px;
}
.cat-icon.blue   { background: #e8eef9; color: #1a3f8f; }
.cat-icon.green  { background: #e6f7f3; color: #0d7055; }
.cat-icon.purple { background: #f0ebff; color: #6d28d9; }

.cat-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; flex: 1; }
.cat-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.cat-desc  { font-size: 12px; color: #777; }

.cat-check { position: absolute; right: 14px; color: #1a3f8f; font-size: 18px; }

/* Type pills */
.type-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; }

.type-card {
  padding: 10px 18px; border: 2px solid #e0e8f0; border-radius: 20px;
  background: #fff; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  color: #555; transition: all 0.15s; position: relative;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
}
.type-card:hover    { border-color: #1a3f8f; color: #1a3f8f; background: #f8f9ff; }
.type-card.selected { border-color: #1a3f8f; color: #1a3f8f; background: #f0f4ff; }
.type-check { font-size: 13px; color: #1a3f8f; }

.type-loading {
  padding: 20px; text-align: center;
  font-size: 13px; color: #888;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step1-account-type/reg-step-account-type/reg-step-account-type.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <div class="step-intro">
    <h3 class="step-heading">What type of taxpayer are you?</h3>
    <p class="step-sub">First select a category, then your specific taxpayer type.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="type-loading" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Loading taxpayer types...
  </div>

  <ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <!-- Step 1A: Category Selection -->
    <div class="category-label">Step 1 — Select Category</div>
    <div class="category-grid">
      <button type="button" class="category-card"
        *ngFor="let cat of categories"
        [class.selected]="selectedCategory === cat"
        (click)="selectCategory(cat)">
        <div class="cat-icon" [ngClass]="categoryMeta[cat].color">
          <i [class]="'bi ' + categoryMeta[cat].icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-body">
          <span class="cat-title">{{ cat }}</span>
          <span class="cat-desc">{{ categoryMeta[cat].desc }}</span>
        </div>
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill cat-check" *ngIf="selectedCategory === cat"></i>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 1B: Type Selection — only shows after category selected -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="selectedCategory && filteredTypes.length > 0">
      <div class="category-label mt">Step 2 — Select Taxpayer Type</div>
      <div class="type-grid">
        <button type="button" class="type-card"
          *ngFor="let t of filteredTypes"
          [class.selected]="selectedTypeId === t.id"
          (click)="selectType(t)">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill type-check" *ngIf="selectedTypeId === t.id"></i>
          <span class="type-name">{{ t.typeName }}</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

  </ng-container>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-next"
      [disabled]="!canProceed"
      (click)="onNext()">
      Continue <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step3-identity/reg-step-identity/reg-step-identity.component.css
```css
/* reg-step-identity.component.css */

.nid-info-banner {
  margin-top: -6px;
}

/* Existing TIN toggle row */
.existing-tin-toggle {
  margin: 14px 0 18px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border: 1.5px dashed #a5b4fc;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #f5f3ff;
}

.toggle-label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
}

.toggle-label input[type="checkbox"] {
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
  accent-color: #6366f1;
  cursor: pointer;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.toggle-text {
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #4338ca;
}

.toggle-text i {
  margin-right: 5px;
}

.field-hint {
  display: block;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #6b7280;
  margin-top: 5px;
}

.field-hint i {
  margin-right: 4px;
}

input[type="date"]::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator {
  opacity: 0.4;
  cursor: pointer;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step3-identity/reg-step-identity/reg-step-identity.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <!-- ── INDIVIDUAL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
    <div class="step-intro">
      <h3 class="step-heading">Verify your National ID</h3>
      <p class="step-sub">
        Your NID is the anchor of your tax identity. A unique TIN will be
        auto-generated and permanently linked to your NID.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="nid-info-banner">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
      <span>
        Each NID can only be linked to <strong>one TIN</strong>.
        If you already have a TIN, enable the toggle below instead of entering your NID again.
      </span>
    </div>

    <!-- Existing TIN toggle -->
    <div class="existing-tin-toggle">
      <label class="toggle-label">
        <input type="checkbox"
               [checked]="hasExistingTin"
               (change)="onToggleExistingTin($any($event.target).checked)" />
        <span class="toggle-text">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
          I already have a TIN issued offline or at a Tax Circle office
        </span>
      </label>
    </div>

    <form [formGroup]="form" novalidate>
      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Existing TIN input — shown only when toggle is on -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="hasExistingTin">
          <div class="form-group full-width">
            <label class="form-label required">Your Existing TIN</label>
            <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('existingTin')?.invalid && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input"
                placeholder="e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82"
                formControlName="existingTin"
                style="text-transform: uppercase" />
            </div>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              TIN is required.
            </span>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              Enter a valid TIN format (e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82).
            </span>
            <span class="field-hint">
              <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
              Your TIN will be verified against the NBR registry. Contact your Tax Circle if you are unsure.
            </span>
          </div>
        </ng-container>

        <!-- Standard NID fields — hidden when toggle is on -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="!hasExistingTin">

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">National ID Number (NID)</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('nid')?.invalid && ctrl('nid')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="10 or 17 digit NID number"
              formControlName="nid" maxlength="17" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('nid')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('nid')?.touched">
            NID number is required.
          </span>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('nid')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('nid')?.touched">
            NID must be exactly 10 or 17 digits.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Date of Birth</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.invalid && ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="dateOfBirth"
              [max]="maxDob" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('dateOfBirth')?.touched">
            Date of birth is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Gender</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('gender')?.invalid && ctrl('gender')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-gender-ambiguous input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="gender">
              <option value="">Select gender</option>
              <option *ngFor="let g of genders" [value]="g">{{ g }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('gender')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('gender')?.touched">
            Gender is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Profession <span class="optional-label">(Optional)</span></label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="profession">
              <option value="">Select profession</option>
              <option *ngFor="let p of professions" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        </ng-container><!-- end *ngIf="!hasExistingTin" -->

      </div>
    </form>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- ── COMPANY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="!isIndividual">
    <div class="step-intro">
      <h3 class="step-heading">Company Registration Details</h3>
      <p class="step-sub">
        Your RJSC registration number is the anchor of your corporate tax identity.
        A unique TIN will be auto-generated and linked to your company.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="nid-info-banner company">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
      <span>
        Each RJSC number can only be linked to <strong>one TIN</strong>.
        If your company already has a TIN, enable the toggle below.
      </span>
    </div>

    <!-- Existing TIN toggle (company) -->
    <div class="existing-tin-toggle">
      <label class="toggle-label">
        <input type="checkbox"
               [checked]="hasExistingTin"
               (change)="onToggleExistingTin($any($event.target).checked)" />
        <span class="toggle-text">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
          This company already has a TIN issued at a Tax Circle office
        </span>
      </label>
    </div>

    <form [formGroup]="form" novalidate>
      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Existing TIN input for company -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="hasExistingTin">
          <div class="form-group full-width">
            <label class="form-label required">Company's Existing TIN</label>
            <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('existingTin')?.invalid && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input"
                placeholder="e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82"
                formControlName="existingTin"
                style="text-transform: uppercase" />
            </div>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              TIN is required.
            </span>
            <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('existingTin')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('existingTin')?.touched">
              Enter a valid TIN format (e.g. TIN-20250101-A3F19C82).
            </span>
          </div>
        </ng-container>

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">Company Name</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('companyName')?.invalid && ctrl('companyName')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-building-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Registered company name (as per RJSC)"
              formControlName="companyName" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('companyName')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('companyName')?.touched">
            Company name is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">RJSC Registration Number</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('rjscNo')?.invalid && ctrl('rjscNo')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. C-12345/2020"
              formControlName="rjscNo" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('rjscNo')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('rjscNo')?.touched">
            RJSC registration number is required.
          </span>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('rjscNo')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('rjscNo')?.touched">
            Enter a valid RJSC number (6-20 characters, alphanumeric).
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Incorporation Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('incorporationDate')?.invalid && ctrl('incorporationDate')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="incorporationDate" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('incorporationDate')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('incorporationDate')?.touched">
            Incorporation date is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label">Nature of Business <span class="optional-label">(Optional)</span></label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. Manufacturing, Trading, Services"
              formControlName="natureOfBusiness" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Authorized Person Name</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.invalid && ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Director / MD / Authorized representative"
              formControlName="authorizedPersonName" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('authorizedPersonName')?.touched">
            Authorized person name is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Authorized Person NID</label>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.invalid && ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="10 or 17 digit NID"
              formControlName="authorizedPersonNid" maxlength="17" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.touched">
            Authorized person NID is required.
          </span>
          <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('authorizedPersonNid')?.touched">
            NID must be exactly 10 or 17 digits.
          </span>
        </div>

      </div>
    </form>
  </ng-container>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-back" (click)="back.emit()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="btn-next" (click)="onNext()">
      Review <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

<div class="success-body">

  <div class="success-icon-ring">
    <div class="success-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3 class="success-title">Registration Successful!</h3>
  <p class="success-sub">
    Welcome to the Nirapod Tax Portal, <strong>{{ response.fullName }}</strong>.
    Your account has been created and your TIN has been issued.
  </p>

  <!-- TIN Certificate Preview -->
  <div class="tin-card">

      <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
      <span>Government of Bangladesh — NBR</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tin-card-body">
      <span class="tin-label">Tax Identification Number (TIN)</span>
      <span class="tin-number">{{ response.tinNumber }}</span>
      <div class="tin-meta">
        <span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ response.fullName }}</span>
        <span><i class="bi bi-tag-fill"></i> {{ response.accountCategory }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="tin-card-footer">
      Keep this number safe. You will need it for all tax filings.
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Next steps -->

    <p class="ns-title"><i class="bi bi-map-fill"></i> Your Next Steps</p>

        <span class="ns-num">1</span>
        <div>
          <strong>Log In</strong>
          <p>Use your email and password to access your portal dashboard.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ns-item">
        <span class="ns-num">2</span>
        <div>
          <strong>Complete Your Profile</strong>
          <p>Add your address and complete taxpayer details for accurate filings.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ns-item">
        <span class="ns-num">3</span>
        <div>
          <strong>File Your Returns</strong>
          <p>Submit VAT or income tax returns directly from your dashboard.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <button class="btn-go-login" (click)="goToLogin()">
    <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-in-right"></i> Go to Login
  </button>

</div>

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/components/refund-status-badge/refund-status-badge.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core';
import { RefundStatus } from 'src/app/models/refund.model';


interface BadgeConfig {
  label: string;
  cssClass: string;
  icon: string;
}

@Component({
  selector: 'app-refund-status-badge',
  templateUrl: './refund-status-badge.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./refund-status-badge.component.css'],
})
export class RefundStatusBadgeComponent {
  @Input() status!: RefundStatus;
  @Input() size: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' = 'md';

  readonly badgeMap: Record<RefundStatus, BadgeConfig> = {
    DRAFT:               { label: 'Draft',               cssClass: 'badge-draft',       icon: 'bi bi-pencil' },
    SUBMITTED:           { label: 'Submitted',           cssClass: 'badge-submitted',   icon: 'bi bi-send' },
    UNDER_VERIFICATION:  { label: 'Under Verification',  cssClass: 'badge-verify',      icon: 'bi bi-search' },
    INFO_REQUESTED:      { label: 'Info Requested',      cssClass: 'badge-info-req',    icon: 'bi bi-exclamation-triangle' },
    RESPONSE_RECEIVED:   { label: 'Response Received',   cssClass: 'badge-response',    icon: 'bi bi-reply' },
    RECOMMENDED:         { label: 'Recommended',         cssClass: 'badge-recommended', icon: 'bi bi-hand-thumbs-up' },
    SUPERVISOR_REVIEW:   { label: 'Supervisor Review',   cssClass: 'badge-supervisor',  icon: 'bi bi-person-check' },
    APPROVED:            { label: 'Approved',            cssClass: 'badge-approved',    icon: 'bi bi-check-circle' },
    REJECTED:            { label: 'Rejected',            cssClass: 'badge-rejected',    icon: 'bi bi-x-circle' },
    PAYMENT_PENDING:     { label: 'Payment Pending',     cssClass: 'badge-pay-pending', icon: 'bi bi-clock' },
    PAYMENT_PROCESSING:  { label: 'Processing',          cssClass: 'badge-processing',  icon: 'bi bi-arrow-repeat' },
    PAID:                { label: 'Paid',                cssClass: 'badge-paid',        icon: 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' },
    FAILED:              { label: 'Failed',              cssClass: 'badge-failed',      icon: 'bi bi-x-octagon' },
    CANCELLED:           { label: 'Cancelled',           cssClass: 'badge-cancelled',   icon: 'bi bi-slash-circle' },
    CLOSED:              { label: 'Closed',              cssClass: 'badge-closed',      icon: 'bi bi-archive' },
  };

  get config(): BadgeConfig {
    return this.badgeMap[this.status] ?? { label: this.status, cssClass: 'badge-secondary', icon: 'bi bi-question' };
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/components/refund-status-timeline/refund-status-timeline.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core';
import { RefundStatusHistory } from 'src/app/models/refund.model';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-refund-status-timeline',
  templateUrl: './refund-status-timeline.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./refund-status-timeline.component.css'],
})
export class RefundStatusTimelineComponent {
  @Input() history: RefundStatusHistory[] = [];

  iconMap: Record<string, string> = {
    DRAFT:              'bi bi-pencil-square',
    SUBMITTED:          'bi bi-send-check',
    UNDER_VERIFICATION: 'bi bi-search',
    INFO_REQUESTED:     'bi bi-question-circle',
    RESPONSE_RECEIVED:  'bi bi-reply-fill',
    RECOMMENDED:        'bi bi-hand-thumbs-up',
    SUPERVISOR_REVIEW:  'bi bi-person-check',
    APPROVED:           'bi bi-check-circle',
    REJECTED:           'bi bi-x-circle',
    PAYMENT_PENDING:    'bi bi-hourglass',
    PAYMENT_PROCESSING: 'bi bi-arrow-repeat',
    PAID:               'bi bi-check-circle-fill',
    FAILED:             'bi bi-x-octagon',
    CANCELLED:          'bi bi-slash-circle',
    CLOSED:             'bi bi-archive-fill',
  };

  colorMap: Record<string, string> = {
    DRAFT:              'timeline-neutral',
    SUBMITTED:          'timeline-blue',
    UNDER_VERIFICATION: 'timeline-purple',
    INFO_REQUESTED:     'timeline-amber',
    RESPONSE_RECEIVED:  'timeline-amber',
    RECOMMENDED:        'timeline-teal',
    SUPERVISOR_REVIEW:  'timeline-purple',
    APPROVED:           'timeline-green',
    REJECTED:           'timeline-red',
    PAYMENT_PENDING:    'timeline-teal',
    PAYMENT_PROCESSING: 'timeline-blue',
    PAID:               'timeline-green',
    FAILED:             'timeline-red',
    CANCELLED:          'timeline-neutral',
    CLOSED:             'timeline-green',
  };

  getIcon(status: string): string {
    return this.iconMap[status] ?? 'bi bi-circle';
  }

  getColor(status: string): string {
    return this.colorMap[status] ?? 'timeline-neutral';
  }

  trackByHistoryId(_: number, item: RefundStatusHistory): number {
    return item.id;
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-list/refund-list.component.css
```css
.page-title { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; }

/* Summary cards */
.summary-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8e6e1;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  transition: box-shadow .15s;
}
.summary-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08); }

.summary-icon {
  width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 10px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.25rem; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.summary-icon--blue  { background: #e6f1fb; color: #0c447c; }
.summary-icon--green { background: #eaf3de; color: #27500a; }
.summary-icon--teal  { background: #e1f5ee; color: #085041; }
.summary-icon--amber { background: #faeeda; color: #633806; }

.summary-label { font-size: 0.72rem; color: #6c757d; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px; }
.summary-value { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; margin-top: 2px; }
.summary-sub   { font-size: 0.72rem; color: #9e9d98; margin-top: 2px; }

/* Table */
.ref-link {
  color: #185fa5; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.83rem;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.ref-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.type-badge {
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 9px;
  border-radius: 10px; background: #f1efe8; color: #444441;
  border: 1px solid #dcdbd5;
}

.table-warning-light { background: rgba(250,238,218,.2) !important; }
.table-danger-light  { background: rgba(252,235,235,.2) !important; }

.table thead th {
  font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: #6c757d; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e8e6e1;
}

.table td { font-size: 0.83rem; }

.card-footer { border-top: 1px solid #e8e6e1; }
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-list/refund-list.component.html
```html
<div class="container-fluid py-4 px-4">

  <!-- Page Header -->
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
      <h4 class="page-title mb-1">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise me-2 text-primary"></i>
        My Refund Applications
      </h4>
      <p class="text-muted mb-0 small">Track and manage your tax refund applications</p>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="navigateToCreate()">
      <i class="bi bi-plus-lg me-1"></i> New Refund Application
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Summary Cards -->
  <div class="row g-3 mb-4">
    <div class="col-xl-3 col-md-6">
      <div class="summary-card">
        <div class="summary-icon summary-icon--blue">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-body">
          <div class="summary-label">Total Claimed</div>
          <div class="summary-value">{{ formatCurrency(totalClaimed) }}</div>
          <div class="summary-sub">{{ totalElements }} applications</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col-xl-3 col-md-6">
      <div class="summary-card">
        <div class="summary-icon summary-icon--green">
          <i class="bi bi-check2-circle"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-body">
          <div class="summary-label">Approved</div>
          <div class="summary-value text-success">{{ formatCurrency(totalApproved) }}</div>
          <div class="summary-sub">Approved amount</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col-xl-3 col-md-6">
      <div class="summary-card">
        <div class="summary-icon summary-icon--teal">
          <i class="bi bi-bank"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-body">
          <div class="summary-label">Paid / Disbursed</div>
          <div class="summary-value" style="color:#0f6e56">{{ formatCurrency(totalPaid) }}</div>
          <div class="summary-sub">Received in account</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col-xl-3 col-md-6">
      <div class="summary-card">
        <div class="summary-icon summary-icon--amber">
          <i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-body">
          <div class="summary-label">Pending</div>
          <div class="summary-value text-warning">{{ totalPending }}</div>
          <div class="summary-sub">Awaiting action</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Filters -->
  <div class="card border-0 shadow-sm mb-3">
    <div class="card-body py-3">
      <div class="row g-2 align-items-end">
        <div class="col-md-3">
          <label class="form-label form-label-sm mb-1">Status</label>
          <select class="form-select form-select-sm" [(ngModel)]="selectedStatus">
            <option value="">All Statuses</option>
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s | titlecase }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
          <label class="form-label form-label-sm mb-1">Refund Type</label>
          <select class="form-select form-select-sm" [(ngModel)]="selectedType">
            <option value="">All Types</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of refundTypes" [value]="t.value">{{ t.label }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3">
          <label class="form-label form-label-sm mb-1">Page Size</label>
          <select class="form-select form-select-sm" [(ngModel)]="pageSize" (change)="applyFilters()">
            <option [value]="10">10 per page</option>
            <option [value]="25">25 per page</option>
            <option [value]="50">50 per page</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm w-100" (click)="applyFilters()">
            <i class="bi bi-search me-1"></i> Search
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="clearFilters()" title="Clear filters">
            <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div *ngIf="loading" class="text-center py-5">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
      <span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span>
    </div>
    <p class="text-muted mt-2 small">Loading refund applications…</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Error -->
  <div *ngIf="!loading && errorMessage" class="alert alert-danger d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
    {{ errorMessage }}
  </div>

  <!-- Table -->
  <div *ngIf="!loading && !errorMessage" class="card border-0 shadow-sm">
    <div class="table-responsive">
      <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0" aria-label="Refund applications list">
        <thead class="table-light">
          <tr>
            <th scope="col">Reference No.</th>
            <th scope="col">Type</th>
            <th scope="col">Fiscal Year</th>
            <th scope="col" class="text-end">Claimed</th>
            <th scope="col" class="text-end">Approved</th>
            <th scope="col">Status</th>
            <th scope="col">Submitted</th>
            <th scope="col" class="text-center">Actions</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr *ngIf="refunds.length === 0">
            <td colspan="8" class="text-center py-5 text-muted">
              <i class="bi bi-inbox fs-2 d-block mb-2"></i>
              No refund applications found.
              <a class="d-block mt-1 small" (click)="navigateToCreate()" style="cursor:pointer">
                Create your first application →
              </a>
            </td>
          </tr>

          <tr
            *ngFor="let r of refunds"
            [class.table-warning-light]="r.status === 'INFO_REQUESTED'"
            [class.table-danger-light]="r.status === 'FAILED'"
          >
            <td>
              <a
                class="ref-link fw-semibold"
                (click)="navigateToView(r.id)"
                role="button"
                [attr.aria-label]="'View refund ' + r.refundReferenceNo"
              >
                {{ r.refundReferenceNo }}
              </a>
              <div *ngIf="r.isFlaggedForAudit" class="small text-danger mt-1">
                <i class="bi bi-flag-fill me-1"></i>Audit Flagged
              </div>
            </td>
            <td>
              <span class="type-badge">{{ refundTypeLabels[r.refundType] }}</span>
            </td>
            <td class="text-muted small">{{ r.fiscalYearName }}</td>
            <td class="text-end fw-semibold">{{ formatCurrency(r.claimedRefundAmount) }}</td>
            <td class="text-end">
              <span *ngIf="r.approvedRefundAmount" class="text-success fw-semibold">
                {{ formatCurrency(r.approvedRefundAmount) }}
              </span>
              <span *ngIf="!r.approvedRefundAmount" class="text-muted">—</span>
            </td>
            <td>
              <app-refund-status-badge [status]="r.status" size="sm"></app-refund-status-badge>
            </td>
            <td class="text-muted small">
              {{ r.submittedAt ? (r.submittedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy') : '—' }}
            </td>
            <td class="text-center">
              <div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" [attr.aria-label]="'Actions for ' + r.refundReferenceNo">
                <button
                  class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"
                  (click)="navigateToView(r.id)"
                  title="View Details"
                >
                  <i class="bi bi-eye"></i>
                </button>
                <button
                  *ngIf="canRespond(r)"
                  class="btn btn-warning btn-sm"
                  (click)="navigateToRespond(r.id)"
                  title="Respond to Information Request"
                >
                  <i class="bi bi-reply"></i>
                </button>
                <button
                  *ngIf="canEdit(r)"
                  class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"
                  (click)="navigateToEdit(r.id)"
                  title="Edit Draft"
                >
                  <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i>
                </button>
                <button
                  *ngIf="canCancel(r)"
                  class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm"
                  (click)="cancelRefund(r.id)"
                  title="Cancel"
                >
                  <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
                </button>
              </div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <!-- Pagination -->
    <div class="card-footer d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center bg-white py-2">
      <small class="text-muted">
        Showing {{ refunds.length }} of {{ totalElements }} records
      </small>
      <nav *ngIf="totalPages > 1" aria-label="Refund list pagination">
        <ul class="pagination pagination-sm mb-0">
          <li class="page-item" [class.disabled]="currentPage === 0">
            <button class="page-link" (click)="goToPage(currentPage - 1)" aria-label="Previous">
              <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i>
            </button>
          </li>
          <li
            *ngFor="let p of pages"
            class="page-item"
            [class.active]="p === currentPage"
          >
            <button class="page-link" (click)="goToPage(p)">{{ p + 1 }}</button>
          </li>
          <li class="page-item" [class.disabled]="currentPage === totalPages - 1">
            <button class="page-link" (click)="goToPage(currentPage + 1)" aria-label="Next">
              <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
            </button>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </nav>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-respond/refund-respond.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { RefundDetail } from 'src/app/models/refund.model';
import { RefundService } from '../../services/refund.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-refund-respond',
  templateUrl: './refund-respond.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./refund-respond.component.css'],
})
export class RefundRespondComponent implements OnInit {
  refund: RefundDetail | null = null;
  loading    = true;
  submitting = false;
  errorMsg   = '';
  successMsg = '';

  responseText   = '';
  uploadedFiles: { file: File; type: string; name: string; size: string }[] = [];
  selectedDocType = 'BANK_STATEMENT';
  uploadError     = '';

  readonly documentTypes = [
    { value: 'BANK_STATEMENT',     label: 'Bank Statement'     },
    { value: 'CHALLAN_COPY',       label: 'Challan Copy'       },
    { value: 'ITR_ACKNOWLEDGMENT', label: 'ITR Acknowledgment' },
    { value: 'COURT_ORDER',        label: 'Court Order'        },
    { value: 'OTHER',              label: 'Other'              },
  ];

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private refundService: RefundService
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    const id = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));
    this.refundService.getById(id).subscribe({
      next: (r) => {
        if (r.status !== 'INFO_REQUESTED') {
          this.router.navigate(['/refunds', id, 'view']);
          return;
        }
        this.refund = r;
        this.loading = false;
      },
      error: () => { this.errorMsg = 'Could not load refund.'; this.loading = false; },
    });
  }

  onFileSelect(event: Event): void {
    const input = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
    if (!input.files?.length) return;
    const file = input.files[0];
    if (file.size > 20 * 1024 * 1024) { this.uploadError = 'Max 20 MB.'; return; }
    this.uploadError = '';
    this.uploadedFiles.push({
      file, type: this.selectedDocType,
      name: file.name, size: this.formatFileSize(file.size),
    });
    input.value = '';
  }

  removeFile(i: number): void { this.uploadedFiles.splice(i, 1); }

  formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
    return bytes > 1048576
      ? (bytes / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB'
      : (bytes / 1024).toFixed(0) + ' KB';
  }

  getDocTypeLabel(v: string): string {
    return this.documentTypes.find(d => d.value === v)?.label ?? v;
  }

  get canSubmit(): boolean {
    return this.responseText.trim().length >= 10;
  }

  submit(): void {
    if (!this.canSubmit) return;
    this.submitting = true;
    this.errorMsg   = '';

    this.refundService.respond(this.refund!.id, { responseText: this.responseText }).subscribe({
      next: () => {
        this.uploadDocsThenRedirect(0);
      },
      error: () => {
        this.submitting = false;
        this.errorMsg = 'Failed to submit response. Please try again.';
      },
    });
  }

  private uploadDocsThenRedirect(idx: number): void {
    if (idx >= this.uploadedFiles.length) {
      this.router.navigate(['/refunds', this.refund!.id, 'view']);
      return;
    }
    const f = this.uploadedFiles[idx];
    this.refundService.uploadDocument(this.refund!.id, f.file, f.type).subscribe({
      next: () => this.uploadDocsThenRedirect(idx + 1),
      error: () => this.uploadDocsThenRedirect(idx + 1),
    });
  }

  cancel(): void { this.router.navigate(['/refunds', this.refund?.id, 'view']); }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-success/refund-success.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { RefundDetail } from 'src/app/models/refund.model';
import { RefundService } from '../../services/refund.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-refund-success',
  templateUrl: './refund-success.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./refund-success.component.css'],
})
export class RefundSuccessComponent implements OnInit {
  refund: RefundDetail | null = null;
  loading = true;

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private refundService: RefundService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    const id = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));
    this.refundService.getById(id).subscribe({
      next: (r) => {
        this.refund = r;
        this.loading = false;
      },
      error: () => {
        this.loading = false;
      },
    });
  }

  goToList(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/refunds']);
  }
  goToView(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/refunds', this.refund?.id, 'view']);
  }
  goToCreate(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/refunds/create']);
  }

  formatCurrency(v: number | null): string {
    if (v == null) return '—';
    return '৳ ' + v.toLocaleString('en-BD');
  }
}
```

@NgModule({

  exports: [RefundStatusBadgeComponent, RefundStatusTimelineComponent],
})
export class RefundModule {}

export interface KpiSummary {
