## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-create/refund-create.component.css
```css
/* ================================================================
   refund-create.component.css

   Wizard-specific styles only.
   Base styles (page-header, btn-*, form-input, form-section,
   section-header, section-icon, form-grid, form-actions etc.)
   come from global-styles.css.
   ================================================================ */

/* ── Stepper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.stepper-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 0;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  padding-bottom: 4px;
}

.stepper-item {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  min-width: 72px;
}

.stepper-circle {
  width: 32px; height: 32px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;
  background: var(--bg-input, #f1f5f9);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  border: 2px solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all .2s;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.stepper-item.active .stepper-circle {
  background: var(--bg-card, #fff);
  border-color: var(--primary, #0d6efd);
  color: var(--primary, #0d6efd);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(13,110,253,.1);
}

.stepper-item.completed .stepper-circle {
  background: var(--success, #198754);
  border-color: var(--success, #198754);
  color: #fff;
}

.stepper-label {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  margin-top: 6px;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.3;
  max-width: 72px;
}
.stepper-item.active    .stepper-label { color: var(--primary, #0d6efd); font-weight: 600; }
.stepper-item.completed .stepper-label { color: var(--success, #198754); }

.stepper-connector {
  position: absolute;
  top: 16px;
  left: calc(50% + 16px);
  right: calc(-50% + 16px);
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  z-index: 0;
}
.stepper-item.completed .stepper-connector { background: var(--success, #198754); }

/* ── Wizard Card ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.wizard-card {
  background: var(--bg-card, #fff);
  border: var(--border-width, 1px) solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 12px);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card, 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06));
  overflow: hidden;
}

.wizard-card-header {
  padding: 14px 20px;
  background: var(--bg-subtle, #f8fafc);
  border-bottom: var(--border-width, 1px) solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.wizard-card-body { padding: 20px; }

.wizard-card-footer {
  padding: 12px 20px;
  background: var(--bg-subtle, #f8fafc);
  border-top: var(--border-width, 1px) solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

/* ── Refund type cards ───────────────────────────────────────── */

.type-card {
  position: relative;
  padding: 16px 14px 14px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 10px);
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color .15s, background .15s;
  background: var(--bg-card, #fff);
  height: 100%;
  user-select: none;
}
.type-card:hover         { border-color: var(--primary, #0d6efd); background: #f0f5ff; }
.type-card--selected     { border-color: var(--primary, #0d6efd); background: #eef3ff; }

.type-card-icon {
  width: 42px; height: 42px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  margin: 0 auto 10px;
}
/* Icon colour tokens */
.type-blue   { background: #e6f1fb; color: #0c447c; }
.type-teal   { background: #e1f5ee; color: #085041; }
.type-purple { background: #eeedfe; color: #3c3489; }
.type-amber  { background: #faeeda; color: #633806; }
.type-indigo { background: #ede9fe; color: #4c1d95; }
.type-gray   { background: var(--bg-subtle, #f1f5f9); color: var(--text-muted); }

.type-card-label { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); }
.type-card-desc  { font-size: 0.70rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; line-height: 1.4; }
.type-card-check { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--success, #198754); }

/* ── Source records table ────────────────────────────────────── */

.source-table th          { font-size: 0.73rem; }
.source-table td          { font-size: 0.82rem; }
.source-row--selected td  { background: rgba(13,110,253,.05) !important; }

/* ── Calculation box ─────────────────────────────────────────── */

.calc-box {
  background: #f0f9f0;
  border: 1px solid #a3c97a;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 10px);
  padding: 16px;
}
.calc-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 4px 0;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}
.calc-divider   { border-top: 1px solid #a3c97a; margin: 10px 0; }
.calc-total-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding-top: 4px;
}

/* ── Optional MFS section ───────────────────────────────────── */

.optional-section {
  border: 1px dashed var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 8px);
  padding: 14px;
  background: var(--bg-subtle, #f8fafc);
}
.optional-section-title { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* ── Uploaded file item ─────────────────────────────────────── */

.uploaded-file-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  background: var(--bg-subtle, #f8fafc);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 8px);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

/* ── Review section ─────────────────────────────────────────── */

.review-section {
  background: var(--bg-subtle, #f8fafc);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 10px);
  padding: 14px;
  height: 100%;
}
.review-section-title {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .4px;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.review-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  padding: 5px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default, #e2e8f0);
}
.review-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

/* ── Declaration box ────────────────────────────────────────── */

.declaration-box {
  background: #fffbeb;
  border: 1px solid #fde68a;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 8px);
  padding: 14px;
}

/* ── Error / info alerts inside wizard ─────────────────────── */

.sources-error-box {
  background: #fff5f5;
  border: 1px solid var(--danger-soft, #fca5a5);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 8px);
  padding: 12px 16px;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--danger, #dc2626);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

/* ── Step 0: Officer taxpayer banner ──────────────────────────── */
.officer-taxpayer-banner {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  background: #eef3ff;
  border: 1px solid #c7d8ff;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md, 10px);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

/* ── Step 0: Taxpayer confirm card ────────────────────────────── */
.taxpayer-confirm-card {
  border: 1.5px solid var(--success, #198754);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 12px);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.taxpayer-confirm-header {
  padding: 10px 16px;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--success, #198754);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
}
.taxpayer-confirm-body { padding: 14px 16px; }
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-edit/refund-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="container-fluid py-4 px-4">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
      <button class="btn btn-link btn-sm text-muted ps-0 mb-1" (click)="cancel()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Details
      </button>
      <h4 class="page-title mb-0">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil-square me-2 text-warning"></i>
        Edit Draft — {{ refund?.refundReferenceNo }}
      </h4>
      <p class="text-muted mb-0 small">Only DRAFT applications can be edited.</p>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="cancel()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div *ngIf="loading" class="text-center py-5">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
    <p class="text-muted mt-2 small">Loading draft…</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Error -->
  <div *ngIf="errorMsg" class="alert alert-danger d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-3">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
  </div>

  <div *ngIf="!loading">

    <!-- Stepper -->
    <div class="stepper-wrapper mb-4">
      <div
        *ngFor="let label of stepLabels; let i = index"
        class="stepper-item"
        [class.completed]="currentStep > i + 1"
        [class.active]="currentStep === i + 1"
      >
        <div class="stepper-circle" (click)="goToStep(i + 1)">
          <i *ngIf="currentStep > i + 1" class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
          <span *ngIf="currentStep <= i + 1">{{ i + 1 }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stepper-label">{{ label }}</div>
        <div class="stepper-connector" *ngIf="i < stepLabels.length - 1"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 1: TYPE -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 1">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-list-check me-2"></i>Step 1 — Refund Type</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6" *ngFor="let t of refundTypeOptions">
            <div
              class="type-card"
              [class.type-card--selected]="selectedRefundType === t.value"
              (click)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
              role="button" tabindex="0"
              (keydown.enter)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
            >
              <div class="type-card-icon" [ngClass]="t.color">
                <i [class]="t.icon" aria-hidden="true"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="type-card-label">{{ t.label }}</div>
              <div class="type-card-check" *ngIf="selectedRefundType === t.value">
                <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <div></div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()" [disabled]="saving">
            <span *ngIf="saving" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>Save Draft
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!selectedRefundType">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 2: SOURCES -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 2">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-database me-2"></i>Step 2 — Source Records</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div *ngIf="loadingSources" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
          <span class="ms-2 small">Loading…</span>
        </div>
        <div class="table-responsive" *ngIf="!loadingSources">
          <table class="table table-hover align-middle small source-table">
            <thead class="table-light">
              <tr>
                <th style="width:40px"></th>
                <th>Reference</th><th>Period</th>
                <th class="text-end">Tax Paid</th>
                <th class="text-end">Liability</th>
                <th class="text-end text-success">Excess</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr *ngFor="let s of eligibleSources"
                [class.source-row--selected]="isSourceSelected(s.id)"
                (click)="toggleSource(s.id)" style="cursor:pointer">
                <td>
                  <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input"
                    [checked]="isSourceSelected(s.id)" (change)="toggleSource(s.id)">
                </td>
                <td class="fw-semibold">{{ s.reference }}</td>
                <td class="text-muted">{{ s.periodLabel }}</td>
                <td class="text-end">{{ formatCurrency(s.taxPaid) }}</td>
                <td class="text-end">{{ formatCurrency(s.taxLiability) }}</td>
                <td class="text-end fw-semibold text-success">{{ formatCurrency(s.excessAmount) }}</td>
              </tr>
              <tr *ngIf="eligibleSources.length === 0 && !loadingSources">
                <td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted py-3 small">No eligible source records found.</td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="selectedSourceIds.size === 0">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 3: CALCULATION -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 3">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-calculator me-2"></i>Step 3 — Calculation</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div *ngIf="!calculation" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="calculation">
          <div class="calc-box mb-3">
            <div class="calc-row"><span>Total Tax Paid</span><span>{{ formatCurrency(calculation.totalTaxPaid) }}</span></div>
            <div class="calc-row"><span>Total Tax Liability</span><span>{{ formatCurrency(calculation.totalTaxLiability) }}</span></div>
            <div class="calc-row"><span>Previously Claimed</span><span>{{ formatCurrency(calculation.previouslyClaimed) }}</span></div>
            <div class="calc-divider"></div>
            <div class="calc-total-row">
              <span class="fw-semibold">Max Eligible Refund</span>
              <span class="text-success fw-bold fs-5">{{ formatCurrency(calculation.eligibleRefundAmount) }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-5">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Requested Amount <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <div class="input-group input-group-sm">
                <span class="input-group-text">৳</span>
                <input type="number" class="form-control" [(ngModel)]="requestedAmount"
                  [max]="calculation.eligibleRefundAmount" min="1"
                  [class.is-invalid]="amountExceedsEligible">
              </div>
              <div *ngIf="amountExceedsEligible" class="text-danger small mt-1">
                Cannot exceed {{ formatCurrency(calculation.eligibleRefundAmount) }}.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!canProceed()">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 4: BANK -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 4">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-bank2 me-2"></i>Step 4 — Bank Information</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <form [formGroup]="bankForm" novalidate>
          <div class="row g-3">
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Bank Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankName" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankName')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Branch Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankBranch" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankBranch')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-12">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Account Holder Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountHolderName" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountHolderName')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Account Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountNumber" type="password" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountNumber')" placeholder="13 digits" maxlength="13">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 13-digit account number required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Routing Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="routingNumber" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('routingNumber')" placeholder="9 digits" maxlength="9">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 9-digit routing number required.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-3">
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"
              (click)="validateBank()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || bankValidating">
              <span *ngIf="bankValidating" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
              <i *ngIf="!bankValidating" class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>
              {{ bankValidating ? 'Validating…' : 'Validate Account' }}
            </button>
            <span *ngIf="bankValidated" class="ms-2 text-success small fw-semibold">
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>Validated
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="bankError" class="ms-2 text-danger small">{{ bankError }}</span>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || !bankValidated">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 5: DOCUMENTS -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 5">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-paperclip me-2"></i>Step 5 — Documents</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">

        <!-- Existing docs -->
        <div *ngIf="existingDocuments.length > 0" class="mb-3">
          <div class="small fw-semibold text-muted mb-2">Previously Uploaded</div>
          <div class="uploaded-file-item" *ngFor="let d of existingDocuments">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5"></i>
            <div class="flex-grow-1">
              <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ d.name }}</div>
              <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">{{ getDocTypeLabel(d.type) }}</div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm py-0 px-2" (click)="removeExistingDoc(d.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- New upload -->
        <div class="row g-2 align-items-end mb-2">
          <div class="col-md-5">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Document Type</label>
            <select class="form-select form-select-sm" [(ngModel)]="selectedDocType">
              <option *ngFor="let d of documentTypes" [value]="d.value">
                {{ d.label }}{{ d.required ? ' *' : '' }}
              </option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-5">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Choose File</label>
            <input type="file" class="form-control form-control-sm"
              (change)="onFileSelect($event)" accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="uploadError" class="alert alert-danger py-2 small">{{ uploadError }}</div>

        <div *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index" class="uploaded-file-item">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5"></i>
          <div class="flex-grow-1">
            <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ f.name }}</div>
            <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">{{ getDocTypeLabel(f.type) }} · {{ f.size }}</div>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm py-0 px-2" (click)="removeNewFile(i)">
            <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
          </button>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="!hasRequiredDocuments()" class="alert alert-warning py-2 small mt-2">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>Bank Statement is required.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!hasRequiredDocuments()">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 6: REVIEW -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 6">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check me-2"></i>Step 6 — Review &amp; Submit</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div class="row g-3 mb-3">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title">Application</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Refund Type</span><span class="fw-semibold">{{ selectedRefundType }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Sources Selected</span><span>{{ selectedSourceIds.size }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Requested</span><span class="fw-bold text-success">{{ formatCurrency(requestedAmount) }}</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title">Bank</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Bank</span><span>{{ bankForm.value.bankName }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Account</span><span>████ {{ bankForm.value.accountNumber?.slice(-4) }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Validated</span><span class="text-success"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>Yes</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="declaration-box">
          <div class="form-check">
            <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="decl" [(ngModel)]="declarationAgreed">
            <label class="form-check-label small" for="decl">
              I declare that all information provided is true, accurate, and complete. I understand that false
              information may result in penalties under applicable tax laws.
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-success btn-sm" (click)="submitRefund()"
            [disabled]="!declarationAgreed || submitting">
            <span *ngIf="submitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!submitting" class="bi bi-send me-1"></i>
            {{ submitting ? 'Submitting…' : 'Submit Application' }}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /!loading -->
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-view/refund-view.component.css
```css
.page-title { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; }

/* ─── Status Banner ─────────────────────────────── */
.status-banner {
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #e2e0d8;
}
.status-banner--info    { background: #fff8e1; border-color: #ffe082; }
.status-banner--success { background: #f0f9f0; border-color: #a3c97a; }
.status-banner--danger  { background: #fff5f5; border-color: #f09595; }

/* ─── Detail Card ───────────────────────────────── */
.detail-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8e6e1;
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.detail-card-header {
  padding: 12px 16px;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e6e1;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a1a1a;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.detail-card-body { padding: 16px; }

/* ─── Detail Grid ───────────────────────────────── */
.detail-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 12px;
}

@media (max-width: 576px) {
  .detail-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

.detail-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
.detail-label { font-size: 0.70rem; color: #6c757d; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px; }
.detail-value { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #1a1a1a; }

/* ─── Document item ─────────────────────────────── */
.doc-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 8px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1efe8;
}
.doc-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

/* ─── Table tweaks ──────────────────────────────── */
.table th { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; color: #6c757d;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px; }
.table td { font-size: 0.82rem; }
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/services/refund.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient, HttpParams } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { RefundFilterRequest, PagedResponse, RefundSummary, RefundDetail, CreateRefundRequest, RespondRequest, RefundStatusHistory, EligibleSourceRecord, RefundCalculation, BankDetails, RefundDocument } from 'src/app/models/refund.model';


@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class RefundService {
  constructor(private http: HttpClient) {}

  // ── Taxpayer/Officer my refunds ────────────────────────────────

  getMyRefunds(
    filter: RefundFilterRequest,
  ): Observable<PagedResponse<RefundSummary>> {
    let params = new HttpParams()
      .set('page', filter.page ?? 0)
      .set('size', filter.size ?? 10)
      .set('sortBy', filter.sortBy ?? 'submittedAt')
      .set('sortDir', filter.sortDir ?? 'DESC');
    if (filter.status) params = params.set('status', filter.status);
    if (filter.refundType) params = params.set('refundType', filter.refundType);
    if (filter.fiscalYearId)
      params = params.set('fiscalYearId', filter.fiscalYearId);
    return this.http.get<PagedResponse<RefundSummary>>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.MY,
      { params },
    );
  }

  getById(id: number): Observable<RefundDetail> {
    return this.http.get<RefundDetail>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.GET(id));
  }

  create(request: CreateRefundRequest): Observable<RefundDetail> {
    return this.http.post<RefundDetail>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.CREATE, request);
  }

  update(id: number, request: CreateRefundRequest): Observable<RefundDetail> {
    return this.http.put<RefundDetail>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.UPDATE(id),
      request,
    );
  }

  submit(id: number): Observable<RefundDetail> {
    return this.http.post<RefundDetail>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.SUBMIT(id), {});
  }

  cancel(id: number): Observable<void> {
    return this.http.delete<void>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.DELETE(id));
  }

  respond(id: number, req: RespondRequest): Observable<RefundDetail> {
    return this.http.post<RefundDetail>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.RESPOND(id), req);
  }

  updateStatus(id: number, req: any): Observable<RefundDetail> {
    return this.http.patch<RefundDetail>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.UPDATE_STATUS(id),
      req,
    );
  }

  getStatusHistory(id: number): Observable<RefundStatusHistory[]> {
    return this.http.get<RefundStatusHistory[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.STATUS_HISTORY(id),
    );
  }

  // ── Source eligibility
  // taxpayerId is optional:
  //   - Taxpayer role: omit → backend resolves from JWT
  //   - Officer role:  pass selected taxpayer's id as query param
  // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  getEligibleItrSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
  ): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]> {
    const params = taxpayerId
      ? new HttpParams().set('taxpayerId', taxpayerId)
      : undefined;
    return this.http.get<EligibleSourceRecord[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.SOURCES.ITR,
      { params },
    );
  }

  getEligibleAitSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
  ): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]> {
    const params = taxpayerId
      ? new HttpParams().set('taxpayerId', taxpayerId)
      : undefined;
    return this.http.get<EligibleSourceRecord[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.SOURCES.AIT,
      { params },
    );
  }

  getEligibleVatSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
  ): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]> {
    const params = taxpayerId
      ? new HttpParams().set('taxpayerId', taxpayerId)
      : undefined;
    return this.http.get<EligibleSourceRecord[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.SOURCES.VAT,
      { params },
    );
  }

  getEligiblePaymentSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
  ): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]> {
    const params = taxpayerId
      ? new HttpParams().set('taxpayerId', taxpayerId)
      : undefined;
    return this.http.get<EligibleSourceRecord[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.SOURCES.PAYMENTS,
      { params },
    );
  }

  calculateRefund(
    sourceType: string,
    sourceRecordIds: number[],
    taxpayerId?: number,
  ): Observable<RefundCalculation> {
    return this.http.post<RefundCalculation>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.CALCULATE, {
      sourceType,
      sourceRecordIds,
      taxpayerId,
    });
  }

  validateBankAccount(
    d: BankDetails,
  ): Observable<{ valid: boolean; message: string }> {
    return this.http.post<{ valid: boolean; message: string }>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.VALIDATE_BANK,
      d,
    );
  }

  // ── Documents ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

  uploadDocument(
    id: number,
    file: File,
    documentType: string,
  ): Observable<RefundDocument> {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('file', file);
    formData.append('documentType', documentType);
    return this.http.post<RefundDocument>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.DOCUMENTS.UPLOAD(id),
      formData,
    );
  }

  getDocumentDownloadUrl(
    refundId: number,
    docId: number,
  ): Observable<{ url: string }> {
    return this.http.get<{ url: string }>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.DOCUMENTS.GET(refundId, docId),
    );
  }

  deleteDocument(refundId: number, docId: number): Observable<void> {
    return this.http.delete<void>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.DOCUMENTS.DELETE(refundId, docId),
    );
  }

  // ── Queues ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  getOfficerQueue(): Observable<RefundSummary[]> {
    return this.http.get<RefundSummary[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.QUEUE.OFFICER);
  }
  getSupervisorQueue(): Observable<RefundSummary[]> {
    return this.http.get<RefundSummary[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.QUEUE.SUPERVISOR,
    );
  }
  getFinanceQueue(): Observable<RefundSummary[]> {
    return this.http.get<RefundSummary[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.REFUNDS.QUEUE.FINANCE);
  }

  getFiscalYears(): Observable<
    { id: number; name: string; isCurrent: boolean }[]
  > {
    return this.http.get<{ id: number; name: string; isCurrent: boolean }[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.FISCAL_YEARS.ACTIVE,
    );
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/roles/pages/roles-create/roles-create.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
import { Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { RoleService } from '../../service/role.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-roles-create',
  templateUrl: './roles-create.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./roles-create.component.css'],
})
export class RolesCreateComponent implements OnDestroy {

  isLoading = false;
  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  modules = [
    'Taxpayer Management', 'Business Registration', 'TIN Management',
    'VAT Registration', 'VAT Returns', 'Income Tax Returns', 'Payments',
    'Refund Management', 'Penalty & Fines', 'Audit Management',
    'Document Verification', 'Notices & Notifications', 'Tax Structure',
    'Taxable Products', 'Import Duty', 'AIT', 'Fiscal Years',
    'Reports & Analytics', 'User Management', 'Roles & Permissions',
    'Activity Logs', 'System Settings',
  ];

  form: any = {
    name:        '',
    code:        '',
    description: '',
    color:       '#1a3f8f',
    status:      'Active',
    permissions: {} as Record<string, {
      create: boolean; read: boolean; update: boolean;
      delete: boolean; export: boolean;
    }>,
  };

  constructor(
    private router:      Router,
    private toast:       ToastService,
    private roleService: RoleService,
  ) {
    this.modules.forEach((m) => {
      this.form.permissions[m] = {
        create: false, read: false, update: false,
        delete: false, export: false,
      };
    });
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  onRoleNameChange(): void {
    this.form.code = this.form.name
      .toUpperCase()
      .replace(/\s+/g, '_')
      .replace(/[^A-Z_]/g, '');
  }

  toggleAll(module: string, checked: boolean): void {
    const p = this.form.permissions[module];
    p.create = p.read = p.update = p.delete = p.export = checked;
  }

  isAllSelected(module: string): boolean {
    const p = this.form.permissions[module];
    return p.create && p.read && p.update && p.delete && p.export;
  }

  isSomeSelected(module: string): boolean {
    const p = this.form.permissions[module];
    const vals = [p.create, p.read, p.update, p.delete, p.export];
    return vals.some(Boolean) && !vals.every(Boolean);
  }

  selectAllModules(checked: boolean): void {
    this.modules.forEach((m) => this.toggleAll(m, checked));
  }

  get selectedPermCount(): number {
    return this.modules.reduce((sum, m) => {
      const p = this.form.permissions[m];
      return sum + [p.create, p.read, p.update, p.delete, p.export].filter(Boolean).length;
    }, 0);
  }

  isFormValid(): boolean {
    return !!(this.form.name && this.form.code);
  }

  onSubmit(): void {
    if (!this.isFormValid()) {
      this.toast.error('Role name is required.');
      return;
    }

    this.isLoading = true;

    // Convert permissions object to array, then JSON stringify for backend
    const permissionsArray = this.modules.map((m) => ({
      module: m,
      ...this.form.permissions[m],
    }));

    const payload = {
      name:        this.form.name,
      code:        this.form.code,
      description: this.form.description,
      color:       this.form.color,
      status:      this.form.status,
      permissions: JSON.stringify(permissionsArray),
    };

    this.roleService.create(payload)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
      .subscribe({
        next: () => {
          this.isLoading = false;
          this.toast.success(`Role "${this.form.name}" created successfully!`);
          this.router.navigate(['/roles']);
        },
        error: (err) => {
          this.isLoading = false;
          const message = err?.error?.message || 'Failed to create role.';
          this.toast.error(message);
        },
      });
  }

  onCancel(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/roles']);
  }
}
```

import { Component, OnDestroy, inject } from '@angular/core';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { Subject, timer } from 'rxjs';
import { takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-settings',
  templateUrl: './settings.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./settings.component.css'],
})
export class SettingsComponent implements OnDestroy {
  activeTab = 'general';
  isSaving = false;
  successMsg = '';
  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  general = {
    systemName: 'National VAT & Tax Management System',
    systemCode: 'NVTMS',
    organization: 'National Board of Revenue (NBR)',
    country: 'Bangladesh',
    timezone: 'Asia/Dhaka',
    currency: 'BDT (৳)',
    dateFormat: 'DD/MM/YYYY',
    language: 'English',
    maintenanceMode: false,
  };

  email = {
    smtpHost: 'smtp.nbr.gov.bd',
    smtpPort: 587,
    smtpUser: 'noreply@nbr.gov.bd',
    smtpPassword: '••••••••',
    senderName: 'NBR Tax System',
    senderEmail: 'noreply@nbr.gov.bd',
    enableSSL: true,
    enableNotifications: true,
  };

  security = {
    sessionTimeout: 30,
    maxLoginAttempts: 5,
    passwordMinLength: 8,
    requireTwoFactor: false,
    enableAuditLog: true,
    ipWhitelisting: false,
  };

  systemInfo = {
    version: 'v2.0.0',
    buildDate: '2026-03-01',
    environment: 'Production',
    dbVersion: 'MySQL 8.0.35',
    angularVer: '17.0.0',
    springVer: '3.2.0',
    javaVer: 'Java 17 LTS',
    lastBackup: '2026-04-01 03:00:00',
    uptime: '99.98%',
    totalUsers: 32,
  };

  constructor(private toast: ToastService) {}

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  tabs = [
    { id: 'general', label: 'General', icon: 'bi bi-sliders' },
    { id: 'email', label: 'Email', icon: 'bi bi-envelope-fill' },
    { id: 'security', label: 'Security', icon: 'bi bi-shield-fill-check' },
    { id: 'info', label: 'System Info', icon: 'bi bi-info-circle-fill' },
  ];

  onSave(): void {
    this.isSaving = true;
    timer(800).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(() => {
      this.isSaving = false;
      this.successMsg = 'Settings saved successfully!';
      this.toast.success('Settings saved successfully!');
      timer(3000).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
        .subscribe(() => (this.successMsg = ''));
    });
  }
}
