## File: src/app/features/tin-management/pages/tin-edit/tin-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit TIN</h4>
    <p>Update TIN record details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.taxpayerName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-tin">{{ form.tinNumber }}</span>
  </div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Name, category and identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.tinCategory">
            <option *ngFor="let c of tinCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">National ID</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.nid" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Passport No.</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-passport input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.passportNo" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Date of Birth</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dateOfBirth" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>

      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="isCompany">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Location & Tax Authority</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select division → district → tax zone → tax circle</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="selectedDivisionId" (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="null">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingDistricts" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.district" (ngModelChange)="onDistrictChange()"
            [disabled]="!selectedDivisionId || loadingDistricts">
            <option value="">Select District</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [value]="d.name">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Zone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingZones" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxZone" (ngModelChange)="onZoneChange()"
            [disabled]="!form.district || loadingZones">
            <option value="">Select Tax Zone</option>
            <option *ngFor="let z of taxZones" [value]="z.name">{{ z.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Circle</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-circle-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingCircles" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxCircle"
            [disabled]="!form.taxZone || loadingCircles">
            <option value="">Select Tax Circle</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of taxCircles" [value]="c.name">{{ c.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.phone" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Status & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Account status and optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update TIN</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-edit/user-edit.component.css
```css
/* All section icons use the single NBR blue brand colour. */
.section-icon {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3f8f, #2a5fd6);
}

.form-input.error-input {
  border-color: #e74c3c !important;
}

.field-error {
  display: block;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #e74c3c;
  margin-top: 4px;
  padding-left: 2px;
}

.edit-banner {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  background: #e8eef9;
  border-left: 4px solid #1a3f8f;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.banner-sub {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: monospace;
  color: #555;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/services/user.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from 'src/app/core/constants/api.constants';
import { User } from 'src/app/models/user.model';


@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class UserService {

  constructor(private http: HttpClient) {}

  getAll(): Observable<User[]> {
    return this.http.get<User[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.USERS.LIST);
  }

  getById(id: number): Observable<User> {
    return this.http.get<User>(API_ENDPOINTS.USERS.GET(id));
  }

  create(user: Partial<User>): Observable<User> {
    return this.http.post<User>(API_ENDPOINTS.USERS.CREATE, user);
  }

  update(id: number, user: Partial<User>): Observable<User> {
    return this.http.put<User>(API_ENDPOINTS.USERS.UPDATE(id), user);
  }

  delete(id: number): Observable<void> {
    return this.http.delete<void>(API_ENDPOINTS.USERS.DELETE(id));
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-edit/vat-registration-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit VAT Registration</h4>
    <p>Update VAT registration details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" type="button" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-success"></div>
</div>

<form [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" novalidate>
  <div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <!-- Edit Banner -->
    <div class="edit-banner">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
      Editing: <strong>{{ businessName }}</strong>
      <span class="banner-bin">{{ binNo }}</span>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Section 1: Business Identity ──────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon">
          <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Business Identity</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Basic business and VAT information</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="tinNumber"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('tinNumber')?.invalid && ctrl('tinNumber')?.touched" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Business Name</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="businessName"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('businessName')?.invalid && ctrl('businessName')?.touched" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Owner Name</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="ownerName" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">VAT Category</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="vatCategory"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('vatCategory')?.invalid && ctrl('vatCategory')?.touched">
              <option value="">Select Category</option>
              <option *ngFor="let c of vatCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Business Type</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="businessTypeId">
              <option [value]="null">Select Type</option>
              <option *ngFor="let t of businessTypes" [value]="t.id">{{ t.typeName }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Business Category</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="businessCategoryId">
              <option [value]="null">Select Category</option>
              <option *ngFor="let bc of businessCategories" [value]="bc.id">{{ bc.categoryName }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Trade License No.</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="tradeLicenseNo" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Status</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
              <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Section 2: VAT Authority & Dates ──────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon teal">
          <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">VAT Authority &amp; Dates</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">
            Zone and circle can be updated independently.
            Changing division updates the location fields only.
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <!--
          VAT Zone: NOT gated on districtId in edit mode.
          Zone is stored directly (zoneId column) and is independent
          of the division/district location fields here.
          The (change) handler loads circles for the selected zone.
        -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">VAT Zone</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select
              class="form-input form-select"
              formControlName="vatZoneId"
              (change)="onZoneChange()"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('vatZoneId')?.invalid && ctrl('vatZoneId')?.touched"
            >
              <option [value]="null">Select Zone</option>
              <option *ngFor="let z of vatZones" [value]="z.id">{{ z.name }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <span class="field-error-msg"
            *ngIf="ctrl('vatZoneId')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('vatZoneId')?.touched">
            VAT zone is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- VAT Circle: still gated on zone (requires a zone to be selected) -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">VAT Circle</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-circle-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select
              class="form-input form-select"
              formControlName="vatCircleId"
              [attr.disabled]="!ctrl('vatZoneId')?.value ? true : null"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('vatCircleId')?.invalid && ctrl('vatCircleId')?.touched"
            >
              <option [value]="null">{{ loadingCircles ? 'Loading circles…' : 'Select Circle' }}</option>
              <option *ngFor="let vc of vatCircles" [value]="vc.id">{{ vc.name }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <span class="field-error-msg"
            *ngIf="ctrl('vatCircleId')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('vatCircleId')?.touched">
            VAT circle is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Registration Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="registrationDate" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Effective Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="effectiveDate" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Expiry Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="expiryDate" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Annual Turnover (৳)</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="annualTurnover" min="0" />
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Section 3: Contact & Location ─────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon orange">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Contact &amp; Location</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Contact details and address</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Email</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="email" class="form-input" formControlName="email"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('email')?.invalid && ctrl('email')?.touched" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error-msg"
            *ngIf="ctrl('email')?.errors?.['email'] && ctrl('email')?.touched">
            Enter a valid email address.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="phone"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('phone')?.invalid && ctrl('phone')?.touched" />
          </div>
          <span class="field-error-msg"
            *ngIf="ctrl('phone')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('phone')?.touched">
            Phone is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!--
          Division: reactive cascade fires via setupCascadeListeners().
          No (change) handler — the valueChanges listener handles it.
        -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Division</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="divisionId">
              <option [value]="null">Select Division</option>
              <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [value]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!--
          District: populated by the reactive division cascade.
          Gated on divisionId being selected (no division → no districts to show).
          Does NOT gate zone selection — zone is independent in edit mode.
        -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">District</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select
              class="form-input form-select"
              formControlName="districtId"
              [attr.disabled]="!ctrl('divisionId')?.value ? true : null"
            >
              <option [value]="null">
                {{ loadingDistricts ? 'Loading districts…' : 'Select District' }}
              </option>
              <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [value]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label">Address</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
            <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" formControlName="address" rows="2"></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
            <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" formControlName="remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Form Actions ───────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isSaving || form.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update VAT Registration
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isSaving">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating…
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</form>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-list/vat-registration-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>VAT Registration</h4>
    <p>Manage all VAT registered businesses.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" (click)="navigateToCreate()"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Register VAT
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by BIN, business name, TIN, owner, category..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-success"></div>
    <span>Loading VAT registrations...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>BIN No</th>
          <th>Business</th>
          <th>VAT Category</th>
          <th>TIN</th>
          <th>VAT Zone</th>
          <th>VAT Circle</th>
          <th>Turnover</th>
          <th>Effective</th>
          <th>Expiry</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let v of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="bin-code">{{ v.binNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar vat-avatar">
                <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ v.businessName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ v.ownerName }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(v.vatCategory)">
              {{ v.vatCategory }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td><span class="code-sm">{{ v.tinNumber }}</span></td>

          <td><span class="zone-badge">{{ v.vatZone }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="circle-badge">{{ v.vatCircle }}</span></td>

          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(v.annualTurnover) }}</td>

          <td>{{ v.effectiveDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span [class]="isExpired(v.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-red' : 'expiry-normal'">
              {{ v.expiryDate || '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(v.status)">
              {{ v.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(v.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(v.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(v.id, v.businessName)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              <p>No VAT registrations found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let v of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar vat-avatar">
            <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ v.businessName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ v.binNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(v.status)">
          {{ v.status }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ v.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(v.vatCategory)">{{ v.vatCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>VAT Zone</label><span>{{ v.vatZone }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>VAT Circle</label><span>{{ v.vatCircle }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Turnover</label><span>{{ formatCurrency(v.annualTurnover) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>District</label><span>{{ v.district }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Expiry</label>
          <span [class]="isExpired(v.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-red' : ''">{{ v.expiryDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(v.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(v.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(v.id, v.businessName)"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i><p>No VAT registrations found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" (click)="navigateToCreate()">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete VAT Registration?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this VAT registration?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-view/vat-registration-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>VAT Registration Details</h4>
    <p>Full VAT registration information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" type="button" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" type="button" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
    <!-- Review button — only shown for Pending registrations -->
     <div *ngIf="vat?.status === 'Pending'">
    <button
      *canDo="'edit'"
      class="btn-review-action"
      type="button"
      (click)="onOpenReview()"
    >
      <i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check-fill"></i> Review Application
    </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-success"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && vat">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="vat-header-left">
      <div class="vat-icon"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="vat-bin">{{ vat.binNo }}</div>
        <div class="vat-name">{{ vat.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="vat-meta">
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(vat.vatCategory)">{{ vat.vatCategory }}</span>
          <span class="zone-pill">{{ vat.vatZone }}</span>
          <span class="circle-pill">{{ vat.vatCircle }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vat.status)">{{ vat.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="vat-header-right">
      <div class="vat-stat">
        <span class="vs-label">Annual Turnover</span>
        <span class="vs-value">{{ formatCurrency(vat.annualTurnover) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="vat-stat">
        <span class="vs-label">Effective Date</span>
        <span class="vs-value">{{ vat.effectiveDate || '—' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Pending review prompt strip -->
  <div class="review-prompt-strip" *ngIf="vat.status === 'Pending'">
    <div class="review-prompt-left">
      <i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i>
      <div>
        <strong>Awaiting officer review</strong>
        <span>This registration is pending your decision. Review and approve, request more information, or reject.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-review-action-sm" type="button" (click)="onOpenReview()">
      <i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check-fill"></i> Review Now
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <!-- Business Information -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>Business Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">BIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge green">{{ vat.binNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vat.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ vat.businessName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Owner Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.ownerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vat.businessType">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.businessType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vat.businessCategory">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.businessCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vat.tradeLicenseNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Trade License</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vat.tradeLicenseNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- VAT Registration Details -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
        <span>VAT Registration Details</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">VAT Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(vat.vatCategory)">{{ vat.vatCategory }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">VAT Zone</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="zone-pill">{{ vat.vatZone }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">VAT Circle</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="circle-pill">{{ vat.vatCircle }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Registration Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.registrationDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Effective Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.effectiveDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Expiry Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value" [class]="isExpired(vat.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-red' : ''">
            {{ vat.expiryDate || '—' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Annual Turnover</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold turnover">{{ formatCurrency(vat.annualTurnover) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Contact & Location -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
        <span>Contact &amp; Location</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vat.email">
          <span class="detail-label">Email</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.email }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Phone</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.phone }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Division</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.division }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">District</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vat.district }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vat.address">
          <span class="detail-label">Address</span>
          <span class="detail-value address-val">{{ vat.address }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Status & Remarks -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
        <span>Status &amp; Remarks</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vat.status)">{{ vat.status }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vat.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value" style="font-weight:400;color:var(--color-text-secondary)">
            {{ vat.remarks }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /details-grid -->

</ng-container>


<!-- ══ Officer Review Modal ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showReviewModal" (click)="onCloseReview()">
  <div class="modal-card review-decision-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">

    <!-- Top accent — colour driven by decision -->
    <div class="modal-accent"
      [class.accent-approve]="reviewDecision === 'Approve'"
      [class.accent-reject]="reviewDecision === 'Reject'"
      [class.accent-request]="reviewDecision === 'Request'">
    </div>

    <!-- Modal Header -->
    <div class="review-modal-hd">
      <div class="review-modal-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="modal-title" style="text-align:left;margin-bottom:2px;">Review Application</p>
        <p class="review-modal-sub">
          <span class="code-badge" *ngIf="vat">{{ vat.binNo }}</span>
          <span *ngIf="vat" style="margin-left:8px;">{{ vat.businessName }}</span>
        </p>
      </div>
      <span class="status-badge status-pending ms-auto" style="flex-shrink:0">Pending</span>
    </div>

    <!-- Decision Options -->
    <div class="review-decision-body">

      <p class="review-section-hd">Decision <span style="color:var(--color-danger)">*</span></p>

      <div class="review-decision-group">
        <div class="review-decision-opt"
          *ngFor="let opt of reviewOptions"
          [class.selected]="reviewDecision === opt.key"
          [class.variant-approve]="opt.variant === 'approve'"
          [class.variant-request]="opt.variant === 'request'"
          [class.variant-reject]="opt.variant === 'reject'"
          (click)="selectDecision(opt.key)">

          <div class="decision-icon" [class]="'decision-icon--' + opt.variant">
            <i class="bi bi-check-lg"         *ngIf="opt.variant === 'approve'"></i>
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left" *ngIf="opt.variant === 'request'"></i>
            <i class="bi bi-x-lg"             *ngIf="opt.variant === 'reject'"></i>
          </div>

          <div class="decision-text">
            <span class="decision-label">{{ opt.label }}</span>
            <span class="decision-sub">{{ opt.sub }}</span>
          </div>

          <!-- Selection indicator -->
          <div class="decision-check" *ngIf="reviewDecision === opt.key">
            <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Remarks -->
      <div class="review-remarks-wrap">
        <label class="review-remarks-label">
          Officer Remarks
          <span style="color:var(--color-danger)" *ngIf="reviewDecision === 'Reject'"> * (required for rejection)</span>
          <span class="optional" *ngIf="reviewDecision !== 'Reject'"> (optional)</span>
        </label>
        <textarea
          class="review-remarks-area"
          rows="3"
          [(ngModel)]="reviewRemarks"
          [placeholder]="reviewDecision === 'Reject'
            ? 'Explain the reason for rejection…'
            : reviewDecision === 'Request'
            ? 'Specify what additional information or documents are required…'
            : 'Optional notes for the officer record…'"
        ></textarea>
        <span class="field-error-msg"
          *ngIf="reviewDecision === 'Reject' && !reviewRemarks.trim()">
          A rejection reason is required.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /review-decision-body -->

    <!-- Actions -->
    <div class="modal-actions" style="padding:14px 22px;background:var(--color-bg-secondary);border-top:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);">
      <button type="button" class="btn-modal-cancel"
        (click)="onCloseReview()" [disabled]="isSubmittingReview">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button"
        class="btn-modal-confirm review-submit-btn"
        [class]="reviewButtonClass"
        (click)="onSubmitReview()"
        [disabled]="!canSubmitReview || isSubmittingReview">
        <span *ngIf="!isSubmittingReview">{{ reviewButtonLabel }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSubmittingReview">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span> Submitting…
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div><!-- /review modal -->
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/services/vat-registration.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient, HttpErrorResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable, of, throwError } from 'rxjs';
import { catchError } from 'rxjs/operators';

import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { ToastService } from '../../../shared/toast/toast.service';
import {
  VatRegistration,
  VatRegistrationCreateRequest,
} from '../../../models/vat-registration.model';

@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class VatRegistrationService {

  constructor(
    private http:  HttpClient,
    private toast: ToastService,
  ) {}

  // ── Mock data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  private readonly MOCK: VatRegistration[] = [
    {
      id: 1,
      binNo: 'BIN-2026-1-0001',
      tinNumber: '234567890012',
      businessName: 'Rahman Brothers Trading Co.',
      ownerName: 'Abdur Rahman',
      vatCategory: 'Standard',
      businessType: 'Sole Proprietorship',
      businessCategory: 'Trading',
      tradeLicenseNo: 'TL/DCC/2024/0045',
      registrationDate: '2026-01-10',
      effectiveDate: '2026-02-01',
      expiryDate: '',
      annualTurnover: 3_500_000,
      email: 'rahman.trading@example.com',
      phone: '01711-234567',
      address: '45 Motijheel C/A, Dhaka-1000',
      district: 'Dhaka',
      division: 'Dhaka',
      vatZone: 'Dhaka North VAT Zone',
      vatCircle: 'Circle-01',
      zoneId: 1,
      status: 'Active',
      remarks: '',
    },
    {
      id: 2,
      binNo: 'BIN-2026-2-0003',
      tinNumber: '345678901123',
      businessName: 'Sylhet Agro Products Ltd.',
      ownerName: 'Nurul Islam',
      vatCategory: 'Zero Rated',
      businessType: 'Private Limited Company',
      businessCategory: 'Agriculture',
      tradeLicenseNo: 'TL/SCC/2023/0112',
      registrationDate: '2026-02-14',
      effectiveDate: '2026-03-01',
      expiryDate: '2027-02-28',
      annualTurnover: 12_000_000,
      email: 'sylhet.agro@example.com',
      phone: '01811-345678',
      address: '12 Amberkhana, Sylhet-3100',
      district: 'Sylhet',
      division: 'Sylhet',
      vatZone: 'Sylhet VAT Zone',
      vatCircle: 'Circle-04',
      zoneId: 2,
      status: 'Active',
      remarks: 'Agricultural export — zero rated',
    },
    {
      id: 3,
      binNo: 'BIN-2026-3-0007',
      tinNumber: '456789012234',
      businessName: 'Chittagong Marine Supplies',
      ownerName: 'Karim Hossain',
      vatCategory: 'Standard',
      businessType: 'Partnership',
      businessCategory: 'Marine & Logistics',
      tradeLicenseNo: 'TL/CCC/2024/0278',
      registrationDate: '2026-03-05',
      effectiveDate: '2026-04-01',
      expiryDate: '',
      annualTurnover: 8_750_000,
      email: 'ctg.marine@example.com',
      phone: '01911-456789',
      address: '88 Agrabad C/A, Chattogram-4100',
      district: 'Chattogram',
      division: 'Chattogram',
      vatZone: 'Chattogram VAT Zone',
      vatCircle: 'Circle-07',
      zoneId: 3,
      status: 'Pending',
      remarks: 'New registration — awaiting zone officer verification',
    },
    {
      id: 4,
      binNo: 'BIN-2026-1-0012',
      tinNumber: '567890123345',
      businessName: 'Dhaka Tech Solutions',
      ownerName: 'Farida Begum',
      vatCategory: 'Exempt',
      businessType: 'Private Limited Company',
      businessCategory: 'Software & IT',
      tradeLicenseNo: 'TL/DCC/2024/0589',
      registrationDate: '2026-03-20',
      effectiveDate: '2026-04-01',
      expiryDate: '',
      annualTurnover: 5_200_000,
      email: 'dhaka.tech@example.com',
      phone: '01611-567890',
      address: '22 Gulshan-2, Dhaka-1212',
      district: 'Dhaka',
      division: 'Dhaka',
      vatZone: 'Dhaka North VAT Zone',
      vatCircle: 'Circle-02',
      zoneId: 1,
      status: 'Inactive',
      remarks: 'Software export — VAT exempt',
    },
  ];

  // ── Read: all ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


  getAll(): Observable<VatRegistration[]> {
    return this.http
      .get<VatRegistration[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.VAT_REGISTRATIONS.LIST)
      .pipe(catchError(err => this.handleReadError(err, this.MOCK)));
  }

  // ── Read: by ID ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  getById(id: number): Observable<VatRegistration> {
    return this.http
      .get<VatRegistration>(API_ENDPOINTS.VAT_REGISTRATIONS.GET(id))
      .pipe(
        catchError((err: HttpErrorResponse) => {
          if (err.status === 0) {
            const mock = this.MOCK.find(r => r.id === id);
            if (mock) {
              this.toast.warning('Server unreachable — showing offline data.');
              return of(mock);
            }
          }
          return throwError(() => err);
        }),
      );
  }

  // ── Write: create ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  create(payload: VatRegistrationCreateRequest): Observable<VatRegistration> {
    return this.http.post<VatRegistration>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.VAT_REGISTRATIONS.CREATE,
      payload,
    );
    
  }

  // ── Write: update ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  update(id: number, data: Partial<VatRegistration>): Observable<VatRegistration> {
    return this.http.put<VatRegistration>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.VAT_REGISTRATIONS.UPDATE(id),
      data,
    );
  }

  // ── Write: delete (soft) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────


  remove(id: number): Observable<void> {
    return this.http.delete<void>(API_ENDPOINTS.VAT_REGISTRATIONS.DELETE(id));
  }

  // ── Private helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  private handleReadError<T>(
    err: HttpErrorResponse,
    fallback: T,
  ): Observable<T> {
    if (err.status === 0) {
      this.toast.warning(
        'Server unreachable — showing offline data. Changes cannot be saved.',
      );
      return of(fallback);
    }
    return throwError(() => err);
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/vat-registration/vat-registration-routing.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { RouterModule, Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { Role } from 'src/app/core/constants/roles.constants';
import { AuthGuard } from 'src/app/core/guards/auth.guard';

import { VatRegistrationListComponent }    from '../pages/vat-registration-list/vat-registration-list.component';
import { VatRegistrationCreateComponent }  from '../pages/vat-registration-create/vat-registration-create.component';
import { VatRegistrationViewComponent }    from '../pages/vat-registration-view/vat-registration-view.component';
import { VatRegistrationEditComponent }    from '../pages/vat-registration-edit/vat-registration-edit.component';
import { VatRegistrationSuccessComponent } from '../pages/vat-registration-success/vat-registration-success.component';

const routes: Routes = [
  {
    path: '',
    component: VatRegistrationListComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] },
  },
  {
    path: 'create',
    component: VatRegistrationCreateComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.TAXPAYER] },
  },
  {
    path: 'success',
    component: VatRegistrationSuccessComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.TAXPAYER] },
  },
  {
    path: 'view/:id',
    component: VatRegistrationViewComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.AUDITOR, Role.TAXPAYER] },
  },
  {
    path: 'edit/:id',
    component: VatRegistrationEditComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: { roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER] },
  },
];

@NgModule({
  imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
  exports: [RouterModule],
})
export class VatRegistrationRoutingModule {}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/pages/vat-return-create/vat-return-create.component.css
```css
/* ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   vat-return-create.component.css  — ADDITIONS
   (Append to the existing file; the original tax-summary rules remain intact)
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

/* Section icon colour variants */
.section-icon.teal   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1faa8b, #17c69a); }
.section-icon.purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a855f7); }
.section-icon.orange { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #f97316); }

/* ── 2-column Supplies / VAT grid ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.supplies-tax-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 16px;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .supplies-tax-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.supply-col,
.vat-col {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0;
}

.col-heading {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2340;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  padding-bottom: 6px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e8eef9;
}

/* Total supplies summary chip at the bottom of the supply column */
.total-supplies-chip {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 12px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  background: #e8eef9;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a2340;
}

.chip-value {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1a3f8f;
}

/* Read-only output tax field */
.form-input-readonly {
  background: #f4f6fb !important;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* "Auto" badge next to the output-tax label */
.auto-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-left: 6px;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 1px 7px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #d4edda;
  color: #155724;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

/* ── Tax Summary (inside VAT column) ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.tax-summary {
  margin-top: 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid #d0daf5;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.ts-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 10px 18px;
}
.ts-label         { font-size: 13px; color: #666; font-weight: 500; }
.ts-label.total   { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.ts-value         { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; }
.ts-value.output  { color: #e74c3c; }
.ts-value.credit  { color: #1faa8b; }
.ts-value.total   { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: #1a3f8f; }
.ts-value.due     { color: #e74c3c; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; }
.ts-value.settled { color: #1faa8b; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }
.ts-divider       { height: 1px; background: #d0daf5; }
.total-row        { background: #e8eef9; padding: 12px 18px; }
.balance-row      { background: #fff8e1; }

/* ── Pill styles (shared) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cat-pill {
  background: #e8eef9; color: #1a3f8f;
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px;
}
.zone-pill {
  background: #e6f7f3; color: #1faa8b;
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px;
}
.text-blue { color: #1a3f8f; }
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/pages/vat-return-create/vat-return-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>File VAT Return</h4>
    <p>Submit a new VAT return for a registered business.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<form [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" novalidate>
  <div class="form-card">

    <!-- ── Section 0: VAT Registration Picker (child component) ────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <app-vat-registration-picker (registrationSelected)="onRegistrationSelected($event)"
        (registrationCleared)="onRegistrationCleared()">
      </app-vat-registration-picker>

      <!-- Validation error shown only after touch (e.g. user tried submitting) -->
      <span class="field-error-msg"
        *ngIf="ctrl('vatRegistrationId')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('vatRegistrationId')?.touched">
        Please search and select a VAT registration.
      </span>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Section 1: Return Period ────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon teal">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Return Period</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Filing period and assessment year</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Return Period</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="returnPeriod">
              <option *ngFor="let p of returnPeriods" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Period</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-month input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="periodMonth"
              [class.is-invalid]="ctrl('periodMonth')?.invalid && ctrl('periodMonth')?.touched">
              <option value="">Select Period</option>
              <option *ngFor="let m of periodOptions" [value]="m">{{ m }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <span class="field-error-msg"
            *ngIf="ctrl('periodMonth')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('periodMonth')?.touched">
            Period is required.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Year</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="periodYear">
              <option *ngFor="let y of years" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Assessment Year</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="assessmentYear">
              <option value="">Select Assessment Year</option>
              <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y.yearName">{{ y.yearName }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Submission Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="submissionDate"
              [class.is-invalid]="form.errors?.['submissionBeforePeriod'] && ctrl('submissionDate')?.touched" />
          </div>
          <!-- Cross-field validator error surfaced here -->
          <span class="field-error-msg"
            *ngIf="form.errors?.['submissionBeforePeriod'] && ctrl('submissionDate')?.touched">
            Submission date cannot be before the start of the filing period.
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="dueDate" />
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Section 2: Supplies & Tax Calculation (2-column layout) ─────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon purple">
          <i class="bi bi-table"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Supplies &amp; Tax Calculation</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">
            Output VAT auto-calculated at
            <strong>{{ effectiveVatRateLabel }}</strong>
            ({{ selectedReg?.vatCategory || 'Standard' }} rate) — net tax recalculated on every change
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 2-column layout: Supplies | VAT Computation -->
      <div class="supplies-tax-grid">

        <!-- LEFT column: Supply amounts -->
        <div class="supply-col">
          <p class="col-heading"><i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill me-1"></i> Supply Amounts</p>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Taxable Supplies (৳)</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
              <!-- No (input) binding — valueChanges handles recalculation reactively -->
              <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" formControlName="taxableSupplies" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Exempt Supplies (৳)</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
              <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" formControlName="exemptSupplies" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Zero Rated Supplies (৳)</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
              <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" formControlName="zeroRatedSupplies" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="total-supplies-chip">
            <span>Total Supplies</span>
            <span class="chip-value">৳{{ totalSupplies.toLocaleString() }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- RIGHT column: VAT computation -->
        <div class="vat-col">
          <p class="col-heading"><i class="bi bi-percent me-1"></i> VAT Computation</p>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">
              Output VAT @ {{ effectiveVatRateLabel }} (৳)
              <span class="auto-badge">Auto</span>
            </label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
              <!-- disabled in form — read-only display, value set by valueChanges logic -->
              <input type="number" class="form-input form-input-readonly" placeholder="0" formControlName="outputTax"
                readonly />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Input VAT Credit (৳)</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle input-icon"></i>
              <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" formControlName="inputTax" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Tax Paid (৳)</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
              <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" formControlName="taxPaid" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Real-time summary panel embedded in the right column -->
          <div class="tax-summary">
            <div class="ts-row">
              <span class="ts-label">Output VAT</span>
              <span class="ts-value output">৳{{ (form.getRawValue().outputTax || 0).toLocaleString() }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ts-row">
              <span class="ts-label">Less: Input VAT Credit</span>
              <span class="ts-value credit">— ৳{{ (form.value.inputTax || 0).toLocaleString() }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ts-divider"></div>
            <div class="ts-row total-row">
              <span class="ts-label total">Net Tax Payable</span>
              <span class="ts-value total">৳{{ netTaxPayable.toLocaleString() }}</span>
            </div>
            <ng-container *ngIf="form.value.taxPaid > 0">
              <div class="ts-row">
                <span class="ts-label">Less: Tax Paid</span>
                <span class="ts-value credit">— ৳{{ (form.value.taxPaid || 0).toLocaleString() }}</span>
              </div>
              <div class="ts-row balance-row">
                <span class="ts-label total">Balance Due</span>
                <span class="ts-value" [class.due]="balanceDue > 0" [class.settled]="balanceDue === 0">
                  {{ balanceDue > 0 ? '৳' + balanceDue.toLocaleString() : '৳0 — Settled' }}
                </span>
              </div>
            </ng-container>
          </div>

        </div><!-- /vat-col -->
      </div><!-- /supplies-tax-grid -->
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Section 3: Submission Details ───────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon orange">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Submission Details</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Who is filing this return</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Submitted By</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="submittedBy">
              <option value="">Select</option>
              <option *ngFor="let s of submitters" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
            <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." formControlName="remarks"
              rows="2"></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isLoading || form.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> File Return</span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Filing...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</form>
```
