## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-view/penalty-view.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, inject } from '@angular/core';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { Penalty } from '../../../../models/penalty.model';
import { Subject, takeUntil } from 'rxjs';
import { AuthService } from 'src/app/core/services/auth.service';
import { PenaltyService } from '../../services/penalty.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-penalty-view',
  templateUrl: './penalty-view.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./penalty-view.component.css'],
})
export class PenaltyViewComponent implements OnInit {
  penalty: Penalty | null = null;
  isLoading = true;
  showActionModal = false;
  pendingAction = '';
  actionRemarks = '';
  isActing = false;
  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private penaltyService: PenaltyService,
    private authService: AuthService,
    private toast: ToastService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    const id = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));
    this.penaltyService
      .getById(id)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
      .subscribe({
        next: (data) => {
          this.penalty = data;
          this.isLoading = false;
        },
        error: () => {
          this.isLoading = false;
          this.toast.error('Failed to load penalty.');
        },
      });
  }

  get role(): string {
    return this.authService.userRole;
  }
  get isApprover(): boolean {
    return ['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER'].includes(this.role);
  }
  get isOfficer(): boolean {
    return ['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER', 'TAX_OFFICER'].includes(
      this.role,
    );
  }

  canSubmit(): boolean {
    return this.penalty?.status === 'DRAFT' && this.isOfficer;
  }
  canApprove(): boolean {
    return this.penalty?.status === 'PENDING_APPROVAL' && this.isApprover;
  }
  canReject(): boolean {
    return this.penalty?.status === 'PENDING_APPROVAL' && this.isApprover;
  }
  canIssue(): boolean {
    return this.penalty?.status === 'APPROVED' && this.isApprover;
  }
  canEdit(): boolean {
    return this.penalty?.status === 'DRAFT' && this.isOfficer;
  }
  canCancel(): boolean {
    const terminal = ['PAID', 'CLOSED', 'CANCELLED'];
    return !terminal.includes(this.penalty?.status ?? '') && this.isApprover;
  }

  // ── Actions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  openAction(action: string): void {
    this.pendingAction = action;
    this.actionRemarks = '';
    this.showActionModal = true;
  }

  closeAction(): void {
    this.showActionModal = false;
    this.pendingAction = '';
  }

  formatAction(action: string): string {
    return action.replace(/_/g, ' ');
  }

  confirmAction(): void {
    if (!this.penalty) return;
    this.isActing = true;
    const req = { remarks: this.actionRemarks };
    const id = this.penalty.id;

    const call$ =
      this.pendingAction === 'submit'
        ? this.penaltyService.submit(id, req)
        : this.pendingAction === 'approve'
          ? this.penaltyService.approve(id, req)
          : this.pendingAction === 'reject'
            ? this.penaltyService.reject(id, req)
            : this.pendingAction === 'issue'
              ? this.penaltyService.issue(id, req)
              : this.penaltyService.cancel(id, req);

    call$.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe({
      next: (updated) => {
        this.penalty = updated;
        this.isActing = false;
        this.closeAction();
        this.toast.success(`Penalty ${this.pendingAction}d successfully.`);
      },
      error: (err) => {
        this.isActing = false;
        this.toast.error(err?.error?.message || 'Action failed.');
      },
    });
  }

  // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  getStatusClass(s: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      DRAFT: 'status-draft',
      PENDING_APPROVAL: 'status-pending',
      APPROVED: 'status-approved',
      ISSUED: 'status-issued',
      PARTIALLY_PAID: 'status-partial',
      PAID: 'status-active',
      APPEALED: 'status-appealed',
      CANCELLED: 'status-cancelled',
      CLOSED: 'status-closed',
      Issued: 'status-issued',
      Paid: 'status-active',
      Overdue: 'status-overdue',
    };
    return map[s] ?? '';
  }

  getSeverityClass(s: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      Low: 'sev-low',
      Medium: 'sev-medium',
      High: 'sev-high',
      Critical: 'sev-critical',
    };
    return map[s] ?? '';
  }

  getActionLabel(action: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      submit: 'Submit for Approval',
      approve: 'Approve',
      reject: 'Reject',
      issue: 'Issue Officially',
      cancel: 'Cancel',
    };
    return map[action] ?? action;
  }

  getActionClass(action: string): string {
    if (action === 'approve' || action === 'issue')
      return 'btn-modal-confirm success';
    if (action === 'cancel' || action === 'reject')
      return 'btn-modal-confirm error';
    return 'btn-modal-confirm';
  }

  fmt(amount: number | null | undefined): string {
    if (!amount) return '৳0';
    return `৳${amount.toLocaleString()}`;
  }

  onEdit(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/penalties', 'edit', this.penalty?.id]);
  }
  onBack(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/penalties']);
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step1-account-type/reg-step-account-type/reg-step-account-type.component.ts
```typescript
import {
  Component,
  EventEmitter,
  Input,
  OnDestroy,
  OnInit,
  Output,
  inject,
} from '@angular/core';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';

import {
  AccountCategory,
  RegistrationState,
} from '../../../../../models/registration.model';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../../../core/constants/api.constants';

interface TaxpayerType {
  id: number;
  typeName: string;
  category: string;
}

@Component({
  selector: 'app-reg-step-account-type',
  templateUrl: './reg-step-account-type.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./reg-step-account-type.component.css'],
})
export class RegStepAccountTypeComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
  @Input() state!: RegistrationState;
  @Output() next = new EventEmitter<Partial<RegistrationState>>();

  allTypes: TaxpayerType[] = [];
  isLoading = false;

  selectedCategory: AccountCategory | null = null;
  selectedTypeId: number | null = null;

  readonly categories: AccountCategory[] = [
    'Individual',
    'Business',
    'Organization',
  ];

  readonly categoryMeta: Record<
    AccountCategory,
    { icon: string; desc: string; color: string }
  > = {
    Individual: {
      icon: 'bi-person-fill',
      desc: 'Personal taxpayer — requires NID',
      color: 'blue',
    },
    Business: {
      icon: 'bi-shop-window',
      desc: 'Business entity — requires RJSC number',
      color: 'green',
    },
    Organization: {
      icon: 'bi-building-fill',
      desc: 'NGO, Govt body or Foreign entity',
      color: 'purple',
    },
  };

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(private http: HttpClient, private toast: ToastService) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    // Restore state if user navigated back from step 2
    this.selectedCategory = this.state.accountCategory;
    this.selectedTypeId = this.state.taxpayerTypeId;
    this.loadTypes();
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  loadTypes(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.http
      .get<TaxpayerType[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.MASTER_DATA.TAXPAYER_TYPES)
      .pipe(
        takeUntil(this.destroy$),
        finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)),
      )
      .subscribe({
        next: (data) => (this.allTypes = data),
        error: (_err) => {
          this.toast.error('Failed to load taxpayer types. Please try again.');
        },
      });
  }

  get filteredTypes(): TaxpayerType[] {
    if (!this.selectedCategory) return [];
    return this.allTypes.filter((t) => t.category === this.selectedCategory);
  }

  get canProceed(): boolean {
    return !!this.selectedCategory && !!this.selectedTypeId;
  }

  selectCategory(cat: AccountCategory): void {
    this.selectedCategory = cat;
    this.selectedTypeId = null; // reset when category changes
  }

  selectType(type: TaxpayerType): void {
    this.selectedTypeId = type.id;
  }

  onNext(): void {
    if (!this.canProceed) {
      this.toast.warning(
        'Please select an account category and taxpayer type.',
      );
      return;
    }
    const selected = this.allTypes.find((t) => t.id === this.selectedTypeId)!;
    this.next.emit({
      accountCategory: this.selectedCategory!,
      taxpayerTypeId: this.selectedTypeId!,
      taxpayerTypeName: selected.typeName,
    });
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step4-review/reg-step-review/reg-step-review.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <div class="step-intro">
    <h3 class="step-heading">Review your details</h3>
    <p class="step-sub">Please confirm everything below before submitting. Go back to correct any mistakes.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="review-grid">

    <!-- Account Type -->
    <div class="review-card">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        <span>Account Type</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row">
        <span class="review-label">Type</span>
        <span class="review-value type-pill" [class.individual]="isIndividual" [class.company]="!isIndividual">
          <i [class]="isIndividual ? 'bi bi-person-fill' : 'bi bi-building-fill'"></i>
          {{ state.accountCategory }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Credentials -->
    <div class="review-card">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-lock-fill"></i>
        <span>Account Credentials</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Full Name</span><span class="review-value fw-bold">{{ state.fullName }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Email</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.email }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Phone</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.phone }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Password</span><span class="review-value pass-mask">{{ maskedPassword }}</span></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Identity — Individual -->
    <div class="review-card" *ngIf="isIndividual">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill"></i>
        <span>Identity (Individual)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">NID Number</span><span class="review-value code-badge">{{ state.nid }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Date of Birth</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.dateOfBirth }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Gender</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.gender }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row" *ngIf="state.profession">
        <span class="review-label">Profession</span>
        <span class="review-value">{{ state.profession }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Identity — Company -->
    <div class="review-card" *ngIf="!isIndividual">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>Identity (Company)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Company Name</span><span class="review-value fw-bold">{{ state.companyName }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">RJSC No.</span><span class="review-value code-badge">{{ state.rjscNo }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Incorporation Date</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.incorporationDate }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row" *ngIf="state.natureOfBusiness">
        <span class="review-label">Nature of Business</span>
        <span class="review-value">{{ state.natureOfBusiness }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Authorized Person</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.authorizedPersonName }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Authorized NID</span><span class="review-value code-badge">{{ state.authorizedPersonNid }}</span></div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- What happens next -->
  <div class="submit-info-box">
    <div class="sib-icon"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <p class="sib-title">What happens when you submit?</p>
      <ul class="sib-list">
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Your portal account is created with TAXPAYER access</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> A verification code will be sent to your email</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> After verification, an officer will review your application</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> You will receive an approval or rejection email within 3-5 business days</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> TIN will be issued upon approval</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-back" (click)="back.emit()" [disabled]="isSubmitting">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSubmitting">
      <span *ngIf="!isSubmitting">
        <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Submit Registration
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isSubmitting">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span> Registering...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step4-review/reg-step-review/reg-step-review.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output, inject } from '@angular/core';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { RegistrationState } from '../../../../../models/registration.model';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-reg-step-review',
  templateUrl: './reg-step-review.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./reg-step-review.component.css'],
})
export class RegStepReviewComponent {
  @Input() state!: RegistrationState;
  @Input() isSubmitting = false;
  @Output() submit = new EventEmitter<void>();
  @Output() back = new EventEmitter<void>();

  constructor(private toast: ToastService) {}
  get isIndividual(): boolean {
    return this.state.accountCategory === 'Individual';
  }

  // Mask password display
  get maskedPassword(): string {
    return '•'.repeat(this.state.password.length);
  }
  onSubmit(): void {
    this.toast.info('Submitting registration request...');
    this.submit.emit();
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-create/refund-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4><i class="bi bi-plus-circle"></i> New Refund Application</h4>
    <p>Complete all steps to submit your refund request</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="cancel()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- ─── STEP 0: TAXPAYER SELECTION (Officer only) ──────── -->
  <div *ngIf="currentStep === 0" class="wizard-card">
    <div class="wizard-card-header">
      <i class="bi bi-person-search"></i> Select Taxpayer
      <span class="ms-2 td-sub">Search and select the taxpayer for whom you are creating this refund</span>
    </div>
    <div class="wizard-card-body">

      <!-- Reuse existing taxpayer-search component from VAT module -->
      <app-taxpayer-search
        [selectedTaxpayer]="selectedTaxpayer"
        (taxpayerSelected)="onTaxpayerSelected($event)"
        (taxpayerCleared)="onTaxpayerCleared()">
      </app-taxpayer-search>

      <!-- Selected taxpayer confirmation card -->
      <div *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer" class="taxpayer-confirm-card mt-3">
        <div class="taxpayer-confirm-header">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i>
          Taxpayer Selected
        </div>
        <div class="taxpayer-confirm-body">
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">Name</span>
              <span class="fw-semibold">
                {{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName || selectedTaxpayer.companyName || '—' }}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">TIN</span>
              <span class="code-badge">{{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber || '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">Email</span>
              <span class="td-sub">{{ selectedTaxpayer.email || '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">Type</span>
              <span class="cat-badge cat-standard">
                {{ selectedTaxpayer.taxpayerType?.typeName || '—' }}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
    <div class="wizard-card-footer">
      <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="cancel()">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button class="btn-submit"
              (click)="confirmTaxpayerAndProceed()"
              [disabled]="!selectedTaxpayerId">
        Next: Select Refund Type <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── STEPS 1–6 ────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="currentStep >= 1">

    <!-- Officer taxpayer banner -->
    <div *ngIf="isOfficerRole && selectedTaxpayer" class="officer-taxpayer-banner mb-3">
      <i class="bi bi-person-fill me-2"></i>
      Creating refund on behalf of:
      <strong class="ms-1">
        {{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName || selectedTaxpayer.companyName }}
      </strong>
      <span class="code-badge ms-2">{{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
      <button class="btn-cancel ms-auto" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:3px 10px;"
              (click)="currentStep = 0">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil me-1"></i> Change
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Stepper -->
    <div class="stepper-wrapper mb-4" role="list" aria-label="Wizard steps">
      <div *ngFor="let label of stepLabels; let i = index"
           class="stepper-item"
           [class.active]="currentStep === i + 1"
           [class.completed]="currentStep > i + 1"
           role="listitem">
        <div class="stepper-circle" (click)="goToStep(i + 1)">
          <i *ngIf="currentStep > i + 1" class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
          <span *ngIf="currentStep <= i + 1">{{ i + 1 }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stepper-connector" *ngIf="i < stepLabels.length - 1"></div>
        <div class="stepper-label">{{ label }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Error -->
    <div *ngIf="errorMsg" class="alert alert-danger d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-3">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 1: Refund Type ─────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 1">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-list-check"></i> Step 1 — Select Refund Type
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small mb-3">
          Choose the category that best describes the reason for the refund.
        </p>
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6" *ngFor="let t of refundTypeOptions">
            <div class="type-card"
                 [class.type-card--selected]="selectedRefundType === t.value"
                 (click)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
                 role="radio" [attr.aria-checked]="selectedRefundType === t.value"
                 tabindex="0"
                 (keydown.enter)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
                 (keydown.space)="selectedRefundType = t.value">
              <div class="type-card-icon" [ngClass]="t.color">
                <i [class]="t.icon" aria-hidden="true"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="type-card-label">{{ t.label }}</div>
              <div class="type-card-desc">{{ t.description }}</div>
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill type-card-check"
                 *ngIf="selectedRefundType === t.value"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()" [disabled]="saving">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!selectedRefundType">
            Next: Source Records <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 2: Source Records ──────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 2">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-database"></i> Step 2 — Select Source Records
        <span class="ms-2 cat-badge cat-standard">{{ getRefundTypeLabel(selectedRefundType) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small mb-3">
          Only eligible records with positive excess balances are shown.
        </p>

        <div *ngIf="loadingSources" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
          <span class="ms-2 small text-muted">Loading eligible records…</span>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="!loadingSources && sourcesError" class="sources-error-box mb-3">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
          {{ sourcesError }}
          <button class="btn-cancel ms-auto" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:3px 10px;"
                  (click)="loadSources()">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise me-1"></i> Retry
          </button>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="!loadingSources && !sourcesError && eligibleSources.length === 0"
             class="alert alert-info d-flex gap-2">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
          No eligible source records found for this refund type and fiscal year.
        </div>

        <div class="table-responsive" *ngIf="!loadingSources && eligibleSources.length > 0">
          <table class="data-table source-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th style="width:40px"></th>
                <th>Reference</th>
                <th>Period</th>
                <th class="text-end">Tax Paid</th>
                <th class="text-end">Tax Liability</th>
                <th class="text-end" style="color:var(--success)">Excess</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr *ngFor="let s of eligibleSources"
                  [class.source-row--selected]="isSourceSelected(s.id)"
                  (click)="toggleSource(s.id)" style="cursor:pointer">
                <td>
                  <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input"
                         [checked]="isSourceSelected(s.id)"
                         (click)="$event.stopPropagation(); toggleSource(s.id)">
                </td>
                <td><span class="code-badge">{{ s.reference }}</span></td>
                <td class="td-sub">{{ s.periodLabel }}</td>
                <td class="text-end td-sub">৳ {{ s.taxPaid | number }}</td>
                <td class="text-end td-sub">৳ {{ s.taxLiability | number }}</td>
                <td class="text-end fw-semibold" style="color:var(--success)">
                  ৳ {{ s.excessAmount | number }}
                </td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="selectedSourceIds.size > 0" class="alert alert-success py-2 small mt-2">
          <i class="bi bi-check2 me-1"></i>
          {{ selectedSourceIds.size }} record(s) selected —
          Total: <strong>৳ {{ selectedSourcesTotalExcess | number }}</strong>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="selectedSourceIds.size === 0">
            Next: Calculation <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 3: Calculation ─────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 3">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator"></i> Step 3 — Refund Calculation
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div *ngIf="calculationError" class="alert alert-danger small mb-3">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>{{ calculationError }}
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="!calculation && !calculationError" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
          <span class="ms-2 small text-muted">Calculating…</span>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="calculation">
          <div class="calc-box mb-3">
            <div class="calc-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Total Tax Paid</span>
              <span>৳ {{ calculation.totalTaxPaid | number }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="calc-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Total Tax Liability</span>
              <span>৳ {{ calculation.totalTaxLiability | number }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="calc-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Previously Claimed</span>
              <span>৳ {{ calculation.previouslyClaimed | number }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="calc-divider"></div>
            <div class="calc-total-row">
              <span class="fw-semibold">Maximum Eligible Refund</span>
              <span class="fw-bold fs-5" style="color:var(--success)">
                ৳ {{ calculation.eligibleRefundAmount | number }}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="alert alert-info d-flex gap-2 align-items-start small py-2">
            <i class="bi bi-lock flex-shrink-0 mt-1"></i>
            <span>System-calculated. You may request a <strong>partial refund</strong> by entering a lower amount.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row mt-3">
            <div class="col-md-5">
              <label class="form-label fw-semibold small">
                Requested Amount <span class="text-danger">*</span>
              </label>
              <div class="input-group">
                <span class="input-group-text">৳</span>
                <input type="number" class="form-input"
                       [(ngModel)]="requestedAmount"
                       [max]="calculation.eligibleRefundAmount" min="1"
                       [class.is-invalid]="amountExceedsEligible">
              </div>
              <div *ngIf="amountExceedsEligible" class="text-danger small mt-1">
                Cannot exceed ৳ {{ calculation.eligibleRefundAmount | number }}.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!canProceed()">
            Next: Bank Info <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 4: Bank Info ───────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 4">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i> Step 4 — Bank Account Information
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <form [formGroup]="bankForm" novalidate>
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Bank Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankName" list="bank-list" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankName')" placeholder="e.g. Dutch-Bangla Bank Ltd">
              <datalist id="bank-list">
                <option value="Dutch-Bangla Bank Ltd">
                <option value="BRAC Bank Ltd">
                <option value="Islami Bank Bangladesh Ltd">
                <option value="City Bank Ltd">
                <option value="Sonali Bank Ltd">
                <option value="Agrani Bank Ltd">
              </datalist>
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Branch <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankBranch" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankBranch')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field form-field--full">
              <label class="form-label">Account Holder Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountHolderName" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountHolderName')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Account Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountNumber" type="password" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountNumber')"
                     placeholder="13 digits" maxlength="13">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 13-digit number required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Routing Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="routingNumber" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('routingNumber')"
                     placeholder="9 digits" maxlength="9">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 9-digit number required.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
            <button type="button" class="btn-submit"
                    style="background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--primary);border:1px solid var(--primary);"
                    (click)="validateBank()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || bankValidating">
              <span *ngIf="bankValidating" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
              <i *ngIf="!bankValidating" class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>
              {{ bankValidating ? 'Validating…' : 'Validate Account' }}
            </button>
            <span *ngIf="bankValidated" class="text-success small fw-semibold">
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i> Validated
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="bankError" class="text-danger small">{{ bankError }}</span>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || !bankValidated">
            Next: Documents <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 5: Documents ───────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 5">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i> Step 5 — Supporting Documents
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small mb-3">Bank Statement is mandatory. Max 20 MB. PDF, JPG, PNG only.</p>
        <div class="row g-2 align-items-end mb-3">
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Document Type</label>
            <select class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="selectedDocType">
              <option *ngFor="let d of documentTypes" [value]="d.value">
                {{ d.label }}{{ d.required ? ' *' : '' }}
              </option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-5">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Choose File</label>
            <input type="file" class="form-input" (change)="onFileSelect($event)"
                   accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="uploadError" class="alert alert-danger py-2 small">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i> {{ uploadError }}
        </div>
        <div *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index" class="uploaded-file-item">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5 flex-shrink-0"></i>
          <div class="flex-grow-1">
            <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ f.name }}</div>
            <div class="td-sub">{{ getDocTypeLabel(f.type) }} · {{ f.size }}</div>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-delete" (click)="removeFile(i)"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="!hasRequiredDocuments()" class="alert alert-warning py-2 small mt-2">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>
          <strong>Bank Statement</strong> is required.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!hasRequiredDocuments()">
            Next: Review <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 6: Review & Submit ────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 6">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check"></i> Step 6 — Review &amp; Submit
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div class="row g-3 mb-3">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title"><i class="bi bi-info-circle me-1"></i> Application</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Refund Type</span><span class="fw-semibold">{{ getRefundTypeLabel(selectedRefundType) }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Sources</span><span>{{ selectedSourceIds.size }} record(s)</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Requested</span><span class="fw-bold" style="color:var(--success)">৳ {{ requestedAmount | number }}</span></div>
              <div *ngIf="isOfficerRole && selectedTaxpayer" class="review-row">
                <span class="text-muted">Taxpayer</span>
                <span>{{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName || selectedTaxpayer.companyName }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title"><i class="bi bi-bank me-1"></i> Bank</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Bank</span><span>{{ bankForm.value.bankName }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Account</span><span class="font-monospace">████ {{ bankForm.value.accountNumber?.slice(-4) }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Validated</span><span class="text-success fw-semibold"><i class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>Yes</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="declaration-box">
          <div class="form-check">
            <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="declaration" [(ngModel)]="declarationAgreed">
            <label class="form-check-label small" for="declaration">
              I hereby declare that all information provided is true, accurate, and complete.
              Providing false information is an offense under the Income Tax Ordinance 1984.
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" style="background:var(--success);border-color:var(--success);"
                  (click)="submitRefund()" [disabled]="!declarationAgreed || submitting">
            <span *ngIf="submitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!submitting" class="bi bi-send me-1"></i>
            {{ submitting ? 'Submitting…' : 'Submit Application' }}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </ng-container>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-view/refund-view.component.html
```html
<div class="container-fluid py-4 px-4">

  <!-- Back + Header -->
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
      <button class="btn btn-link btn-sm text-muted ps-0 mb-1" (click)="back()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to My Refunds
      </button>
      <h4 class="page-title mb-0" *ngIf="refund">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text me-2 text-primary"></i>
        {{ refund.refundReferenceNo }}
      </h4>
    </div>
    <div class="d-flex gap-2" *ngIf="refund">
      <button *ngIf="canRespond" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm" (click)="respond()">
        <i class="bi bi-reply me-1"></i> Respond to Request
      </button>
      <button *ngIf="canEdit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="edit()">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil me-1"></i> Edit Draft
      </button>
      <button *ngIf="canCancel" class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm" (click)="cancel()">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div *ngIf="loading" class="text-center py-5">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
    <p class="text-muted mt-2 small">Loading refund details…</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Error -->
  <div *ngIf="!loading && errorMessage" class="alert alert-danger">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-2"></i>{{ errorMessage }}
  </div>

  <div *ngIf="!loading && refund" class="row g-4">

    <!-- LEFT COLUMN -->
    <div class="col-lg-8">

      <!-- Status Banner -->
      <div class="status-banner mb-3"
        [class.status-banner--info]="refund.status === 'INFO_REQUESTED'"
        [class.status-banner--success]="isPaid"
        [class.status-banner--danger]="refund.status === 'REJECTED' || refund.status === 'FAILED'"
      >
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
          <app-refund-status-badge [status]="refund.status" size="lg"></app-refund-status-badge>
          <div *ngIf="refund.status === 'INFO_REQUESTED'" class="small text-warning-emphasis">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-1"></i>
            Action Required: Please respond to the officer's information request.
          </div>
          <div *ngIf="isPaid" class="small text-success">
            <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>
            Refund of <strong>{{ formatCurrency(refund.approvedRefundAmount) }}</strong> has been disbursed.
          </div>
          <div *ngIf="refund.status === 'REJECTED'" class="small text-danger">
            <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill me-1"></i>
            Rejected: {{ refund.rejectionReasonText }}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Application Details -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-2"></i> Application Details
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <div class="detail-grid">
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Reference No.</span>
              <span class="detail-value fw-semibold">{{ refund.refundReferenceNo }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Refund Type</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refundTypeLabels[refund.refundType] }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Fiscal Year</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.fiscalYearName }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Submitted</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.submittedAt ? (refund.submittedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy') : '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Total Tax Paid</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ formatCurrency(refund.totalTaxPaid) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Total Tax Liability</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ formatCurrency(refund.totalTaxLiability) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Claimed Amount</span>
              <span class="detail-value fw-semibold text-primary">{{ formatCurrency(refund.claimedRefundAmount) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Approved Amount</span>
              <span class="detail-value fw-bold text-success">{{ formatCurrency(refund.approvedRefundAmount) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item" *ngIf="refund.appealReferenceNo">
              <span class="detail-label">Appeal Reference</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.appealReferenceNo }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item" *ngIf="refund.courtOrderNo">
              <span class="detail-label">Court Order No.</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.courtOrderNo }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Source Records -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3" *ngIf="refund.sources.length">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-database me-2"></i> Source Records
        </div>
        <div class="table-responsive">
          <table class="table table-sm align-middle mb-0 small">
            <thead class="table-light">
              <tr>
                <th>Source Type</th>
                <th>Reference</th>
                <th>Period</th>
                <th class="text-end">Amount</th>
                <th class="text-center">Verified</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr *ngFor="let src of refund.sources">
                <td><span class="badge bg-light text-secondary border">{{ src.sourceType }}</span></td>
                <td class="fw-semibold">{{ src.sourceReference }}</td>
                <td class="text-muted">{{ src.periodStart | date:'MMM yyyy' }} – {{ src.periodEnd | date:'MMM yyyy' }}</td>
                <td class="text-end">{{ formatCurrency(src.sourceAmount) }}</td>
                <td class="text-center">
                  <i *ngIf="src.isVerified" class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i>
                  <i *ngIf="!src.isVerified" class="bi bi-circle text-muted"></i>
                </td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Bank Details -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3">
        <div class="detail-card-header d-flex justify-content-between">
          <span><i class="bi bi-bank me-2"></i> Bank Account</span>
          <span *ngIf="refund.bankValidated" class="small text-success">
            <i class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>Validated
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <div class="detail-grid">
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Bank</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.bankDetails.bankName }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Branch</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.bankDetails.bankBranch }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Account Holder</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.bankDetails.accountHolderName }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Account No.</span>
              <span class="detail-value font-monospace">{{ refund.bankDetails.accountNumber }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Documents -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-paperclip me-2"></i> Documents ({{ refund.documents.length }} uploaded)
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <div *ngIf="!refund.documents.length" class="text-muted small">No documents uploaded.</div>
          <div
            *ngFor="let doc of refund.documents"
            class="doc-item"
          >
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5 flex-shrink-0" aria-hidden="true"></i>
            <div class="flex-grow-1">
              <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ doc.documentName }}</div>
              <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">
                {{ doc.documentType | titlecase }} ·
                Uploaded {{ doc.uploadedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
              </div>
            </div>
            <span
              class="badge"
              [class.bg-success]="doc.verificationStatus === 'VERIFIED'"
              [class.bg-danger]="doc.verificationStatus === 'REJECTED'"
              [class.bg-secondary]="doc.verificationStatus === 'PENDING'"
            >{{ doc.verificationStatus | titlecase }}</span>
            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm py-0 px-2 ms-2"
              (click)="downloadDocument(doc.id)" title="Download">
              <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /LEFT -->

    <!-- RIGHT COLUMN: Status Timeline -->
    <div class="col-lg-4">
      <div class="detail-card sticky-top" style="top:80px">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-clock-history me-2"></i> Status Timeline
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <app-refund-status-timeline [history]="refund.statusHistory">
          </app-refund-status-timeline>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /row -->
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/reports-dashboard/reports-dashboard.component.html
```html
<div class="page-container" (click)="closeDropdown()">
  <!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-header-left">
      <h4>Reports &amp; Analytics</h4>
      <p>Generate, download and analyze government tax collection reports.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="page-header-right d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
      <button class="btn-export-all" (click)="exportAll()" [disabled]="isExportingAll">
        <span *ngIf="!isExportingAll">
          <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Export All
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isExportingAll">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span> Exporting...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── Error Banner ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="error-banner" *ngIf="errorMsg">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
    <button class="ms-auto btn-cancel" style="font-size:12px;padding:3px 10px" (click)="loadData()">Retry</button>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── Filter Bar ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <div class="input-wrap">
      <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
      <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.fiscalYear" (change)="loadData()">
        <option *ngFor="let fy of fiscalYears" [value]="fy.yearName">FY {{ fy.yearName }}</option>
      </select>
    </div>

    <div class="input-wrap" *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']">
      <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
      <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.zone" (change)="onZoneChange()">
        <option value="">All Zones</option>
        <option *ngFor="let z of zones" [value]="z.id">{{ z.name }}</option>
      </select>
    </div>

    <div class="input-wrap" *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']">
      <i class="bi bi-circle-fill input-icon"></i>
      <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.circle" (change)="loadData()"
        [attr.disabled]="!filters.zone ? true : null">
        <option value="">All Circles</option>
        <option *ngFor="let c of circles" [value]="c.id">{{ c.name }}</option>
      </select>
    </div>

    <div class="input-wrap">
      <i class="bi bi-funnel-fill input-icon"></i>
      <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.taxType" (change)="loadData()">
        <option value="">All Tax Types</option>
        <option value="VAT">VAT</option>
        <option value="IT">Income Tax</option>
        <option value="IMPORT">Import Duty</option>
        <option value="AIT">AIT</option>
      </select>
    </div>

    <button class="btn-reset-filters" (click)="resetFilters()" *ngIf="hasActiveFilters">
      <i class="bi bi-x-circle"></i> Reset
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── KPI Summary Strip ──────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="kpi-strip">
    <ng-container *ngIf="!kpiLoading && kpi; else kpiSkeleton">

      <div class="kpi-card" *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']"
        (click)="drillDown('vat-collection')" title="Click to view VAT collection report">
        <div class="kpi-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <span class="kpi-label">VAT Collected</span>
          <span class="kpi-value">৳{{ formatCrore(kpi.vatCollected) }} Cr</span>
          <span class="kpi-change" [ngClass]="kpi.vatGrowthPct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'">
            <i [class]="kpi.vatGrowthPct >= 0 ? 'bi bi-arrow-up-right' : 'bi bi-arrow-down-right'"></i>
            {{ kpi.vatGrowthPct | number:'1.1-1' }}% vs last year
          </span>
          <span class="kpi-drill-hint">Click to drill down →</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="kpi-card" *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']"
        (click)="drillDown('income-tax')" title="Click to view income tax report">
        <div class="kpi-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <span class="kpi-label">Income Tax Collected</span>
          <span class="kpi-value">৳{{ formatCrore(kpi.incomeTaxCollected) }} Cr</span>
          <span class="kpi-change" [ngClass]="kpi.itGrowthPct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'">
            <i [class]="kpi.itGrowthPct >= 0 ? 'bi bi-arrow-up-right' : 'bi bi-arrow-down-right'"></i>
            {{ kpi.itGrowthPct | number:'1.1-1' }}% vs last year
          </span>
          <span class="kpi-drill-hint">Click to drill down →</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="kpi-card" *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']"
        (click)="drillDown('import-duty')" title="Click to view import duty report">
        <div class="kpi-icon red"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <span class="kpi-label">Import Duty Collected</span>
          <span class="kpi-value">৳{{ formatCrore(kpi.importDutyCollected) }} Cr</span>
          <span class="kpi-change" [ngClass]="kpi.importDutyGrowthPct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'">
            <i [class]="kpi.importDutyGrowthPct >= 0 ? 'bi bi-arrow-up-right' : 'bi bi-arrow-down-right'"></i>
            {{ kpi.importDutyGrowthPct | number:'1.1-1' }}% vs last year
          </span>
          <span class="kpi-drill-hint">Click to drill down →</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="kpi-card" *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']"
        (click)="drillDown('penalty-report')" title="Click to view penalty report">
        <div class="kpi-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <span class="kpi-label">Penalty Collected</span>
          <span class="kpi-value">৳{{ formatCrore(kpi.penaltyCollected) }} Cr</span>
          <span class="kpi-change neutral">
            <i class="bi bi-dash"></i> FY {{ filters.fiscalYear }}
          </span>
          <span class="kpi-drill-hint">Click to drill down →</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </ng-container>
    <ng-container *hasRole="['TAXPAYER']">
      <div class="kpi-card">
        <div class="kpi-icon blue"><i class="bi bi-file-check-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <span class="kpi-label">Your Returns Filed</span>
          <span class="kpi-value">{{ kpi?.filedReturns | number }}</span>
          <span class="kpi-change neutral">FY {{ filters.fiscalYear }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-card" (click)="drillDown('ait-report')">
        <div class="kpi-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <span class="kpi-label">Your AIT Deducted</span>
          <span class="kpi-value">৳{{ formatCrore(kpi?.aitDeducted) }} Cr</span>
          <span class="kpi-drill-hint">Click to view →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-card" (click)="drillDown('refund-report')">
        <div class="kpi-icon green"><i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <span class="kpi-label">Your Refund Paid</span>
          <span class="kpi-value">৳{{ formatCrore(kpi?.refundPaid) }} Cr</span>
          <span class="kpi-drill-hint">Click to view →</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

    <ng-template #kpiSkeleton>
      <div class="kpi-card" *ngFor="let i of [1,2,3,4]">
        <div class="kpi-icon" style="background:#f0f4f8;width:46px;height:46px"></div>
        <div class="kpi-body">
          <div class="kpi-skeleton" style="width:80%;height:11px;margin-bottom:8px"></div>
          <div class="kpi-skeleton" style="width:60%;height:20px;margin-bottom:6px"></div>
          <div class="kpi-skeleton" style="width:50%;height:11px"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ng-template>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── Secondary KPI Row ─────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="kpi-strip" *ngIf="kpi && !kpiLoading" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)">
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon green"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <span class="kpi-label">Active Taxpayers</span>
        <span class="kpi-value">{{ kpi.activeTaxpayers | number }}</span>
        <span class="kpi-change neutral">Registered &amp; active</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon blue"><i class="bi bi-file-check-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <span class="kpi-label">Returns Filed</span>
        <span class="kpi-value">{{ kpi.filedReturns | number }}</span>
        <span class="kpi-change neutral">FY {{ filters.fiscalYear }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card" *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']">
      <div class="kpi-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <span class="kpi-label">Filing Compliance Rate</span>
        <span class="kpi-value">{{ kpi.complianceRate | number:'1.1-1' }}%</span>
        <span class="kpi-change" [ngClass]="kpi.complianceRate >= 80 ? 'positive' : 'negative'">
          {{ kpi.complianceRate >= 80 ? 'On target' : 'Below target (80%)' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="kpi-card" (click)="drillDown('refund-status')">
      <div class="kpi-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <span class="kpi-label">Refund Paid Out</span>
        <span class="kpi-value">৳{{ formatCrore(kpi.refundPaid) }} Cr</span>
        <span class="kpi-drill-hint">Click to drill down →</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── Charts Row ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="charts-row">

    <!-- Revenue Trend Chart -->
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-card-header">
        <span class="chart-card-title">
          <i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i> Revenue Trend — FY {{ filters.fiscalYear }}
        </span>
        <select class="form-input form-select" style="max-width:140px;font-size:12px;padding:5px 10px"
          [(ngModel)]="trendMonths" (change)="loadTrendData()">
          <option [value]="6">Last 6 months</option>
          <option [value]="12">Last 12 months</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div *ngIf="trendLoading" style="height:200px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center">
        <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
      </div>

      <div *ngIf="!trendLoading && trendData.length === 0" class="chart-placeholder">
        <i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i>
        <span>No trend data available for selected filters</span>
      </div>

      <!-- ✅ FIXED: trendChartData + trendChartOptions + type="line" -->
      <div *ngIf="!trendLoading && trendData.length > 0" style="height:200px">
        <canvas baseChart [data]="trendChartData" [options]="trendChartOptions" type="line"
          style="width:100%;height:200px">
        </canvas>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tax Type Breakdown Chart -->
    <div class="chart-card">
      <div class="chart-card-header">
        <span class="chart-card-title">
          <i class="bi bi-pie-chart-fill"></i> Tax Breakdown
        </span>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="kpiLoading" style="height:200px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center">
        <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!kpiLoading && kpi" style="padding: 0 10px">
        <div *ngFor="let item of taxBreakdownItems" style="margin-bottom:10px">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:4px">
            <span style="font-weight:600;color:#1a2340">{{ item.label }}</span>
            <span style="color:#888;font-weight:600">{{ item.pct | number:'1.0-0' }}%</span>
          </div>
          <div style="height:7px;background:#f0f4f8;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
            <div [style.width.%]="item.pct" [style.background]="item.color"
              style="height:100%;border-radius:4px;transition:width 0.8s ease"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── Compliance Rate by Zone ────────────────────────── -->
  <ng-container *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']">
    <ng-container *ngIf="complianceData.length > 0">
      <div class="section-header-row">
        <span class="section-title-text">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check me-2 text-success"></i>Filing Compliance by Zone
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="compliance-row" style="margin-bottom:22px">
        <div class="compliance-card" *ngFor="let c of complianceData">
          <div class="compliance-zone">{{ c.zoneName }}</div>
          <div class="compliance-bar-track">
            <div class="compliance-bar-fill" [class.warn]="c.complianceRate < 70" [style.width.%]="c.complianceRate">
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="compliance-rate-text" [class.warn]="c.complianceRate < 70">
            {{ c.complianceRate | number:'1.0-0' }}% ({{ c.filedCount }}/{{ c.totalRegistered }})
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ng-container>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- ─── Available Reports Grid ─────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="section-header-row">
    <span class="section-title-text">Available Reports</span>
    <span style="font-size:12px;color:#888">FY {{ filters.fiscalYear }}</span>
  </div>

  <div class="reports-grid">
    <ng-container *ngFor="let r of reportCards">

      <!-- Admin/Officer only cards -->
      <div class="report-card" *ngIf="r.reportType !== 'VAT_COLLECTION' && r.reportType !== 'IMPORT_DUTY'
             && r.reportType !== 'PENALTY_COLLECTION' && r.reportType !== 'INCOME_TAX'">
        <div class="rc-header">
          <div class="rc-icon" [ngClass]="'rc-icon ' + r.color"><i [class]="r.icon"></i></div>
          <div class="rc-count">{{ r.count }}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="rc-title">{{ r.title }}</div>
        <div class="rc-desc">{{ r.desc }}</div>

        <div class="rc-actions" style="position:relative" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
          <button class="btn-view-report" (click)="viewReport(r.route)">
            <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
          </button>

          <!-- Download dropdown button group -->
          <div class="download-btn-group" *ngIf="!r.downloading">
            <button class="btn-download-report btn-download-main"
              (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'excel', $event)">
              <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Excel
            </button>
            <button class="btn-download-report btn-download-caret" (click)="toggleDropdown(r.reportType, $event)">
              <i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i>
            </button>

            <!-- Dropdown menu -->
            <div class="download-dropdown-menu" *ngIf="activeDropdown === r.reportType">
              <button (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'pdf', $event)">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill text-danger"></i> PDF
              </button>
              <button (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'excel', $event)">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-excel-fill text-success"></i> Excel
              </button>
              <button (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'csv', $event)">
                <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv text-primary"></i> CSV
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <span *ngIf="r.downloading" class="btn-download-report">
            <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span> Exporting...
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- These cards are visible only to Officers/Admins -->
      <ng-container *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_OFFICER','TAX_COMMISSIONER','SUPERVISOR','AUDITOR']">
        <div class="report-card" *ngIf="r.reportType === 'VAT_COLLECTION' || r.reportType === 'IMPORT_DUTY'
             || r.reportType === 'PENALTY_COLLECTION' || r.reportType === 'INCOME_TAX'">
          <div class="rc-header">
            <div class="rc-icon" [ngClass]="'rc-icon ' + r.color"><i [class]="r.icon"></i></div>
            <div class="rc-count">{{ r.count }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="rc-title">{{ r.title }}</div>
          <div class="rc-desc">{{ r.desc }}</div>

          <div class="rc-actions" style="position:relative" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
            <button class="btn-view-report" (click)="viewReport(r.route)">
              <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
            </button>

            <!-- Download dropdown button group -->
            <div class="download-btn-group" *ngIf="!r.downloading">
              <button class="btn-download-report btn-download-main"
                (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'excel', $event)">
                <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Excel
              </button>
              <button class="btn-download-report btn-download-caret" (click)="toggleDropdown(r.reportType, $event)">
                <i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i>
              </button>

              <!-- Dropdown menu -->
              <div class="download-dropdown-menu" *ngIf="activeDropdown === r.reportType">
                <button (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'pdf', $event)">
                  <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill text-danger"></i> PDF
                </button>
                <button (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'excel', $event)">
                  <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-excel-fill text-success"></i> Excel
                </button>
                <button (click)="downloadReport(r.reportType, 'csv', $event)">
                  <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv text-primary"></i> CSV
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <span *ngIf="r.downloading" class="btn-download-report">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span> Exporting...
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>

    </ng-container>
  </div>
</div>
```
