```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Product Details</h4>
    <p>Full taxable product information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && product">

  <!-- Product Header Card -->
  <div class="prod-header-card">
    <div class="prod-header-left">
      <div class="prod-icon">
        <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(product.category)"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="prod-code">{{ product.productCode }}</div>
        <div class="prod-name">{{ product.productName }}</div>
        <div class="prod-meta">
          <span class="hs-pill">HS: {{ product.hsCode }}</span>
          <span class="cat-pill">{{ product.category }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(product.status)">
            {{ product.status }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="prod-header-right">
      <div class="prod-rate">
        {{ product.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero' : product.taxRate + '%' }}
      </div>
      <div class="prod-rate-label">{{ product.taxType }}</div>
      <div class="prod-unit">Per {{ product.unit }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <!-- Product Information -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
        <span>Product Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Product Code</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ product.productCode }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Product Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ product.productName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">HS Code</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge code-sm">{{ product.hsCode }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.category }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Unit</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.unit }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(product.status)">
              {{ product.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tax Information -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
        <span>Tax Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ product.taxType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Rate</span>
          <span class="detail-value rate-value">
            {{ product.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero Rated (0%)' : product.taxRate + '%' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Created At</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Description (full width, only if present) -->
    <div class="detail-card full-card" *ngIf="product.description">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Description</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <p class="description-text">{{ product.description }}</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-view/taxable-product-view.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { forkJoin } from 'rxjs';
import { TaxableProductViewModel } from 'src/app/models/taxable-product.model';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { TaxableProductService } from '../../services/taxable-product.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-taxable-product-view',
  templateUrl: './taxable-product-view.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./taxable-product-view.component.css'],
})
export class TaxableProductViewComponent implements OnInit {

  product: TaxableProductViewModel | null = null;
  isLoading = false;
  private productId!: number;

  constructor(
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private toast: ToastService,
    private productService: TaxableProductService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.productId = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));
    this.loadProduct();
  }

  private loadProduct(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    forkJoin({
      product:       this.productService.getById(this.productId),
      taxStructures: this.productService.listTaxStructures(),
    }).subscribe({
      next: ({ product, taxStructures }) => {
        this.product   = this.productService.enrichProduct(product, taxStructures);
        this.isLoading = false;
      },
      error: () => {
        this.isLoading = false;
        this.toast.error('Failed to load product details.');
      },
    });
  }

  getStatusClass(s: string): string {
    switch (s) {
      case 'Active':     return 'status-active';
      case 'Inactive':   return 'status-inactive';
      case 'Restricted': return 'status-restricted';
      default:           return 'status-inactive';
    }
  }

  getCategoryIcon(category: string): string {
    switch (category) {
      case 'Electronics':    return 'bi bi-phone-fill';
      case 'Food':           return 'bi bi-egg-fried';
      case 'Clothing':       return 'bi bi-bag-fill';
      case 'Service':        return 'bi bi-gear-fill';
      case 'Industrial':     return 'bi bi-tools';
      case 'Pharmaceutical': return 'bi bi-capsule';
      case 'Automobile':     return 'bi bi-car-front-fill';
      default:               return 'bi bi-box-seam-fill';
    }
  }

  onEdit(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/taxable-products', this.productId, 'edit']);
  }

  onBack(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/taxable-products']);
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/services/taxable-product.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from 'src/app/core/constants/api.constants';
import { BaseApiService } from 'src/app/core/services/base-api.service';
import { TaxStructure } from 'src/app/models/tax-structure.model';
import {
  TaxableProduct,
  TaxableProductCreateRequest,
  TaxableProductViewModel,
} from 'src/app/models/taxable-product.model';

@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class TaxableProductService extends BaseApiService {

  constructor(http: HttpClient) {
    super(http);
  }

  // ── CRUD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  list(): Observable<TaxableProduct[]> {
    return this.get<TaxableProduct[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.TAXABLE_PRODUCTS.LIST);
  }

  getById(id: number): Observable<TaxableProduct> {
    return this.get<TaxableProduct>(`${API_ENDPOINTS.TAXABLE_PRODUCTS.LIST}/${id}`);
  }

  create(request: TaxableProductCreateRequest): Observable<void> {
    return this.post<void>(API_ENDPOINTS.TAXABLE_PRODUCTS.CREATE, request);
  }

  update(id: number, request: TaxableProductCreateRequest): Observable<void> {
    return this.put<void>(`${API_ENDPOINTS.TAXABLE_PRODUCTS.LIST}/${id}`, request);
  }

  deleteProduct(id: number): Observable<void> {
    return this.delete<void>(`${API_ENDPOINTS.TAXABLE_PRODUCTS.LIST}/${id}`);
  }

  // ── Master Data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  listCategories(): Observable<string[]> {
    return this.get<string[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.TAXABLE_PRODUCTS.CATEGORIES);
  }

  listUnits(): Observable<string[]> {
    return this.get<string[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.TAXABLE_PRODUCTS.UNITS);
  }

  listTaxStructures(): Observable<TaxStructure[]> {
    return this.get<TaxStructure[]>(API_ENDPOINTS.TAX_STRUCTURES.LIST);
  }

  // ── View Model Enrichment ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  enrichProduct(product: TaxableProduct, taxStructures: TaxStructure[]): TaxableProductViewModel {
    const ts = taxStructures.find(t => t.id === product.taxStructureId);
    return {
      ...product,
      taxType: ts?.taxType ?? product.taxType ?? 'VAT',
      taxRate: ts?.rate    ?? product.taxRate  ?? 0,
    };
  }

  enrichProducts(products: TaxableProduct[], taxStructures: TaxStructure[]): TaxableProductViewModel[] {
    return products.map(p => this.enrichProduct(p, taxStructures));
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-portal/layout/portal-layout/portal-layout.component.css
```css
/* ── Shell ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.portal-shell {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  background: #f0f2f5;
  font-family: "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif;
}

/* ── Top Nav ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.portal-nav {
  height: 64px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a7a4a 0%, #156b3f 50%, #0f5530 100%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 28px;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 200;
  box-shadow:
    0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) inset,
    0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
}

/* Brand */
.nav-brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.brand-emblem {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.brand-text {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.brand-name {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  letter-spacing: -0.2px;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.brand-sub {
  font-size: 10px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* Center title */
.nav-center {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}

.nav-title {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Right side */
.nav-right {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* User Menu */
.user-menu {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 6px 10px 6px 6px;
  border-radius: 40px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s;
  position: relative;
  user-select: none;
}

.user-menu:hover,
.user-menu.open {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
}

/* Avatar */
.user-avatar-ring {
  position: relative;
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.user-photo {
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
  display: block;
}

.user-monogram {
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.online-dot {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 1px;
  right: 1px;
  width: 9px;
  height: 9px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #4ade80;
  border: 2px solid #1a7a4a;
}

.user-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.user-name {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #fff;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.user-role {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
}

.chevron {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  transition: transform 0.2s;
}

.chevron.flipped {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

/* ── Dropdown ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.user-dropdown {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 10px);
  right: 0;
  width: 280px;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 16px;
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06),
    0 16px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16),
    0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  overflow: hidden;
  animation: dropIn 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}

@keyframes dropIn {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(-8px) scale(0.97);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
  }
}

.dropdown-profile {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0faf5, #e8f5ee);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26, 122, 74, 0.1);
}

.dp-avatar {
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.dp-photo {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 2px solid rgba(26, 122, 74, 0.2);
}

.dp-monogram {
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #1a7a4a;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 600;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.dp-info {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.dp-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #111;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.dp-email {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #777;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  margin-top: 1px;
}

.dp-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 5px;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  color: #1a7a4a;
  background: rgba(26, 122, 74, 0.1);
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 20px;
}

.dropdown-body {
  padding: 8px;
}

.dd-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #333;
  text-decoration: none;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  width: 100%;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    background 0.15s,
    color 0.15s;
  text-align: left;
}

.dd-item:hover {
  background: #f5f5f5;
  color: #111;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.dd-item.danger {
  color: #dc2626;
}
.dd-item.danger:hover {
  background: #fef2f2;
  color: #dc2626;
}

.dd-icon {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #f0f0f0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  color: #555;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}

.dd-item:hover .dd-icon {
  background: #e8e8e8;
}
.dd-item.danger .dd-icon {
  background: #fee2e2;
  color: #dc2626;
}
.dd-item.danger:hover .dd-icon {
  background: #fecaca;
}

.dd-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: #f0f0f0;
  margin: 6px 0;
}

/* ── Main Content ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.portal-main {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 28px 0;
}

.portal-container {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 28px;
}

/* ── Footer ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.portal-footer {
  height: 44px;
  background: #fff;
  border-top: 1px solid #eee;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #aaa;
}

.footer-sep {
  color: #ddd;
}

.portal-breadcrumb {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
  padding: 8px 28px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.breadcrumb-home {
  color: #1a7a4a;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  font-weight: 500;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}

.breadcrumb-home:hover { color: #155d38; }

.breadcrumb-sep {
  color: #ccc;
  font-size: 11px;
}

.breadcrumb-current {
  color: #666;
  font-weight: 400;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-portal/pages/portal-audit-detail/portal-audit-detail.component.css
```css
/* ── Action Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tp-action-banner {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  background: #fff3e0;
  border: 1px solid #fddcb5;
  border-left: 4px solid #e65100;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  margin: 0 20px 16px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #7c3500;
}

.tp-action-banner i {
  font-size: 18px;
  color: #e65100;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.tp-action-banner .btn-respond-now {
  margin-left: auto;
  background: #e65100;
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.tp-action-banner .btn-respond-now:hover {
  background: #c84500;
}

/* ── Demand Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tp-demand-banner {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 12px;
  background: #fef2f2;
  border: 1px solid #fecaca;
  border-left: 4px solid #ef4444;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  margin: 0 20px 16px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #7f1d1d;
}

.tp-demand-banner i {
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #ef4444;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-top: 2px;
}

.tp-demand-banner .btn-pay-now {
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-top: 6px;
  background: #ef4444;
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 7px 16px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.tp-demand-banner .btn-pay-now:hover {
  background: #dc2626;
}

/* ── Detail Header / Cards ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn-secondary-outline {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 9px 14px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
  background: #fff;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    background 0.2s,
    border-color 0.2s,
    color 0.2s;
}
.btn-secondary-outline:hover {
  background: #e8efff;
  border-color: #94b5ff;
}
.btn-secondary-outline:focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 63, 143, 0.18);
}

.detail-case-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  background: #eef4ff;
  padding: 5px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.detail-header-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 10px;
}
.detail-header-meta .meta-chip {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1f2937;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.detail-header-meta .status-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1f2937;
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
}

.detail-tabs-wrapper {
  margin: 0 20px 16px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
}
.detail-tabs {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}
.dtab {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #1f2937;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    background 0.2s,
    border-color 0.2s,
    color 0.2s;
}
.dtab:hover {
  background: #e8f0ff;
}
.dtab.active {
  background: #1a3f8f;
  border-color: #1a3f8f;
  color: #fff;
}
.dtab:focus-visible {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 63, 143, 0.18);
}
.dtab-content {
  padding: 0 20px 20px;
}

.info-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05);
}
.info-card .ic-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0f172a;
}
.info-card .ic-body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}
.ic-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  color: #334155;
}
.ic-row label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #64748b;
  min-width: 120px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.ic-row span {
  flex: 1;
  text-align: right;
  color: #0f172a;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ── Query Cards ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tp-query-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-type {
  font-size: 11px;
  background: #f1f4f9;
  color: #374151;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-deadline {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
  margin-left: auto;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-subject {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1c2b3a;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-text {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #374151;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-response {
  background: #f0fdf4;
  border-left: 3px solid #22c55e;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-response .tpqcr-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a7a45;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-response .tpqcr-text {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #1c2b3a;
}
.tp-query-card .tpqc-response .tpqcr-meta {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-respond-form {
  background: #f8fafb;
  border: 1px dashed #d0d7e2;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-respond-form .btn-respond {
  background: #1a6fbf;
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 8px 18px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.tp-query-card .tpqc-respond-form .btn-respond:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: #155da0;
}
.tp-query-card .tpqc-respond-form .btn-respond:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* ── Doc Request Cards ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tp-doc-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-type {
  font-size: 11px;
  background: #fff3e0;
  color: #e65100;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-deadline {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
}
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-docs {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #1c2b3a;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-reason {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #6b7280;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-fulfilled {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #1a7a45;
  margin-top: 6px;
}

/* ── Upload Zone ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone {
  background: #f8fafb;
  border: 1px dashed #d0d7e2;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 14px;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .upload-drop-zone {
  border: 2px dashed #b0bec5;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 24px;
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .upload-drop-zone i {
  font-size: 36px;
  color: #1a6fbf;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .upload-drop-zone p {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #374151;
  margin: 0 0 4px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .upload-drop-zone .upload-hint {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .upload-drop-zone.drag-over {
  border-color: #1a6fbf;
  background: #ebf3ff;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .upload-drop-zone:hover {
  border-color: #1a6fbf;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .selected-files {
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .sf-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  background: #f1f4f9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .sf-item i {
  color: #1a6fbf;
}
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .sf-item span {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #374151;
  flex: 1;
}
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .sf-item .sf-size {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
}
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .sf-item .sf-remove {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #c62828;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0 2px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .btn-upload {
  background: #1a7a45;
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 9px 20px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .btn-upload:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: #155e36;
}
.tp-doc-card .tpdc-upload-zone .btn-upload:disabled {
  opacity: 0.6;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* ── Assessment Order ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tp-assessment-order {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 28px;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-letterhead {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #1a6fbf;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-logo {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-logo-circle {
  width: 52px;
  height: 52px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #1a6fbf;
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-org {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1c2b3a;
}
.tp-assessment-order .tpao-sub {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-title {
  margin-left: auto;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1a6fbf;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-ref {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #8a94a6;
  font-family: monospace;
  margin-left: auto;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-party-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 20px;
  background: #f4f7fb;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-party-row label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
  display: block;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-party-row span {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1c2b3a;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-section-title {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a6fbf;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  padding-bottom: 6px;
  margin: 16px 0 8px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-text {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #374151;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin: 8px 0;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table th,
.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table td {
  padding: 9px 14px;
  font-size: 13px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f4f9;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table th {
  background: #f1f4f9;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #374151;
  text-align: left;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table td:last-child,
.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table th:last-child {
  text-align: right;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table .tr-highlight td {
  background: #fff8e1;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-table .tr-total td {
  background: #fef2f2;
  font-size: 14px;
  border-top: 2px solid #e8ecf0;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-appeal-box {
  background: #ebf3ff;
  border-left: 3px solid #1a6fbf;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #1c2b3a;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 8px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-appeal-box i {
  font-size: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-top: 1px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-footer-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-footer-row label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
  display: block;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-footer-row span {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1c2b3a;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-footer-row .due-date-val {
  color: #c84500;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.tp-assessment-order .tpao-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

/* ── Demand Order ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tp-demand-order {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 24px;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-badge {
  background: #ef4444;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 800;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-number {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-family: monospace;
  color: #5a6577;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-amount-box {
  text-align: center;
  background: #fef2f2;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-amount-box label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  display: block;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-amount-box .tpdo-amount {
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #c62828;
  margin: 4px 0;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-amount-box .tpdo-due {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #374151;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-amount-box .tpdo-due .overdue-tag {
  background: #ef4444;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-left: 8px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-info-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
  background: #f4f7fb;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-info-row .tpdo-info-item label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #8a94a6;
  display: block;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-info-row .tpdo-info-item span {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1c2b3a;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-payment-instructions {
  background: #f0fdf4;
  border-left: 3px solid #22c55e;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-payment-instructions .tpdo-pi-title {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a7a45;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-payment-instructions .tpdo-pi-title i {
  margin-right: 6px;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-payment-instructions .tpdo-pi-text {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #374151;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.tp-demand-order .tpdo-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 26px;
  padding-top: 12px;
  border-top: 1px solid #e8ecf0;
  align-items: center;
}

/* ── Action Buttons ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn-download {
  background: #f1f4f9;
  color: #374151;
  border: 1px solid #d0d7e2;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 9px 18px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.btn-download:hover {
  background: #e8ecf0;
}

.btn-pay-now {
  background: #ef4444;
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 9px 18px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.btn-pay-now:hover {
  background: #dc2626;
}

.btn-appeal {
  background: #fff;
  color: #c62828;
  border: 1px solid #fecaca;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 9px 18px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.btn-appeal:hover {
  background: #fef2f2;
}

/* ── Utilities ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tab-section-title {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1c2b3a;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.badge-orange {
  background: #fff3e0;
  color: #e65100;
  border: 1px solid #fddcb5;
}
.badge-teal {
  background: #e0f7fa;
  color: #00695c;
  border: 1px solid #b2ebf2;
}
.badge-purple {
  background: #f3e8ff;
  color: #6d28d9;
  border: 1px solid #ddd6fe;
}
.badge-indigo {
  background: #e0e7ff;
  color: #3730a3;
  border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
}
.badge-yellow {
  background: #fffbeb;
  color: #92400e;
  border: 1px solid #fde68a;
}
.badge-pink {
  background: #fce7f3;
  color: #9d174d;
  border: 1px solid #fbcfe8;
}
.badge-lime {
  background: #f7fee7;
  color: #3f6212;
  border: 1px solid #d9f99d;
}
.badge-muted {
  background: #f3f4f6;
  color: #6b7280;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
}

.code-val {
  font-family: "Courier New", monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a6fbf;
  background: #ebf3ff;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.due-overdue {
  color: #c62828;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.overdue {
  color: #c62828;
}

/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .tp-action-banner,
  .tp-demand-banner {
    margin: 0 12px 12px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .tp-assessment-order,
  .tp-demand-order {
    padding: 16px;
  }
  .tpdo-amount {
    font-size: 26px !important;
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-edit/user-edit.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { UserService } from '../../services/user.service';
import { ASSIGNABLE_ROLES, DEPARTMENTS } from 'src/app/shared/helpers/role-display.helper';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-user-edit',
  templateUrl: './user-edit.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./user-edit.component.css'],
})
export class UserEditComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  isLoading = true;
  isSaving  = false;
  userId    = 0;

  readonly roles       = ASSIGNABLE_ROLES;
  readonly departments = DEPARTMENTS;
  readonly statuses    = ['Active', 'Inactive', 'Suspended'];

  form!: FormGroup;
  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private fb:          FormBuilder,
    private route:       ActivatedRoute,
    private router:      Router,
    private userService: UserService,
    private toast:       ToastService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.userId = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));

    // Initialise the form immediately so the template never sees an undefined form
    this.form = this.fb.group({
      fullName:   ['', [Validators.required, Validators.minLength(3)]],
      username:   ['', [Validators.required, Validators.minLength(3)]],
      email:      ['', [Validators.required, Validators.email]],
      role:       ['', Validators.required],
      department: [''],
      status:     ['Active', Validators.required],
    });

    // Load the real user from the API
    this.userService.getById(this.userId)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
      .subscribe({
        next: (user) => {
          this.form.patchValue({
            fullName:   user.fullName,
            username:   user.username ?? '',
            email:      user.email,
            role:       user.role,
            department: user.department ?? '',
            status:     user.status,
          });
          this.isLoading = false;
        },
        error: (err) => {
          this.isLoading = false;
          const message = err?.error?.message || 'Failed to load user.';
          this.toast.error(message);
          this.router.navigate(['/users']);
        },
      });
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  // Convenience accessor for template
  get f() { return this.form.controls; }

  onSubmit(): void {
    this.form.markAllAsTouched();
    if (this.form.invalid) {
      this.toast.error('Please fill in all required fields correctly.');
      return;
    }

    this.isSaving = true;

    this.userService.update(this.userId, this.form.value)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
      .subscribe({
        next: () => {
          this.isSaving = false;
          this.toast.success('User updated successfully!');
          this.router.navigate(['/users']);
        },
        error: (err) => {
          this.isSaving = false;
          const message = err?.error?.message || 'Failed to update user.';
          this.toast.error(message);
        },
      });
  }

  onCancel(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/users/view', this.userId]);
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/user-management/pages/user-view/user-view.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
import { UserService } from '../../services/user.service';
import { User } from 'src/app/models/user.model';
import {
  getRoleClass,
  getRoleLabel,
  getStatusClass,
} from 'src/app/shared/helpers/role-display.helper';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-user-view',
  templateUrl: './user-view.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./user-view.component.css'],
})
export class UserViewComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  user: User | null = null;
  isLoading = true;
  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private route:       ActivatedRoute,
    private router:      Router,
    private userService: UserService,
    private toast:       ToastService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    const id = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));

    this.userService.getById(id)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
      .subscribe({
        next: (user) => {
          this.user      = user;
          this.isLoading = false;
        },
        error: (err) => {
          this.isLoading = false;
          const message = err?.error?.message || 'User not found.';
          this.toast.error(message);
          this.router.navigate(['/users']);
        },
      });
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  // Delegate to shared helpers — no duplication
  getRoleClass  = getRoleClass;
  getRoleLabel  = getRoleLabel;
  getStatusClass = getStatusClass;

  onEdit(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/users/edit', this.user?.id]);
  }

  onBack(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['/users']);
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/components/business-picker/business-picker.component.css
```css
/* ── List container ──────────────────────────────────────────── */

.business-picker {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-top: 4px;
}


/* ── Individual business row ─────────────────────────────────── */

.biz-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition);
  background: var(--color-bg-secondary);
}

.biz-row:hover:not(.biz-registered) {
  border-color: var(--color-accent);
  background: var(--color-accent-light);
}

.biz-row.biz-registered {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  background: var(--color-bg-secondary);
}

.biz-row.biz-selected {
  border-color: var(--color-teal);
  background: var(--color-teal-light);
}


/* ── Icon box ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.biz-icon {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: var(--color-accent-light);
  color: var(--color-accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 17px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: var(--transition);
}

.biz-row.biz-selected .biz-icon {
  background: var(--color-success-bg);
  color: var(--color-success);
}

.biz-row.biz-registered .biz-icon {
  background: var(--color-teal-light);
  color: var(--color-teal);
}


/* ── Text content ────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.biz-info {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.biz-name {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--color-text-primary);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.biz-meta {
  display: block;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-text-secondary);
  margin-top: 2px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}


/* ── Right side badges ───────────────────────────────────────── */

.biz-vat-status {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}


/* ── BIN badge (registered business) ────────────────────────── */

.bin-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  background: var(--color-teal-light);
  color: var(--color-teal);
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  border: 0.5px solid #b0e8db;
  white-space: nowrap;
}


/* ── "Register VAT" badge (unregistered business) ────────────── */

.no-bin-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  background: var(--color-accent-light);
  color: var(--color-accent);
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  border: 0.5px solid #c4d9f0;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: var(--transition);
}

.no-bin-badge.active {
  background: var(--color-success-bg);
  color: var(--color-success);
  border-color: var(--color-success-border);
}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/components/business-picker/business-picker.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output } from '@angular/core';
import { BusinessVatStatus } from '../../../../models/business.model';
import { ToastService } from '../../../../shared/toast/toast.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-business-picker',
  templateUrl: './business-picker.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./business-picker.component.css'],
})
export class BusinessPickerComponent {
  @Input() businesses: BusinessVatStatus[] = [];

  @Input() loading = false;

  @Input() selected: BusinessVatStatus | null = null;

  @Output() businessSelected = new EventEmitter<BusinessVatStatus>();

  constructor(private toast: ToastService) {}

  onSelect(b: BusinessVatStatus): void {
    if (b.vatRegistered) {
      this.toast.error(
        `"${b.businessName}" already has a VAT registration. BIN: ${b.binNo}`,
      );
      return;
    }
    this.businessSelected.emit(b);
  }

  getStatusClass(status: string | null): string {
    if (!status) return '';
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      Active:    'status-active',
      Inactive:  'status-inactive',
      Pending:   'status-pending',
      Suspended: 'status-suspended',
      Cancelled: 'status-inactive',
    };
    return map[status] ?? '';
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-list/vat-registration-list.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { Router, ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';

import { VatRegistration } from '../../../../models/vat-registration.model';
import { VatRegistrationService } from '../../services/vat-registration.service';
import { ToastService } from '../../../../shared/toast/toast.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-vat-registration-list',
  templateUrl: './vat-registration-list.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./vat-registration-list.component.css'],
})
export class VatRegistrationListComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  vatRegistrations: VatRegistration[] = [];
  searchTerm    = '';
  filterStatus  = '';
  isLoading     = false;
  showDeleteModal   = false;
  pendingDeleteId: number | null = null;
  pendingDeleteName = '';

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private vatService: VatRegistrationService,
    private route:      ActivatedRoute,
    private router:     Router,
    private toast:      ToastService,
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void { this.loadData(); }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  private loadData(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.vatService.getAll()
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)))
      .subscribe({
        next:  data => (this.vatRegistrations = data),
        error: ()   => this.toast.error('Failed to load VAT registrations.'),
      });
  }

  get filtered(): VatRegistration[] {
    const q = this.searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return this.vatRegistrations.filter(v => {
      const matchSearch = !q
        || v.binNo.toLowerCase().includes(q)
        || v.businessName.toLowerCase().includes(q)
        || v.tinNumber.toLowerCase().includes(q)
        || v.ownerName.toLowerCase().includes(q)
        || v.vatCategory.toLowerCase().includes(q)
        || v.district.toLowerCase().includes(q);
      const matchStatus = !this.filterStatus || v.status === this.filterStatus;
      return matchSearch && matchStatus;
    });
  }

  getStatusClass(s: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      Active: 'status-active', Inactive: 'status-inactive',
      Pending: 'status-pending', Suspended: 'status-suspended', Cancelled: 'status-inactive',
    };
    return map[s] ?? '';
  }

  getCategoryClass(c: string): string {
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      'Standard': 'cat-standard', 'Zero Rated': 'cat-zero',
      'Exempt': 'cat-exempt', 'Special': 'cat-special',
    };
    return map[c] ?? '';
  }

  isExpired(date: string): boolean { return !!date && new Date(date) < new Date(); }

  formatCurrency(a: number): string {
    if (a >= 100_000) return `৳${(a / 100_000).toFixed(2)}L`;
    return `৳${a.toLocaleString()}`;
  }
  // ───────────────── Navigation ───────────────────────

  view(id: number): void {
    this.router.navigate(['view', id], {
      relativeTo: this.route
    });
  }

  edit(id: number): void {
    this.router.navigate(['edit', id], {
      relativeTo: this.route
    });
  }

  navigateToCreate(): void {
    this.router.navigate(['create'], {
      relativeTo: this.route
    });
  }
  

  confirmDelete(id: number, businessName: string): void {
    this.pendingDeleteId = id; this.pendingDeleteName = businessName; this.showDeleteModal = true;
  }
  
  cancelDelete(): void { this.resetDeleteState(); }
  confirmDeleteExecute(): void {
    if (this.pendingDeleteId === null) return;
    const id = this.pendingDeleteId; const name = this.pendingDeleteName;
    this.resetDeleteState(); this.delete(id, name);
  }

  private delete(id: number, businessName: string): void {
    this.vatService.remove(id).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe({
      next:  () => {
        this.vatRegistrations = this.vatRegistrations.filter(v => v.id !== id);
        this.toast.success(`VAT registration for "${businessName}" deleted successfully.`);
      },
      error: () => this.toast.error('Failed to delete VAT registration. Please try again.'),
    });
  }

  private resetDeleteState(): void {
    this.pendingDeleteId = null; this.pendingDeleteName = ''; this.showDeleteModal = false;
  }
}
```

```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
import { RouterModule } from '@angular/router';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
import { SharedModule } from 'src/app/shared/shared.module';
import { VatRegistrationRoutingModule } from './vat-registration-routing.module';

import { VatRegistrationListComponent } from '../pages/vat-registration-list/vat-registration-list.component';
import { VatRegistrationCreateComponent } from '../pages/vat-registration-create/vat-registration-create.component';
import { VatRegistrationViewComponent } from '../pages/vat-registration-view/vat-registration-view.component';
import { VatRegistrationEditComponent } from '../pages/vat-registration-edit/vat-registration-edit.component';
import { VatRegistrationSuccessComponent } from '../pages/vat-registration-success/vat-registration-success.component';
import { BusinessPickerComponent } from '../components/business-picker/business-picker.component';

@NgModule({
  declarations: [
    VatRegistrationListComponent,
    VatRegistrationCreateComponent,
    VatRegistrationViewComponent,
    VatRegistrationEditComponent,
    VatRegistrationSuccessComponent,

    // Child components
    BusinessPickerComponent,
  ],
  imports: [
    CommonModule,
    FormsModule,
    ReactiveFormsModule,
    RouterModule,
    SharedModule,
    VatRegistrationRoutingModule,
  ],
})
export class VatRegistrationModule {}
```

```html
<form [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" novalidate>
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit VAT Return</h4>
    <p>Update VAT return details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>


<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading VAT return data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
  <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
  <div>
    <span class="fw-bold">{{ businessName }}</span>
    <span class="banner-sub">BIN: {{ binNo }} · TIN: {{ tinNumber }}</span>
  </div>
</div>

  <!-- Section 1: Business -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Business Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">BIN, TIN and business details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">BIN No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="binNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="businessName" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Period -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Period & Status</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Filing period and current status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Return Period</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="returnPeriod">
            <option *ngFor="let p of returnPeriods" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Period</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-month input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="periodMonth">
            <option *ngFor="let m of periodOptions" [value]="m">{{ m }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="periodYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of years" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assessment Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="assessmentYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submission Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="submissionDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="dueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Tax -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-table"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Figures</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Supplies and VAT amounts</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Taxable Supplies (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="taxableSupplies" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Exempt Supplies (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="exemptSupplies" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Zero Rated Supplies (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="zeroRatedSupplies" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Output Tax (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="outputTax" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Input Tax Credit (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="inputTax" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Paid (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="taxPaid" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Net Tax Display -->
    <div class="tax-summary">
      <div class="ts-row">
        <span class="ts-label">Total Supplies</span>
        <span class="ts-value">৳{{ totalSupplies.toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ts-row">
        <span class="ts-label">Output Tax</span>
        <span class="ts-value output">৳{{ (form.value.outputTax || 0).toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ts-row">
        <span class="ts-label">Input Tax Credit</span>
        <span class="ts-value input">- ৳{{ (form.value.inputTax || 0).toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ts-divider"></div>
      <div class="ts-row total-row">
        <span class="ts-label total">Net Tax Payable</span>
        <span class="ts-value total">৳{{ netTaxPayable.toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Submission & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Submitted by and notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submitted By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="submittedBy">
            <option *ngFor="let s of submitters" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            formControlName="remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" type="submit"
      [disabled]="isSaving || form.invalid">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Return</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
</form>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/pages/vat-return-edit/vat-return-edit.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Subject, timer } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { VatReturn, VatReturnStatus } from '../../../../models/vat-return.model';
import { ToastService } from '../../../../shared/toast/toast.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-vat-return-edit',
  templateUrl: './vat-return-edit.component.html',
  styleUrls:  ['./vat-return-edit.component.css']
})
export class VatReturnEditComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  form!: FormGroup;
  isLoading   = true;
  isSaving    = false;
  binNo = '';
  tinNumber = '';
  vatId       = 0;
  returnNo    = '';
  businessName = '';
  statuses: VatReturnStatus[] = ['Draft' , 'Submitted' , 'Under Review' ,
  'Accepted' , 'Rejected' , 'Overdue' ,
  'Amended' , 'Send Back'];

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  returnPeriods   = ['Monthly', 'Quarterly', 'Annually'];
  months          = ['January','February','March','April','May','June',
                     'July','August','September','October','November','December'];
  quarters        = ['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4'];
  years           = ['2025','2024','2023','2022','2021'];
  assessmentYears = ['2025-26','2024-25','2023-24','2022-23'];
  submitters      = ['Taxpayer','Tax Officer','Data Entry Operator','Tax Commissioner'];

  constructor(
    private fb: FormBuilder,
    private route: ActivatedRoute,
    private router: Router,
    private http: HttpClient,
    private toast: ToastService
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.vatId = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));
    this.buildForm();
    this.loadData();
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {
    this.destroy$.next();
    this.destroy$.complete();
  }

  // ── Form ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  private buildForm(): void {
    this.form = this.fb.group({
      returnPeriod:      ['Monthly', Validators.required],
      periodMonth:       ['', Validators.required],
      periodYear:        ['2025', Validators.required],
      assessmentYear:    ['2025-26'],
      submissionDate:    [''],
      dueDate:           [''],
      taxableSupplies:   [0, Validators.min(0)],
      exemptSupplies:    [0, Validators.min(0)],
      zeroRatedSupplies: [0, Validators.min(0)],
      outputTax:         [0, Validators.min(0)],
      inputTax:          [0, Validators.min(0)],
      taxPaid:           [0, Validators.min(0)],
      submittedBy:       [''],
      status:     ['Draft'],
      remarks:           ['']
    });
  }

  ctrl(name: string) { return this.form.get(name); }

  get periodOptions(): string[] {
    return this.ctrl('returnPeriod')?.value === 'Quarterly' ? this.quarters : this.months;
  }

  get totalSupplies(): number {
    const v = this.form.value;
    return (v.taxableSupplies || 0) + (v.exemptSupplies || 0) + (v.zeroRatedSupplies || 0);
  }

  get netTaxPayable(): number {
    const v = this.form.value;
    return Math.max(0, (v.outputTax || 0) - (v.inputTax || 0));
  }

  // ── Load ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  private loadData(): void {
    this.isLoading = true;
    this.http.get<VatReturn>(API_ENDPOINTS.VAT_RETURNS.GET(this.vatId))
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)))
      .subscribe({
        next: (data) => {
          this.returnNo    = data.returnNo;
          this.businessName = data.businessName;
          this.binNo = data.binNo;
          this.tinNumber = data.tinNumber;
          this.form.patchValue({
            returnPeriod:      data.returnPeriod,
            periodMonth:       data.periodMonth,
            periodYear:        data.periodYear,
            assessmentYear:    data.assessmentYear,
            submissionDate:    data.submissionDate,
            dueDate:           data.dueDate,
            taxableSupplies:   data.taxableSupplies,
            exemptSupplies:    data.exemptSupplies,
            zeroRatedSupplies: data.zeroRatedSupplies,
            outputTax:         data.outputTax,
            inputTax:          data.inputTax,
            taxPaid:           data.taxPaid,
            submittedBy:       data.submittedBy,
            remarks:           data.remarks
          });
        },
        error: () => {
          this.toast.error('Failed to load VAT return data.');
          this.router.navigate(['/vat-returns']);
        }
      });
  }

  // ── Submit ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  onSubmit(): void {
    if (this.form.invalid) {
      this.form.markAllAsTouched();
      this.toast.warning('Please fill in all required fields.');
      return;
    }

    this.isSaving = true;
    const payload = {
      ...this.form.value,
      totalSupplies: this.totalSupplies,
      netTaxPayable: this.netTaxPayable
    };

    this.http.put(API_ENDPOINTS.VAT_RETURNS.UPDATE(this.vatId), payload)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => (this.isSaving = false)))
      .subscribe({
        next: () => {
          this.toast.success('VAT Return updated successfully!');
          timer(1500).pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
          .subscribe(() => this.router.navigate(['/vat-returns/view', this.vatId]));
        },
        error: (err) => {
           if (err?.status === 400) {
            this.toast.error(err.error?.message || 'Invalid data. Please check all fields.');
          } else {
            this.toast.error('Failed to update VAT return. Please try again.');
          }
        }
      });
  }

  onCancel(): void { this.router.navigate(['/vat-returns/view', this.vatId]); }
  
}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/pages/vat-return-view/vat-return-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>VAT Return Details</h4>
    <p>Full VAT return submission with workflow actions.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" [disabled]="vr?.status === 'Accepted' || vr?.status === 'Under Review'"
      (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Action Success Message -->

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading VAT return details...</p>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && vr">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="vr-header-left">
      <div class="vr-icon"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="vr-no">{{ vr.returnNo }}</div>
        <div class="vr-name">{{ vr.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="vr-meta">
          <span class="period-pill">{{ vr.returnPeriod }}</span>
          <span class="period-text">{{ vr.periodMonth }} {{ vr.periodYear }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vr.status)">{{ vr.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-header-right">
      <div class="vr-stat">
        <span class="vrs-label">Net Tax Payable</span>
        <span class="vrs-value">{{ fmt(vr.netTaxPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="vr-stat">
        <span class="vrs-label">Due Date</span>
        <span class="vrs-value sm">{{ vr.dueDate || '—' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── WORKFLOW ACTION BAR ── -->
  <div class="workflow-bar" *ngIf="canSubmit() || canStartReview() || canAccept() || canReject() || canSendBack()">
    <div class="wb-title">
      <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill"></i>
      Workflow Actions
    </div>
    <div class="wb-actions">

      <!-- TAXPAYER: Submit -->
      <button class="wf-btn submit" *ngIf="canSubmit()" (click)="openAction('Submit')">
        <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i>
        Submit Return
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_OFFICER: Start Review -->
      <button class="wf-btn review" *ngIf="canStartReview()" (click)="openAction('Start Review')">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        Start Review
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_OFFICER: Send Back -->
      <button class="wf-btn sendback" *ngIf="canSendBack()" (click)="openAction('Send Back')">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i>
        Send Back
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_COMMISSIONER: Accept -->
      <button class="wf-btn accept" *ngIf="canAccept()" (click)="openAction('Accept')">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
        Accept Return
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_COMMISSIONER: Reject -->
      <button class="wf-btn reject" *ngIf="canReject()" (click)="openAction('Reject')">
        <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i>
        Reject Return
      </button>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Tax Summary Cards -->
  <div class="tax-summary-row">
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon supplies"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Total Supplies</span>
        <span class="tsc-value">{{ fmt(vr.totalSupplies) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon output"><i class="bi bi-arrow-up-circle-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Output Tax</span>
        <span class="tsc-value output">{{ fmt(vr.outputTax) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon input"><i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Input Tax Credit</span>
        <span class="tsc-value input">{{ fmt(vr.inputTax) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card highlight">
      <div class="tsc-icon net"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Net Payable</span>
        <span class="tsc-value net">{{ fmt(vr.netTaxPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Tax Paid</span>
        <span class="tsc-value paid">{{ vr.taxPaid > 0 ? fmt(vr.taxPaid) : '—' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="details-grid">
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Return Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Return No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vr.returnNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Return Period</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.returnPeriod }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Period</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ vr.periodMonth }} {{ vr.periodYear }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Assessment Year</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.assessmentYear || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vr.status)">{{ vr.status }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>Business Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ vr.businessName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">BIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vr.binNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vr.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vr.submittedBy">
          <span class="detail-label">Submitted By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.submittedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vr.submissionDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Submitted On</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.submissionDate }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-table"></i>
        <span>Supply Breakdown</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxable Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ fmt(vr.taxableSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Exempt Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ fmt(vr.exemptSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Zero Rated Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ fmt(vr.zeroRatedSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row total-row">
          <span class="detail-label detail-label-strong">Total Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ fmt(vr.totalSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
        <span>Tax Summary & Filing</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Output Tax</span>
          <span class="detail-value tax-output">{{ fmt(vr.outputTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Input Tax Credit</span>
          <span class="detail-value tax-input">{{ fmt(vr.inputTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Paid</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.taxPaid > 0 ? fmt(vr.taxPaid) : '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Due Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.dueDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Net Tax Payable</span>
          <span class="detail-value net-payable">{{ fmt(vr.netTaxPayable) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vr.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value detail-value-note">{{ vr.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-card">
    <div class="tc-header">
      <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i>
      <span>Action History</span>
      <span class="tc-count">{{ vr.actionHistory?.length || 0 }} actions</span>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline" *ngIf="vr.actionHistory && vr.actionHistory.length > 0">
      <div class="tl-item" *ngFor="let a of vr.actionHistory; let last = last" [class.last]="last">
        <div class="tl-dot" [ngClass]="getActionColor(a.toStatus)">
          <i [class]="getActionIcon(a.action)"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-body">
          <div class="tl-action">{{ a.action }}</div>
          <div class="tl-status">
            <span class="tl-from">{{ a.fromStatus }}</span>
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-right tl-arrow"></i>
            <span class="tl-to" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(a.toStatus)">{{ a.toStatus }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-meta">
            <span class="tl-user"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ a.performedBy }}</span>
            <span class="tl-role">{{ a.role }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-remarks" *ngIf="a.remarks">
            <i class="bi bi-chat-left-text-fill"></i> {{ a.remarks }}
          </div>
          <div class="tl-time">{{ a.timestamp }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="no-history" *ngIf="!vr.actionHistory || vr.actionHistory.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-clock"></i>
      <p>No action history yet</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</ng-container>

<!-- ── ACTION MODAL ── -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showActionModal" (click)="closeModal()">
  <div class="action-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">

    <div class="am-header" [ngClass]="'am-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')">
      <div class="am-icon">
        <i [class]="
          currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'bi bi-send-fill'           :
          currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'bi bi-search'              :
          currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill'   :
          currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'       :
                                             'bi bi-arrow-return-left'
        "></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="am-title">{{ currentAction }} Return</div>
        <div class="am-sub">{{ vr?.returnNo }} — {{ vr?.businessName }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="am-body">

      <div class="am-info">
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>Current Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vr?.status || '')">{{ vr?.status }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>New Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(
            currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'Submitted'    :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'Accepted'     :
            currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'Rejected'     : 'Send Back'
          )">
            {{
            currentAction === 'Submit' ? 'Submitted' :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept' ? 'Accepted' :
            currentAction === 'Reject' ? 'Rejected' : 'Send Back'
            }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="am-remarks-wrap">
        <label class="am-label">
          Remarks
          <span class="required-star" *ngIf="currentAction === 'Reject' || currentAction === 'Send Back'">
            * Required
          </span>
        </label>
        <textarea class="am-remarks" [placeholder]="
            currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'Optional remarks...'                            :
            currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'Required — reason for rejection...'             :
            currentAction === 'Send Back'    ? 'Required — what needs to be corrected...'       :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Optional — any initial observations...'         :
                                               'Optional remarks...'
          " [(ngModel)]="actionRemarks" rows="3">
        </textarea>
        <div class="am-error" *ngIf="actionError">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ actionError }}
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="am-footer">
      <button class="am-btn-cancel" (click)="closeModal()" [disabled]="isActing">
        Cancel
      </button>
      <button class="am-btn-confirm" [ngClass]="'am-confirm-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')"
        (click)="confirmAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        <span *ngIf="!isActing">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Confirm {{ currentAction }}
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isActing">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Processing...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
