```typescript
export type RefundType =
  | 'INCOME_TAX'
  | 'VAT'
  | 'AIT'
  | 'DUPLICATE_PAYMENT'
  | 'APPEAL_DECISION'
  | 'OTHER';

export type RefundStatus =
  | 'DRAFT'
  | 'SUBMITTED'
  | 'UNDER_VERIFICATION'
  | 'INFO_REQUESTED'
  | 'RESPONSE_RECEIVED'
  | 'RECOMMENDED'
  | 'SUPERVISOR_REVIEW'
  | 'APPROVED'
  | 'REJECTED'
  | 'PAYMENT_PENDING'
  | 'PAYMENT_PROCESSING'
  | 'PAID'
  | 'FAILED'
  | 'CANCELLED'
  | 'CLOSED';

export interface BankDetails {
  bankName: string;
  bankBranch: string;
  accountHolderName: string;
  accountNumber: string;
  routingNumber: string;
  mfsProvider?: string;
  mfsNumber?: string;
}

export interface EligibleSourceRecord {
  id: number;
  reference: string;
  periodLabel: string;
  taxPaid: number;
  taxLiability: number;
  excessAmount: number;
  fiscalYear: string;
}

export interface RefundCalculation {
  totalTaxPaid: number;
  totalTaxLiability: number;
  previouslyClaimed: number;
  eligibleRefundAmount: number;
  calculationBasis: string;
}

export interface RefundSummary {
  id: number;
  refundReferenceNo: string;
  tin: string;
  taxpayerName: string;
  refundType: RefundType;
  fiscalYearName: string;
  claimedRefundAmount: number;
  verifiedRefundAmount: number | null;
  approvedRefundAmount: number | null;
  status: RefundStatus;
  isFlaggedForAudit: boolean;
  submittedAt: string | null;
  approvedAt: string | null;
  paidAt: string | null;
  updatedAt: string | null;
  documentCount: number;
}

export interface RefundDetail extends RefundSummary {
  totalTaxPaid: number;
  totalTaxLiability: number;
  sources: any[];
  bankDetails: BankDetails;
  documents: any[];
  statusHistory: any[];
  rejectionReasonCode: string | null;
  rejectionReasonText: string | null;
  officerNotes: string | null;
  supervisorNotes: string | null;
  appealReferenceNo: string | null;
  courtOrderNo: string | null;
  bankValidated: boolean;
  itrRecordId: number | null;
}

export interface RefundFilterRequest {
  status?: string;
  refundType?: string;
  fiscalYearId?: number;
  page?: number;
  size?: number;
  sortBy?: string;
  sortDir?: string;
}

export interface PagedResponse<T> {
  content: T[];
  totalElements: number;
  totalPages: number;
  size: number;
  number: number;
}

export interface CreateRefundRequest {
  refundType: RefundType;
  fiscalYearId: number;
  taxpayerId?: number; // ← Officer: set this; Taxpayer: omit
  sources: {
    sourceType: string;
    sourceRecordId: number;
    sourceAmount: number;
  }[];
  requestedAmount: number;
  bankDetails: BankDetails;
  appealReferenceNo?: string;
  courtOrderNo?: string;
}

export interface RespondRequest {
  responseText: string;
}

export interface RefundStatusHistory {
  id: number;
  fromStatus: RefundStatus | null;
  toStatus: RefundStatus;
  changedByName: string;
  changedByRole: string;
  changedAt: string;
  changeReason: string | null;
}

export interface RefundDocument {
  id: number;
  documentType: string;
  documentName: string;
  originalFilename: string;
  fileSizeBytes: number;
  verificationStatus: 'PENDING' | 'VERIFIED' | 'REJECTED';
  uploadedAt: string;
}
```

```typescript
// ── Wizard shared state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export type AccountCategory = 'Individual' | 'Business' | 'Organization';

export interface RegistrationState {
  // Step 1
  accountCategory:  AccountCategory | null;
  taxpayerTypeId:   number | null;
  taxpayerTypeName: string;

  // Step 2
  fullName:        string;
  email:           string;
  phone:           string;
  password:        string;
  confirmPassword: string;

  // Step 3 — Individual
  nid:             string;
  dateOfBirth:     string;
  gender:          string;
  profession:      string;

  // Step 3 — existing TIN toggle (Individual & Company)
  hasExistingTin:  boolean;
  existingTin:     string;

  // Step 3 — Business / Organization
  companyName:          string;
  rjscNo:               string;
  incorporationDate:    string;
  natureOfBusiness:     string;
  authorizedPersonName: string;
  authorizedPersonNid:  string;
}

export function emptyState(): RegistrationState {
  return {
    accountCategory: null, taxpayerTypeId: null, taxpayerTypeName: '',
    fullName: '', email: '', phone: '', password: '', confirmPassword: '',
    nid: '', dateOfBirth: '', gender: '', profession: '',
    hasExistingTin: false, existingTin: '',
    companyName: '', rjscNo: '', incorporationDate: '',
    natureOfBusiness: '', authorizedPersonName: '', authorizedPersonNid: '',
  };
}

// ── Backend payload ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export interface UserRegistrationRequest {
  taxpayerTypeId:  number;
  accountCategory: AccountCategory;
  fullName:        string;
  email:           string;
  phone:           string;
  password:        string;

  existingTin?:    string;

  // Individual only
  nid?:         string;
  dateOfBirth?: string;
  gender?:      string;
  profession?:  string;

  // Business / Organization only
  companyName?:          string;
  rjscNo?:               string;
  incorporationDate?:    string;
  natureOfBusiness?:     string;
  authorizedPersonName?: string;
  authorizedPersonNid?:  string;
}

// ── Backend success response ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
export interface RegistrationResponse {
  userId:           number;
  taxpayerId:       number;
  tinNumber:        string;
  fullName:         string;
  email:            string;
  accountCategory:  AccountCategory;
  taxpayerTypeName: string;
  message:          string;
}
```

```typescript
export type VatStatus   = 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Pending' | 'Suspended' | 'Cancelled';
export type VatCategory = 'Standard' | 'Zero Rated' | 'Exempt' | 'Special';
export type ReturnPeriod = 'Monthly' | 'Quarterly';


export interface VatRegistration {
  id:               number;
  binNo:            string;
  tinNumber:        string;
  businessName:     string;
  ownerName:        string;
  vatCategory:      VatCategory;
  businessType:     string;
  businessCategory: string;
  tradeLicenseNo:   string;
  registrationDate: string;
  effectiveDate:    string;
  expiryDate:       string;
  annualTurnover:   number;
  email:            string;
  phone:            string;
  address:          string;
  district:         string;
  division:         string;
  vatZone:          string;
  vatCircle:        string;
  zoneId:           number;
  status:           VatStatus;
  remarks:          string;
}


export interface VatRegistrationCreateRequest {
  // Foreign-key IDs resolved server-side
  taxpayerId:  number;
  businessId?: number | null;
  vatZoneId:   number;
  vatCircleId: number;
  districtId?: number | null;
  divisionId?: number | null;

  // VAT classification

  returnPeriod?: ReturnPeriod;     // Monthly | Quarterly — backend addition needed

  // Dates
  registrationDate: string;
  effectiveDate?:   string;
  expiryDate?:      string;

  // Optional officer notes
  remarks?: string;
}
```

## File: src/app/core/guards/auth.guard.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import {
  CanActivate,
  CanActivateChild,
  ActivatedRouteSnapshot,
  RouterStateSnapshot,
  Router
} from '@angular/router';
import { AuthService } from '../services/auth.service';
import { Role } from '../constants/roles.constants';

@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class AuthGuard implements CanActivate, CanActivateChild {

  constructor(private authService: AuthService, private router: Router) {}

  canActivate(_route: ActivatedRouteSnapshot, state: RouterStateSnapshot): boolean {
    return this.checkAccess(state);
  }

  canActivateChild(_childRoute: ActivatedRouteSnapshot, state: RouterStateSnapshot): boolean {
    return this.checkAccess(state);
  }

  private checkAccess(state: RouterStateSnapshot): boolean {
    if (!this.authService.isLoggedIn) {
      this.router.navigate(['/auth/login'], {
        queryParams: { returnUrl: state.url }
      });
      return false;
    }

    const userRole     = this.authService.userRole;
    const approvalStatus = this.authService.currentUser?.approvalStatus;

    if (userRole === Role.TAXPAYER) {

      // PENDING_REVIEW 
      if (approvalStatus === 'PENDING_REVIEW') {
        const allowed =
          state.url.startsWith('/my-portal/application-status') ||
          state.url.includes('/taxpayers/edit/')   ||
          state.url.includes('/my-portal/notices');

        if (!allowed) {
          this.router.navigate(['/my-portal/application-status']);
          return false;
        }
      }

      // REJECTED 
      if (approvalStatus === 'REJECTED') {
        const allowed =
          state.url.startsWith('/my-portal/application-status') ||
          state.url.includes('/taxpayers/edit/')       ||
          state.url.includes('/my-portal/notices');   

        if (!allowed) {
          this.router.navigate(['/my-portal/application-status']);
          return false;
        }
      }

      // APPROVED 
      if (approvalStatus === 'APPROVED') {
        if (!state.url.startsWith('/my-portal')) {
          this.router.navigate(['/my-portal']);
          return false;
        }
      }
    }

    const requiredRoles = this.collectRequiredRoles(state);
    if (requiredRoles.length > 0) {
      const hasRole =
        userRole === Role.SUPER_ADMIN ||
        requiredRoles.includes(userRole);

      if (!hasRole) {
        this.router.navigate(['/unauthorized']);
        return false;
      }
    }

    return true;
  }

  private collectRequiredRoles(state: RouterStateSnapshot): Role[] {
    let current: ActivatedRouteSnapshot | null = state.root;
    let required: Role[] = [];
    while (current) {
      const roles = current.data['roles'] as Role[] | undefined;
      if (roles?.length) {
        required = roles;
      }
      current = current.firstChild;
    }
    return required;
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/ait/ait-routing.module.ts
```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { RouterModule, Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { AuthGuard } from 'src/app/core/guards/auth.guard';
import { Role } from 'src/app/core/constants/roles.constants';
import { AitDashboardComponent } from '../pages/ait-dashboard/ait-dashboard.component';
import { AitCreateWizardComponent } from '../pages/ait-create-wizard/ait-create-wizard.component';
import { OfficerDashboardComponent } from '../pages/officer-dashboard/officer-dashboard.component';
import { OfficerReviewComponent } from '../pages/officer-review/officer-review.component';
import { AitCreditLedgerComponent } from '../pages/ait-credit-ledger/ait-credit-ledger.component';

const routes: Routes = [
  {
    path: '',
    component: AitDashboardComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: {
      roles: [
        Role.TAXPAYER,
        Role.TAX_OFFICER,
        Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER,
        Role.AUDITOR,
        Role.DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR,
        Role.SUPER_ADMIN,
      ],
    },
  },
  {
    path: 'create',
    component: AitCreateWizardComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: {
      roles: [
        Role.TAXPAYER,
        Role.TAX_OFFICER,
        Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER,
        Role.DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR,
        Role.SUPER_ADMIN,
      ],
    },
  },
  {
    path: 'officer-dashboard',
    component: OfficerDashboardComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: {
      roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.SUPER_ADMIN],
    },
  },
  {
    path: 'review/:id',
    component: OfficerReviewComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: {
      roles: [Role.TAX_OFFICER, Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER, Role.SUPER_ADMIN, Role.TAXPAYER],
    },
  },
  {
    path: 'credits',
    component: AitCreditLedgerComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: {
      roles: [
        Role.TAXPAYER,
        Role.TAX_OFFICER,
        Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER,
        Role.SUPER_ADMIN,
      ],
    },
  },
  {
    path: ':id',
    component: OfficerReviewComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: {
      roles: [
        Role.TAXPAYER,
        Role.TAX_OFFICER,
        Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER,
        Role.AUDITOR,
        Role.DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR,
        Role.SUPER_ADMIN,
      ],
    },
  },
  {
    path: ':id/edit',
    component: AitCreateWizardComponent,
    canActivate: [AuthGuard],
    data: {
      roles: [
        Role.TAXPAYER,
        Role.TAX_OFFICER,
        Role.TAX_COMMISSIONER,
        Role.DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR,
        Role.SUPER_ADMIN,
      ],
    },
  },
];

@NgModule({
  imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
  exports: [RouterModule],
})
export class AitRoutingModule {}
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-create-wizard/ait-create-wizard.component.html
```html
<!-- ait-create.component.html -->
<!-- Pattern: matches income-tax-return-create.component.html structure exactly -->

<!-- ── Topbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="itr-topbar">
  <div>
    <div class="topbar-title">
      Advance Income Tax (AIT) — {{ fiscalYearName || '—' }}
    </div>
    <div class="topbar-meta">
      <ng-container *ngIf="step1Form.get('taxpayerName')?.value; else noProfile">
        {{ step1Form.get('taxpayerName')?.value }}
        &nbsp;·&nbsp; TIN: {{ step1Form.get('taxpayerTin')?.value || '—' }}
        &nbsp;·&nbsp; Source: {{ getSourceLabel(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value) }}
      </ng-container>
      <ng-template #noProfile>Select a taxpayer to begin</ng-template>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <span class="badge b-draft">Draft</span>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" (click)="onCancel()">✕ Cancel</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Step Rail ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="step-rail">
  <ng-container *ngFor="let s of [1, 2, 3]; let i = index">
    <div class="step-item" [ngClass]="'s-' + getStepState(s)" (click)="goToStep(s)">
      <div class="step-circle">
        <span *ngIf="getStepState(s) === 'done'">✓</span>
        <span *ngIf="getStepState(s) !== 'done'">{{ s }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="step-label">
        <ng-container [ngSwitch]="s">
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="1">Taxpayer<br />Info</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="2">AIT<br />Details</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="3">Review &amp;<br />Submit</ng-container>
        </ng-container>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="step-line" *ngIf="i < 2" [class.done]="currentStep > s"></div>
  </ng-container>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STEP 1 — Taxpayer Info
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 1" [formGroup]="step1Form">

  <!-- Officer: taxpayer search -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="!isTaxpayerRole">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-hdr">
        <div class="card-hdr-left">
          <div class="hdr-icon ic-blue">
            <i class="bi bi-search" style="font-size:12px;color:#185FA5"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="card-title">Search taxpayer</div>
            <div class="card-sub">Search by TIN, NID, or name — then select to auto-fill</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge b-info" *ngIf="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-p">
        <div class="search-row">
          <div class="search-field-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-upc-scan search-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="search-input" placeholder="Enter TIN, NID or taxpayer name…"
              [formControl]="searchControl" (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()"/>
            <button class="clear-btn" *ngIf="isAutoFilled" (click)="clearSelectedTaxpayer()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
            <span *ngIf="isSearching" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!isSearching" class="bi bi-search"></i>
            {{ isSearching ? 'Searching…' : 'Search' }}
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Search results -->
        <div class="search-results" *ngIf="searchResults.length > 0 && !isAutoFilled">
          <div class="search-result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
            <div class="result-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i></div>
            <div>
              <div class="result-name">{{ t.fullName || t.companyName }}</div>
              <div class="result-meta">TIN: {{ t.tinNumber }} · {{ t.taxpayerType.typeName }}</div>
            </div>
            <i class="bi bi-chevron-right ms-auto"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- Taxpayer profile card (auto-filled or taxpayer role) -->
  <div class="card" *ngIf="isAutoFilled || isTaxpayerRole">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-green">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check" style="font-size:12px;color:#0e7c60"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Taxpayer Profile</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Verified from registry</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">Full Name / Company</label>
          <input class="field-input" formControlName="taxpayerName" readonly />
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">TIN Number</label>
          <input class="field-input" formControlName="taxpayerTin" readonly />
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">Taxpayer Type</label>
          <input class="field-input" [value]="step1Form.get('taxpayerType.typeName')?.value" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-nav">
    <span></span>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!step1Form.get('taxpayerId')?.value">
      Next: AIT Details <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STEP 2 — AIT Details
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 2" [formGroup]="step2Form">

  <!-- Source Type -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-purple">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3" style="font-size:12px;color:#5b21b6"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">AIT Source Type</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Select the source of this advance income tax</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="source-type-grid">
        <button type="button" *ngFor="let src of sourceTypes" class="source-type-btn"
          [class.selected]="step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value === src.value" (click)="selectSourceType(src.value)">
          <i class="bi" [ngClass]="src.icon"></i>
          <span>{{ src.label }}</span>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="field-error" *ngIf="step2Form.get('sourceType')?.invalid && step2Form.get('sourceType')?.touched">
        Source type is required.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Import-specific fields -->
  <div class="card" *ngIf="step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value === 'IMPORT'">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-blue">
          <i class="bi bi-box-seam" style="font-size:12px;color:#185FA5"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Import Details</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Link import duty record and HS code</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">Import Duty Record ID</label>
          <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="importDutyRecordId" placeholder="e.g. 1042" />
          <div class="field-error"
            *ngIf="step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.invalid && step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.touched">
            Import duty record ID is required for IMPORT source.
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">HS Code</label>
          <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="hsCode" placeholder="e.g. 8471.30" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Deductor fields (Supplier / Salary / Contractor / Rent) -->
  <div class="card" *ngIf="['SUPPLIER','SALARY','CONTRACTOR','RENT'].includes(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value)">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-amber">
          <i class="bi bi-building" style="font-size:12px;color:#b45309"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Deductor Information</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Who deducted this tax at source?</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">Deductor Name</label>
          <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="deductorName"
            placeholder="Company or individual name" />
          <div class="field-error"
            *ngIf="step2Form.get('deductorName')?.invalid && step2Form.get('deductorName')?.touched">
            Deductor name is required.
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">Deductor TIN</label>
          <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="deductorTin" placeholder="Optional" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Financial Details -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-green">
          <i class="bi bi-calculator" style="font-size:12px;color:#0e7c60"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Financial Details</div>
          <div class="card-sub">AIT is calculated automatically from taxable value and rate</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">Taxable Value (৳)</label>
          <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="taxableValue" placeholder="0.00" min="0.01"
            step="0.01" (input)="recalculate()" />
          <div class="field-error"
            *ngIf="step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.invalid && step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.touched">
            Taxable value must be greater than zero.
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">AIT Rate (%)</label>
          <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="aitRate" placeholder="e.g. 5" min="0.01" max="100"
            step="0.01" (input)="recalculate()" />
          <div class="field-error" *ngIf="step2Form.get('aitRate')?.invalid && step2Form.get('aitRate')?.touched">
            AIT rate must be between 0.01 and 100.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Calculated amount (read-only) -->
      <div class="ait-calc-panel" *ngIf="calculatedAitAmount > 0">
        <div class="calc-row">
          <span class="calc-label">Taxable Value</span>
          <span class="calc-val">{{ formatCurrency(step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.value) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="calc-row">
          <span class="calc-label">AIT Rate</span>
          <span class="calc-val">{{ step2Form.get('aitRate')?.value }}%</span>
        </div>
        <div class="calc-divider"></div>
        <div class="calc-row total">
          <span class="calc-label">AIT Amount</span>
          <span class="calc-total">{{ formatCurrency(calculatedAitAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-nav">
    <button class="btn btn-outline" (click)="prevStep()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="step2Form.invalid">
      Next: Review <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STEP 3 — Review & Submit
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 3">

  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-purple">
          <i class="bi bi-clipboard-check" style="font-size:12px;color:#5b21b6"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Review &amp; Submit</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Confirm all details before submission</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">

      <!-- Taxpayer summary -->
      <div class="review-section">
        <div class="review-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i> Taxpayer
        </div>
        <div class="review-grid">
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Name</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ step1Form.get('taxpayerName')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">TIN</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-mono">{{ step1Form.get('taxpayerTin')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Fiscal Year</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ fiscalYearName }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- AIT details summary -->
      <div class="review-section">
        <div class="review-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i> AIT Details
        </div>
        <div class="review-grid">
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Source Type</span>
            <span class="rv-val">
              <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value)">
                {{ getSourceLabel(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value) }}
              </span>
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row" *ngIf="step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.value">
            <span class="rv-label">Import Duty Record</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-mono">{{ step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row" *ngIf="step2Form.get('hsCode')?.value">
            <span class="rv-label">HS Code</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-mono">{{ step2Form.get('hsCode')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row" *ngIf="step2Form.get('deductorName')?.value">
            <span class="rv-label">Deductor</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ step2Form.get('deductorName')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Taxable Value</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ formatCurrency(step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.value) }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">AIT Rate</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ step2Form.get('aitRate')?.value }}%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row highlight">
            <span class="rv-label">AIT Amount</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-total">{{ formatCurrency(calculatedAitAmount) }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Documents upload -->
      <div class="review-section">
        <div class="review-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i> Supporting Documents
          <span class="badge b-warning ms-2">Required before submission</span>
        </div>
        <div class="doc-upload-area" (click)="fileInput.click()" [class.has-files]="uploadedFiles.length > 0">
          <input #fileInput type="file" multiple hidden accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png"
            (change)="onFileSelected($event)" />
          <i class="bi bi-cloud-upload" style="font-size:24px;color:#7c3aed"></i>
          <p>Click to upload documents (PDF, JPG, PNG)</p>
          <p class="doc-hint">Challan copy, import documents, or any supporting evidence</p>
        </div>
        <div class="file-list" *ngIf="uploadedFiles.length > 0">
          <div class="file-item" *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-fill"></i>
            <span>{{ f.name }}</span>
            <span class="file-size">({{ (f.size / 1024).toFixed(1) }} KB)</span>
            <button class="remove-file-btn" (click)="removeFile(i)">
              <i class="bi bi-x"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-nav">
    <button class="btn btn-outline" (click)="prevStep()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || uploadedFiles.length === 0">
      <span *ngIf="isSaving" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span>
      <i *ngIf="!isSaving" class="bi bi-send-fill"></i>
      {{ isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Submit AIT Record' }}
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/officer-review/officer-review.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>AIT Review</h4>
    <p>Review, verify, and process this advance income tax record.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" routerLink="/ait/officer-dashboard">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Queue
  </button>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper" *ngIf="ait; else loading">

  <!-- ── Status Progress Tracker ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="workflow-tracker">
    <ng-container *ngFor="let step of workflowSteps; let i = index; let last = last">
      <div class="wf-step" [class.done]="isStepDone(step.status)" [class.active]="isStepActive(step.status)"
        [class.rejected]="step.status === 'REJECTED' && ait.status === 'REJECTED'">
        <div class="wf-dot">
          <i class="bi" [ngClass]="isStepDone(step.status) ? 'bi-check-lg' : step.icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="wf-label">{{ step.label }}</div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!last" class="wf-line" [class.done]="isStepDone(step.status)"></div>
    </ng-container>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Two-column layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="review-layout">

    <!-- LEFT: Record details ──────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="review-main">

      <!-- Taxpayer card -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Verified taxpayer profile</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Name</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.taxpayerName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">TIN</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.taxpayerTin }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Fiscal Year</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.fiscalYearName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Submitted</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm' }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- AIT Details card -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">AIT Record — {{ ait.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Source: {{ getSourceLabel(ait!.sourceType) }}</div>
          </div>
          <span class="status-badge ms-auto" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(ait!.status)">
            {{ getStatusLabel(ait!.status) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Source Type</span>
            <span class="detail-val">
              <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(ait!.sourceType)">
                <i class="bi" [ngClass]="getSourceIcon(ait!.sourceType)"></i>
                {{ getSourceLabel(ait!.sourceType) }}
              </span>
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.importDutyRecordId">
            <span class="detail-label">Import Duty Record</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.importDutyRecordId }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.hsCode">
            <span class="detail-label">HS Code</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.hsCode }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.deductorName">
            <span class="detail-label">Deductor</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.deductorName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Taxable Value</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ formatCurrency(ait.taxableValue) }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">AIT Rate</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.aitRate }}%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row highlight">
            <span class="detail-label">Calculated AIT</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-amount">{{ formatCurrency(ait.calculatedAitAmount) }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.approvedAitAmount">
            <span class="detail-label">Approved AIT</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-amount approved">{{ formatCurrency(ait.approvedAitAmount) }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Challan card -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="ait.challanNumber || ait.status === 'SUBMITTED'">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-bank"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Challan Verification</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Treasury payment proof</div>
          </div>
          <span class="challan-verified ms-auto" *ngIf="ait.challanVerified">
            <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i> Verified
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Verify challan form (officer only, SUBMITTED records) -->
        <div class="card-p" *ngIf="!ait.challanVerified && ait.status === 'SUBMITTED' && isOfficerRole">
          <form [formGroup]="challanForm" (ngSubmit)="onVerifyChallan()">
            <div class="form-grid-2">
              <div class="field-group">
                <label class="field-label required">Challan Number</label>
                <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="challanNumber"
                  placeholder="e.g. CH-2024-00123" />
              </div>
              <div class="field-group">
                <label class="field-label required">Bank Name</label>
                <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="bankName" placeholder="e.g. Sonali Bank" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-action-row">
              <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" [disabled]="challanForm.invalid || isActioning">
                <i class="bi bi-check-circle"></i> Verify &amp; Move to Review Queue
              </button>
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>

        <!-- Challan details (already verified) -->
        <div class="detail-grid" *ngIf="ait.challanNumber">
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Challan No.</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.challanNumber }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Bank</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.bankName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.challanVerifiedBy">
            <span class="detail-label">Verified By</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.challanVerifiedBy }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Documents -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Supporting Documents</div>
            <div class="section-sub">{{ ait.documents.length }} file(s) attached</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <div class="doc-list">
            <a class="doc-item" *ngFor="let doc of ait.documents" [href]="getDocDownloadUrl(doc.id)" target="_blank">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-fill"></i>
              <span class="doc-name">{{ doc.fileName }}</span>
              <span class="doc-size">{{ (doc.fileSize / 1024).toFixed(1) }} KB</span>
              <i class="bi bi-download ms-auto"></i>
            </a>
          </div>
          <!-- Empty state -->
          <div class="empty-state-sm" *ngIf="!ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i>
            <span>No documents attached.</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- RIGHT: Officer actions + audit trail ─────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="review-sidebar">

      <!-- Taxpayer submit action -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="isTaxpayerRole && ait.status === 'DRAFT'">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Submit Record</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Ready to submit to tax authority?</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <p class="mb-12">
            Make sure all documents are uploaded before submitting. Once submitted, you cannot edit this record.
          </p>
          <button class="btn btn-primary w-full" (click)="onSubmitRecord()"
            [disabled]="isActioning || !ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-send"></i> Submit AIT Record
          </button>
          <div class="field-hint text-danger mt-10" *ngIf="!ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
            Upload at least one document before submitting.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Officer submit (officer can submit DRAFT records) -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="isOfficerRole && ait.status === 'DRAFT'">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Submit Record</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Submit to tax authority for review</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <p class="mb-12">Documents uploaded: {{ ait.documents.length || 0 }} file(s). Once submitted, you cannot
            edit.</p>
          <button class="btn btn-primary w-full" (click)="onSubmitRecord()"
            [disabled]="isActioning || !ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-send"></i> Submit AIT Record
          </button>
          <div class="field-hint text-danger mt-10" *ngIf="!ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
            ⚠ Upload at least one document first.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Officer actions -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="isOfficerRole && canAct()">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Officer Actions</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Review and process this record</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">

          <!-- Assign to myself (PENDING) -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'PENDING'">
            <button class="btn btn-primary w-full" (click)="onAssign()" [disabled]="isActioning">
              <i class="bi bi-person-check"></i> Take Assignment
            </button>
          </ng-container>

          <!-- Approve / Reject form (UNDER_REVIEW) -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'UNDER_REVIEW'">
            <form [formGroup]="reviewForm">
              <div class="field-group mb-12">
                <label class="field-label">Approved Amount (৳)</label>
                <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="approvedAmount"
                  [placeholder]="'Default: ' + ait.calculatedAitAmount" />
                <small class="field-hint">Leave blank to use calculated amount</small>
              </div>
              <div class="field-group mb-12">
                <label class="field-label">Approval Notes</label>
                <textarea class="field-input" formControlName="approvalNotes" rows="3"
                  placeholder="Optional notes for taxpayer…"></textarea>
              </div>
              <div class="action-btn-group">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-success" (click)="onApprove()" [disabled]="isActioning">
                  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Approve
                </button>
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" (click)="showRejectPanel = !showRejectPanel"
                  [disabled]="isActioning">
                  <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i> Reject
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>

            <!-- Reject panel -->
            <div class="reject-panel" *ngIf="showRejectPanel">
              <form [formGroup]="rejectForm" (ngSubmit)="onReject()">
                <div class="field-group">
                  <label class="field-label required">Rejection Reason</label>
                  <textarea class="field-input" formControlName="rejectionReason" rows="3"
                    placeholder="Explain why this record is rejected…"></textarea>
                  <div class="field-error"
                    *ngIf="rejectForm.get('rejectionReason')?.invalid && rejectForm.get('rejectionReason')?.touched">
                    Rejection reason is required.
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="action-btn-group mt-10">
                  <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline" (click)="showRejectPanel = false">Cancel</button>
                  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger" [disabled]="rejectForm.invalid || isActioning">
                    <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i> Confirm Reject
                  </button>
                </div>
              </form>
            </div>
          </ng-container>

          <!-- Credit (APPROVED) -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'APPROVED'">
            <div class="credit-summary">
              <div class="credit-amount">{{ formatCurrency(ait.approvedAitAmount || ait.calculatedAitAmount) }}</div>
              <div class="credit-label">Ready to be credited to taxpayer ITR</div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-success w-full" (click)="onCredit()" [disabled]="isActioning">
              <i class="bi bi-currency-exchange"></i> Post Credit to ITR Ledger
            </button>
          </ng-container>

          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'CREDITED'">
            <div class="credit-summary">
              <div class="credit-amount">
                {{ formatCurrency(ait.approvedAitAmount || ait.calculatedAitAmount) }}
              </div>
              <div class="credit-label">AIT credit has been posted to taxpayer ledger</div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-success w-full" (click)="onDownloadCertificate()">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i>
              Download AIT Certificate (PDF)
            </button>
          </ng-container>

        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Rejection reason (visible to taxpayer) -->
      <div class="form-card rejection-card" *ngIf="ait.status === 'REJECTED' && ait.rejectionReason">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon rejection-icon"><i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Rejection Reason</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <p class="rejection-text">{{ ait.rejectionReason }}</p>
          <button class="btn btn-outline w-full mt-10" *ngIf="isTaxpayerRole" routerLink="/ait/{{ ait.id }}/edit">
            <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Correct &amp; Resubmit
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Status Audit Trail -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Audit Trail</div>
            <div class="section-sub">{{ ait.statusHistory.length || 0 }} events</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <div class="audit-timeline">
            <div class="audit-event" *ngFor="let event of ait.statusHistory"
              [class.event-rejected]="event.toStatus === 'REJECTED'">
              <div class="audit-dot">
                <i class="bi bi-circle-fill"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="audit-body">
                <div class="audit-transition">
                  <span class="audit-from" *ngIf="event.fromStatus">{{ event.fromStatus }}</span>
                  <i class="bi bi-arrow-right" *ngIf="event.fromStatus"></i>
                  <span class="audit-to">{{ event.toStatus }}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="audit-meta">
                  <span>{{ event.changedBy }}</span>
                  <span>·</span>
                  <span>{{ event.changedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm' }}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="audit-reason" *ngIf="event.changeReason">
                  {{ event.changeReason }}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="!ait.statusHistory.length">
              <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i>
              <p>No history yet.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<ng-template #loading>
  <div class="loading-row">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
    <span>Loading AIT record…</span>
  </div>
</ng-template>
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-create/audit-create.component.ts
```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
import { FormBuilder, FormControl, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Subject, debounceTime, distinctUntilChanged, finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs';
import { AuditService } from '../../service/audit.service';
import { Taxpayer } from '../../../../models/taxpayer.model';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { ToastService } from '../../../../shared/toast/toast.service';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-audit-create',
  templateUrl: './audit-create.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./audit-create.component.css']
})
export class AuditCreateComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {

  auditForm!:            FormGroup;
  taxpayerSearchControl = new FormControl('');
  isEditMode            = false;
  isSubmitting          = false;
  caseId: number | null = null;

  // Taxpayer search 
  searchQuery    = '';
  isSearching    = false;
  taxpayerResults: Taxpayer[] = [];
  selectedTaxpayer: Taxpayer | null = null;
  showResults    = false;
  hasSearched    = false;

  readonly fiscalYears = ['2024-25', '2023-24', '2022-23', '2021-22', '2020-21'];

  private destroy$ = new Subject<void>();

  constructor(
    private fb:           FormBuilder,
    private router:       Router,
    private route:        ActivatedRoute,
    private http:         HttpClient,
    private auditService: AuditService,
    private toast:        ToastService
  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {
    this.buildForm();
    const id = this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id');
    if (id) { this.isEditMode = true; this.caseId = +id; this.loadCase(+id); }
  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void { this.destroy$.next(); this.destroy$.complete(); }

  buildForm(): void {
    this.auditForm = this.fb.group({
      taxpayerId:          [null, Validators.required],
      taxpayerName:        [''],
      tinDisplay:          [{ value: '', disabled: true }],
      auditType:           ['', Validators.required],
      taxType:             ['', Validators.required],
      triggerReason:       ['', Validators.required],
      fiscalYear:          [''],
      taxPeriodStart:      [''],
      taxPeriodEnd:        [''],
      riskScore:           [0],
      priority:            ['NORMAL'],
      returnReference:     [''],
      assignedOfficerId:   [null],
      assignedOfficerName: [''],
      supervisorId:        [null],
      supervisorName:      [''],
      scheduledDate:       [''],
      dueDate:             [''],
      remarks:             [''],
    });
  }

  get f() { return this.auditForm.controls; }

  loadCase(id: number): void {
    this.auditService.getCaseById(id).subscribe({
      next: c => {
        this.auditForm.patchValue({
          taxpayerId: c.taxpayerId, taxpayerName: c.taxpayerName, tinDisplay: c.tinNumber,
          auditType: c.auditType, taxType: c.taxType, triggerReason: c.triggerReason,
          fiscalYear: c.fiscalYear, taxPeriodStart: c.taxPeriodStart, taxPeriodEnd: c.taxPeriodEnd,
          riskScore: c.riskScore, priority: c.priority, returnReference: c.returnReference,
          assignedOfficerName: c.assignedOfficerName, supervisorName: c.supervisorName,
          scheduledDate: c.scheduledDate, dueDate: c.dueDate, remarks: c.remarks,
        });
        this.taxpayerSearchControl.setValue(c.taxpayerName);
        this.searchQuery = c.taxpayerName;
      }
    });
  }

  // ── Taxpayer Search — exact same pattern as tin-create ─────────────────────

  onSearchInput(): void {
    if (!this.searchQuery.trim()) {
      this.taxpayerResults = [];
      this.showResults     = false;
      this.hasSearched     = false;
    }
  }

  /** Called by Search button */
  searchTaxpayer(): void {
    const q = this.searchQuery.trim();
    if (!q) {
      this.toast.warning('Enter a name or TIN to search.');
      return;
    }
    if (q.length < 3) {
      this.toast.warning('Enter at least 3 characters to search.');
      return;
    }

    this.isSearching  = true;
    this.showResults  = false;
    this.hasSearched  = false;

    const url = `${API_ENDPOINTS.TAXPAYERS.LIST}?search=${encodeURIComponent(q)}`;
    this.http.get<Taxpayer[]>(url)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$), finalize(() => this.isSearching = false))
      .subscribe({
        next: data => {
          this.taxpayerResults = data;
          this.showResults     = true;
          this.hasSearched     = true;
          if (data.length === 0)
            this.toast.info('No taxpayer found. Check the name or TIN and try again.');
        },
        error: () => this.toast.error('Taxpayer search failed. Please try again.')
      });
  }

  selectTaxpayer(tp: Taxpayer): void {
    this.selectedTaxpayer = tp;
    const name = this.getDisplayName(tp);
    const tin  = tp.tinNumber || '';

    this.auditForm.patchValue({
      taxpayerId:   tp.id,
      taxpayerName: name,
      tinDisplay:   tin,
    });
    this.taxpayerSearchControl.setValue(name);
    this.searchQuery  = name;
    this.showResults  = false;
    this.taxpayerResults = [];
  }

  clearSelectedTaxpayer(): void {
    this.selectedTaxpayer = null;
    this.auditForm.patchValue({ taxpayerId: null, taxpayerName: '', tinDisplay: '' });
    this.taxpayerSearchControl.setValue('');
    this.searchQuery  = '';
    this.taxpayerResults = [];
    this.showResults  = false;
    this.hasSearched  = false;
  }

  getDisplayName(tp: Taxpayer): string {
    const type = tp.taxpayerType?.typeName?.toLowerCase() || '';
    return type.includes('company')
      ? tp.companyName || 'Unknown Company'
      : tp.fullName    || 'Unknown Individual';
  }

  // ── Navigation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  onCancel(): void {
    this.caseId
      ? this.router.navigate(['/audits', this.caseId])
      : this.router.navigate(['/audits']);
  }

  // ── Risk Bar ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  getRiskClass(score: number): string {
    if (score >= 75) return 'risk-critical';
    if (score >= 50) return 'risk-high';
    if (score >= 25) return 'risk-medium';
    return 'risk-low';
  }

  // ── Submit ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  onSubmit(): void {
    if (this.auditForm.invalid) { this.auditForm.markAllAsTouched(); return; }

    this.isSubmitting = true;
    const raw = this.auditForm.getRawValue();

    const payload = {
      taxpayerId:          raw.taxpayerId,
      auditType:           raw.auditType,
      taxType:             raw.taxType,
      triggerReason:       raw.triggerReason,
      fiscalYear:          raw.fiscalYear          || undefined,
      taxPeriodStart:      raw.taxPeriodStart      || undefined,
      taxPeriodEnd:        raw.taxPeriodEnd         || undefined,
      riskScore:           raw.riskScore,
      priority:            raw.priority,
      returnReference:     raw.returnReference     || undefined,
      assignedOfficerName: raw.assignedOfficerName || undefined,
      supervisorName:      raw.supervisorName       || undefined,
      scheduledDate:       raw.scheduledDate        || undefined,
      dueDate:             raw.dueDate              || undefined,
      remarks:             raw.remarks              || undefined,
    };

    this.auditService.createCase(payload)
      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
      .subscribe({
        next: created => {
          this.isSubmitting = false;
          this.toast.success('Audit case created successfully.');
          this.router.navigate(['/audits', created.id]);
        },
        error: () => { this.isSubmitting = false; }
      });
  }
}
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-edit/audit-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Audit Case</h4>
    <p>Update audit case details and status.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.taxpayerName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-code">{{ form.caseNo }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN and taxpayer details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return Reference</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.returnReference"
            placeholder="e.g. ITR-2024-001234" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Fiscal Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.fiscalYear">
            <option value="">— Select —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Audit Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon cyan">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Audit Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, priority, dates and status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Audit Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.auditType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of auditTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Priority</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.priority">
            <option *ngFor="let p of priorities" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Scheduled Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.scheduledDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Period From</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPeriodStart" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Period To</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar2-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPeriodEnd" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Assignment -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon amber">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Assignment</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Auditor and supervisor details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assigned Officer</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.assignedOfficerName">
            <option value="">— Select Officer —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let a of auditors" [value]="a">{{ a }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Supervisor</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.supervisorName">
            <option value="">— Select Supervisor —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let s of supervisors" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon green">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Internal notes or additional comments</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="3"
            placeholder="Internal notes, context, or special instructions..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Audit</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span> Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-list/audit-list.component.css
```css
/* ── KPI Row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.audit-kpi-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  padding: 16px 20px;
}

.akpi-card {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 140px;
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #eef2f8;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
}

.akpi-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.09);
}

.akpi-icon {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 18px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.akpi-icon.blue {
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
}
.akpi-icon.green {
  background: #e6f7ee;
  color: #1a7a45;
}
.akpi-icon.orange {
  background: #fff3e0;
  color: #e65100;
}
.akpi-icon.teal {
  background: #e0f7fa;
  color: #00695c;
}
.akpi-icon.red {
  background: #fce4ec;
  color: #c62828;
}

.akpi-text {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 2px;
}

.akpi-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #888;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
}

.akpi-value {
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1a2340;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

/* ── Type / Priority Badges ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cat-badge.type-desk {
  background: #e8f0fe;
  color: #1967d2;
}
.cat-badge.type-field {
  background: #fef7e0;
  color: #b45309;
}
.cat-badge.type-comp {
  background: #f3e8ff;
  color: #6d28d9;
}
.cat-badge.type-vat {
  background: #ecfdf5;
  color: #059669;
}
.cat-badge.type-refund {
  background: #fff1f2;
  color: #be123c;
}
.cat-badge.type-special {
  background: #fff7ed;
  color: #c2410c;
}

.priority-pill {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
}
.priority-pill.pri-low {
  background: #f5f7fb;
  color: #546e7a;
}
.priority-pill.pri-normal {
  background: #e8eef9;
  color: #1a3f8f;
}
.priority-pill.pri-high {
  background: #fff3e0;
  color: #e65100;
}
.priority-pill.pri-critical {
  background: #fce4ec;
  color: #c62828;
}

/* ── Code Badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.code-badge {
  font-family: monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  background: #e8eef9;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 5px;
}

.due-overdue {
  color: #c62828;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 12px;
}

/* ── Status Badge Extensions ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.badge-orange {
  background: #fff3e0;
  color: #e65100;
  border: 1px solid #fddcb5;
}
.badge-teal {
  background: #e0f7fa;
  color: #00695c;
  border: 1px solid #b2ebf2;
}
.badge-purple {
  background: #f3e8ff;
  color: #6d28d9;
  border: 1px solid #ddd6fe;
}
.badge-indigo {
  background: #e0e7ff;
  color: #3730a3;
  border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
}
.badge-yellow {
  background: #fffbeb;
  color: #92400e;
  border: 1px solid #fde68a;
}
.badge-pink {
  background: #fce7f3;
  color: #9d174d;
  border: 1px solid #fbcfe8;
}
.badge-lime {
  background: #f7fee7;
  color: #3f6212;
  border: 1px solid #d9f99d;
}
.badge-muted {
  background: #f3f4f6;
  color: #6b7280;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
}

/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .audit-kpi-row {
    padding: 12px;
  }
  .akpi-card {
    min-width: calc(50% - 6px);
    flex: 0 0 calc(50% - 6px);
  }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .akpi-card {
    min-width: 100%;
    flex: 0 0 100%;
  }
}

/* ── Pagination ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pagination-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 18px 0 0 20px;
  border-top: 1px solid #eef2f8;
}
.pagination-info {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #6b7280;
  padding-left: 4px;
}
.pagination-controls {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}
.btn-page,
.page-num {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-width: 42px;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #e0e8f0;
  background: #fff;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    background 0.2s,
    border-color 0.2s,
    color 0.2s;
}
.btn-page:hover:not(:disabled),
.page-num:hover {
  background: #e8eef9;
}
.btn-page:disabled {
  opacity: 0.4;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
.page-num.active {
  background: #1a3f8f;
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #1a3f8f;
}
.page-size-select {
  min-width: 120px;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #e0e8f0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #1a3f8f;
  font-size: 12px;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-view/audit-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Audit Case Details</h4>
    <p>Full audit case information and workflow.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && auditCase">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="audit-header-card">
    <div class="ahc-left">
      <div class="ahc-icon"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="ahc-case-no">{{ auditCase.caseNo }}</div>
        <div class="ahc-taxpayer">{{ auditCase.taxpayerName }}</div>
        <div class="ahc-meta">
          <span class="ahc-pill">{{ getTypeLabel(auditCase.auditType) }}</span>
          <span class="ahc-pill dim">{{ getTaxTypeLabel(auditCase.taxType) }}</span>
          <span class="ahc-pill dim" *ngIf="auditCase.fiscalYear">{{ auditCase.fiscalYear }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(auditCase.status)">
            {{ getStatusLabel(auditCase.status) }}
          </span>
          <span class="priority-pill" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(auditCase.priority)">
            {{ auditCase.priority }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ahc-right">
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Queries</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.openQueryCount }}/{{ auditCase.queryCount }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Findings</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.findingCount }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Assessment</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.hasAssessment ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Demand</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.hasDemandNotice ? 'Issued' : '—' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Action Buttons Row -->
  <div class="audit-action-row">
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="auditCase.status === 'CASE_CREATED'"
      (click)="issueNotice()">
      <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i> Issue Notice
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="canRequestDocuments()"
      (click)="openDocRequestModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i> Request Documents
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="canRaiseQuery()"
      (click)="openQueryModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-chat-dots-fill"></i> Raise Query
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="canAddFinding()"
      (click)="openFindingModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Add Finding
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn success" *ngIf="canProposeAssessment()"
      (click)="goToAssessment()">
      <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Propose Assessment
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn warning" *ngIf="canApproveAssessment()"
      (click)="openApprovalModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i> Approve Assessment
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn danger" *ngIf="auditCase.status === 'ASSESSMENT_APPROVED'"
      (click)="issueDemand()">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i> Issue Demand Notice
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Tabs -->
  <div class="audit-tabs-wrapper">
    <div class="audit-tabs">
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='overview'" (click)="setTab('overview')">
        <i class="bi bi-grid-1x2-fill"></i> Overview
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='queries'" (click)="setTab('queries'); loadQueries()">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-dots-fill"></i> Queries
        <span class="atab-badge" *ngIf="auditCase.openQueryCount > 0">{{ auditCase.openQueryCount }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='documents'" (click)="setTab('documents'); loadDocRequests()">
        <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i> Documents
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='findings'" (click)="setTab('findings'); loadFindings()">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Findings
        <span class="atab-badge warn" *ngIf="auditCase.findingCount > 0">{{ auditCase.findingCount }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='assessment'" (click)="setTab('assessment'); loadAssessment()">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Assessment
      </button>
      <button class="atab" *ngIf="auditCase.hasDemandNotice" [class.active]="activeTab==='demand'"
        (click)="setTab('demand'); loadDemand()">
        <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i> Demand Notice
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='timeline'" (click)="setTab('timeline')">
        <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i> Timeline
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Overview ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='overview'">
      <div class="details-grid">

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i><span>Taxpayer</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Name</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ auditCase.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">TIN</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ auditCase.tinNumber }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Tax Type</span><span class="detail-value">{{ getTaxTypeLabel(auditCase.taxType) }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-folder-fill"></i><span>Case Details</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Case No</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ auditCase.caseNo }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Audit Type</span><span class="detail-value">{{ getTypeLabel(auditCase.auditType) }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Fiscal Year</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.fiscalYear || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Period</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.taxPeriodStart || '—' }} → {{ auditCase.taxPeriodEnd || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="auditCase.returnReference"><span class="detail-label">Return Ref</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ auditCase.returnReference }}</span></span></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i><span>Trigger &amp; Risk</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Trigger</span><span class="detail-value">{{ getTriggerLabel(auditCase.triggerReason) }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Priority</span>
              <span class="detail-value"><span class="priority-pill" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(auditCase.priority)">{{ auditCase.priority }}</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Risk Score</span>
              <span class="detail-value">
                <span class="risk-num" [ngClass]="getRiskNumClass(auditCase.riskScore)">{{ auditCase.riskScore }}</span>
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i><span>Assignment</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Officer</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.assignedOfficerName || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Supervisor</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.supervisorName || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Scheduled</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.scheduledDate || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Due Date</span>
              <span class="detail-value" [class.due-overdue]="isDue(auditCase.dueDate)">{{ auditCase.dueDate || '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Created By</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.createdBy }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Created At</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.createdAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="detail-card mt-3" *ngIf="auditCase.remarks">
        <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-chat-text"></i><span>Remarks</span></div>
        <div class="detail-body">
          <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-value" style="text-align:left;">{{ auditCase.remarks }}</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Queries ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='queries'">
      <div class="tab-action-bar">
        <span class="tab-section-title">Audit Queries</span>
        <button class="btn-search" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;" *ngIf="canRaiseQuery()" (click)="openQueryModal()">
          <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Raise Query
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="queriesLoading">
        <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!queriesLoading">
        <div class="audit-item-card" *ngFor="let q of queries">
          <div class="aic-header">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ q.queryNo }}</span>
            <span class="cat-badge">{{ q.queryType }}</span>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="q.status==='OPEN' ? 'badge-warning' : 'badge-success'">{{ q.status }}</span>
            <span class="due-overdue" *ngIf="q.deadline && isDue(q.deadline)">Overdue</span>
          </div>
          <div class="aic-title">{{ q.subject }}</div>
          <div class="aic-body">{{ q.queryText }}</div>
          <div class="aic-meta">
            <span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ q.raisedBy }}</span>
            <span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> {{ q.raisedAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="q.deadline"><i class="bi bi-alarm"></i> Due: {{ q.deadline | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="aic-response" *ngIf="q.responseText">
            <span class="air-label"><i class="bi bi-reply-fill"></i> Response</span>
            <div class="air-text">{{ q.responseText }}</div>
            <div class="air-meta">{{ q.respondedBy }} · {{ q.respondedAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="queries.length === 0">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-dots"></i><p>No queries raised yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Documents ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
```
